{\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e8f4fd 0%, #f0f7fc 100%);\n}\n\n.nav-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  padding: 14px 16px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.15);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.nav-left,\n.nav-right {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  min-width: 72px;\n}\n\n.nav-right {\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n.nav-back,\n.nav-save {\n  width: 32px;\n  height: 32px;\n  border: none;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n\n  &:active {\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n}\n\n.nav-back {\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n  color: #8fb8ed;\n}\n\n.nav-save {\n  background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1);\n  color: #4caf50;\n}\n\n.nav-title {\n  font-size: 17px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: #475569;\n}\n\n.detail-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  padding: 16px;\n}\n\n.info-note {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  gap: 8px;\n  padding: 12px 14px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  color: #64748b;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  margin-bottom: 16px;\n\n  i {\n    color: #8fb8ed;\n    margin-top: 2px;\n  }\n}\n\n.settings-section {\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border-radius: 16px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n  padding: 16px;\n  margin-bottom: 16px;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.12);\n}\n\n.section-title {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: #475569;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n}\n\n.config-item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 12px;\n  padding: 12px 0;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n\n  &:last-child {\n    border-bottom: none;\n    padding-bottom: 0;\n  }\n\n  &:first-child {\n    padding-top: 0;\n  }\n}\n\n.config-item-column {\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: stretch;\n  gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.config-label {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 12px;\n  min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.config-icon {\n  width: 36px;\n  height: 36px;\n  min-width: 36px;\n  min-height: 36px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: white;\n  font-size: 14px;\n}\n\n.icon-display {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #d97706);\n}\n.icon-floating-button {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9, #2563eb);\n}\n.icon-controls {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #64748b, #475569);\n}\n.icon-append {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #7c3aed);\n}\n.icon-chat-append {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669);\n}\n.icon-history {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #2563eb);\n}\n.icon-emit {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ec4899, #db2777);\n}\n.icon-time {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f97316, #ea580c);\n}\n.icon-date-bind {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9, #0284c7);\n}\n.icon-time-bind {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #a855f7, #7c3aed);\n}\n\n.config-text {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 2px;\n  min-width: 0;\n}\n\n.config-name {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: #475569;\n}\n\n.config-desc {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  color: #94a3b8;\n  line-height: 1.35;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch {\n  position: relative;\n  width: 44px;\n  min-width: 44px;\n  height: 24px;\n  min-height: 24px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch input {\n  opacity: 0;\n  width: 0;\n  height: 0;\n}\n\n.toggle-slider {\n  position: absolute;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  inset: 0;\n  background: #cbd5e1;\n  border-radius: 24px;\n  transition: 0.3s;\n}\n\n.toggle-slider::before {\n  content: \'\';\n  position: absolute;\n  height: 18px;\n  width: 18px;\n  left: 3px;\n  bottom: 3px;\n  background: white;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  transition: 0.3s;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-slider {\n  background: #f59e0b;\n}\n\n.toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-slider::before {\n  transform: translateX(20px);\n}\n\n.history-input,\n.binding-input,\n.memo-input {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.35);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  color: #475569;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82);\n  outline: none;\n  appearance: none;\n\n  &:focus {\n    border-color: #3b82f6;\n    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1);\n  }\n}\n\n.history-input {\n  width: 70px;\n  height: 32px;\n  text-align: center;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  -moz-appearance: textfield;\n\n  &::-webkit-outer-spin-button,\n  &::-webkit-inner-spin-button {\n    -webkit-appearance: none;\n    margin: 0;\n  }\n}\n\n.binding-controls {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 8px;\n  width: 100%;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.binding-input {\n  flex: 1;\n  min-width: 0;\n  height: 34px;\n  padding: 0 10px;\n}\n\n.binding-clear {\n  width: 34px;\n  height: 34px;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.12);\n  color: #475569;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n\n  &:hover {\n    background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);\n    color: #ef4444;\n  }\n}\n\n.memo-input {\n  width: 100%;\n  min-height: 86px;\n  resize: vertical;\n  padding: 10px 12px;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.help-content {\n  font-size: 13px;\n  color: #64748b;\n  line-height: 1.8;\n\n  p {\n    margin: 0 0 6px 0;\n  }\n}\n\n.maintenance-actions {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 10px;\n  margin-top: 12px;\n}\n\n.secondary-btn {\n  flex: 1;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  padding: 10px 12px;\n  color: #64748b;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.12);\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.danger-section .secondary-btn:first-child {\n  color: #ef4444;\n  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, {\n  height: 100%;\n}\n\n.detail-page {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e8f4fd 0%, #f0f7fc 100%);\n}\n\n.nav-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  padding: 12px 16px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.6);\n  position: relative;\n  z-index: 20;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.nav-left,\n.nav-actions {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  min-width: 40px;\n}\n\n.nav-actions {\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n.nav-back,\n.nav-btn {\n  width: 28px;\n  height: 28px;\n  border: none;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n  color: #8fb8ed;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.nav-back:hover,\n.nav-btn:hover {\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.18);\n  color: #5b86d6;\n}\n\n.nav-title {\n  font-size: 16px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: #1e293b;\n}\n\n.detail-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  padding: 12px;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 12px;\n}\n\n.detail-content.no-padding {\n  padding: 0;\n  gap: 0;\n}\n\n.tab-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 8px;\n  padding: 8px 12px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.tab-btn {\n  flex: 1;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  padding: 10px 12px;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  background: transparent;\n  color: #94a3b8;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.tab-btn.active {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8fb8ed, #7aa8e0);\n  color: #fff;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.tab-btn i {\n  font-size: 12px;\n}\n\n.inner {\n  flex: 1;\n  min-height: 0;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.pane {\n  height: 100%;\n {\n  height: 100%;\n}\n\n.detail-page {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e8f4fd 0%, #f0f7fc 100%);\n}\n\n.nav-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  padding: 14px 16px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.15);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  position: relative;\n  z-index: 100;\n}\n\n.nav-left,\n.nav-actions {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n  min-width: 72px;\n}\n\n.nav-actions {\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n.nav-back,\n.nav-btn {\n  width: 32px;\n  height: 32px;\n  border: none;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n  color: #8fb8ed;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n\n  &:active {\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n    background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.2);\n  }\n}\n\n.nav-title {\n  font-size: 17px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: #475569;\n}\n\n.detail-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  padding: 12px;\n}\n\n.preset-content,\n.preset-list {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 12px;\n}\n\n.preset-toolbar {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.preset-selector {\n  width: 100%;\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.preset-select-trigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  padding: 10px 14px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.3);\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.preset-select-text,\n.preset-dropdown-name {\n  flex: 1;\n  min-width: 0;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.fa-chevron-down.rotate {\n  transform: rotate(180deg);\n}\n\n.preset-dropdown {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: calc(100% + 6px);\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  max-height: 220px;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  z-index: 200;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.3);\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);\n}\n\n.preset-dropdown-item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 10px;\n  padding: 10px 14px;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  color: #475569;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.preset-dropdown-item:hover,\n.preset-dropdown-item.is-active {\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.12);\n  color: #5b86d6;\n}\n\n.preset-dropdown-item.default {\n  color: #94a3b8;\n}\n\n.preset-dropdown-builtin {\n  margin-left: auto;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  color: #94a3b8;\n}\n\n.preset-dropdown-divider,\n.preset-action-divider {\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.18);\n}\n\n.preset-dropdown-divider {\n  height: 1px;\n  margin: 4px 0;\n}\n\n.preset-action-divider {\n  width: 1px;\n  height: 24px;\n  align-self: center;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  margin: 6px 4px;\n}\n\n.preset-actions {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 6px;\n  width: 100%;\n}\n\n.preset-action-btn,\n.add-btn-small {\n  border: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.3);\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  color: #64748b;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.preset-action-btn {\n  flex: 1;\n  height: 36px;\n}\n\n.preset-action-btn:hover:not(:disabled),\n.add-btn-small:hover {\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.15);\n  border-color: #8fb8ed;\n  color: #5b86d6;\n}\n\n.preset-action-btn:disabled {\n  opacity: 0.4;\n  cursor: not-allowed;\n}\n\n.preset-action-btn.danger:hover:not(:disabled) {\n  background: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.1);\n  border-color: #f87171;\n  color: #ef4444;\n}\n\n.preset-summary-card,\n.preset-empty {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 12px;\n  padding: 12px;\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.62);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.56);\n}\n\n.summary-icon {\n  width: 40px;\n  height: 40px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: #5b86d6;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.16);\n}\n\n.summary-text {\n  flex: 1;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 4px;\n  color: #64748b;\n  font-size: 12px;\n}\n\n.summary-text strong {\n  color: #334155;\n  font-size: 14px;\n}\n\n.add-btn-small {\n  padding: 8px 10px;\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.preset-block {\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.preset-block.is-fixed {\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.08);\n  border-color: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.2);\n}\n\n.block-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  padding: 12px;\n  gap: 8px;\n}\n\n.block-drag {\n  color: #94a3b8;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  padding: 8px 4px;\n}\n\n.block-icon {\n  width: 32px;\n  height: 32px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  color: white;\n}\n\n.block-icon.role-system {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #a78bfa, #8b5cf6);\n}\n\n.block-icon.role-assistant {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #60a5fa, #3b82f6);\n}\n\n.block-icon.role-user {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #34d399, #10b981);\n}\n\n.block-name-input,\n.role-select {\n  height: 32px;\n  border: none !important;\n  outline: none;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  color: #475569;\n  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7) !important;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\n.block-name-input {\n  flex: 1;\n  min-width: 0;\n  padding: 6px 10px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.role-select {\n  width: 94px;\n  padding: 6px 8px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n}\n\n.block-enabled {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.block-enabled input {\n  display: none;\n}\n\n.block-enabled span {\n  width: 34px;\n  height: 20px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);\n  position: relative;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.block-enabled span::after {\n  content: \'\';\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 3px;\n  left: 3px;\n  width: 14px;\n  height: 14px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  background: white;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n}\n\n.block-enabled input:checked + span {\n  background: #8fb8ed;\n}\n\n.block-enabled input:checked + span::after {\n  left: 17px;\n}\n\n.block-action-btn {\n  width: 32px;\n  height: 32px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.2);\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);\n  color: #94a3b8;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.block-action-btn:disabled {\n  opacity: 0.4;\n  cursor: not-allowed;\n}\n\n.block-action-btn.delete {\n  color: #f87171;\n}\n\n.block-content {\n  width: 100%;\n  min-height: 92px;\n  padding: 12px;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  color: #475569;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1) !important;\n  border: none !important;\n  resize: vertical;\n  outline: none;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  box-sizing: {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e8f4fd 0%, #f0f7fc 100%);\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.nav-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  padding: 14px 16px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.15);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.nav-left,\n.nav-right {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  min-width: 72px;\n}\n\n.nav-right {\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n.nav-back,\n.nav-save {\n  width: 32px;\n  height: 32px;\n  border: none;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n\n  &:active {\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n}\n\n.nav-back {\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n  color: #8fb8ed;\n}\n\n.nav-save {\n  background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1);\n  color: #4caf50;\n}\n\n.nav-title {\n  font-size: 17px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: #475569;\n}\n\n.detail-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  padding: 16px;\n}\n\n.user-profile-card,\n.info-section {\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border-radius: 18px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.15);\n  margin-bottom: 16px;\n}\n\n.user-profile-card {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: center;\n  padding: 24px;\n}\n\n.user-avatar-large {\n  width: 104px;\n  height: 104px;\n  padding: 0;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  border: 3px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.3);\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.25);\n  margin-bottom: 14px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);\n\n  img {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 100%;\n    object-fit: cover;\n  }\n}\n\n.editable-avatar,\n.editable-bg-preview {\n  cursor: pointer;\n  position: relative;\n\n  &::after {\n    content: \'\\f030\';\n    font-family: \'Font Awesome 6 Free\';\n    font-weight: 900;\n    position: absolute;\n    right: 8px;\n    bottom: 8px;\n    width: 28px;\n    height: 28px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    color: white;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8fb8ed, #7aa8e0);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    font-size: 12px;\n    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.3);\n  }\n}\n\n.user-name-input,\n.user-nickname-input,\n.editable-input,\n.editable-select,\n.url-input,\n.editable-textarea {\n  width: 100%;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  color: #475569;\n  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  outline: none;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n  appearance: none;\n  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n\n  &:focus {\n    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);\n    box-shadow:\n      0 0 0 2px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.3),\n      inset 0 1px 2px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n  }\n}\n\n.user-name-input {\n  max-width: 220px;\n  padding: 8px 12px;\n  font-size: 18px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  text-align: center;\n  margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n\n.user-nickname-input {\n  max-width: 220px;\n  padding: 7px 12px;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  text-align: center;\n}\n\n.info-section {\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.info-item {\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 12px;\n  padding: 14px 16px;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n\n  &:last-child {\n    border-bottom: none;\n  }\n}\n\n.info-label {\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  color: #94a3b8;\n}\n\n.editable-input,\n.editable-select {\n  flex: 1;\n  padding: 8px 12px;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  text-align: right;\n}\n\n.editable-select {\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.bio-item {\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: stretch;\n}\n\n.editable-textarea {\n  min-height: 86px;\n  padding: 10px 12px;\n  resize: vertical;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.image-section,\n.font-section {\n  padding: 14px;\n}\n\n.section-title {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n  color: #475569;\n  font-size: 15px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n\n  i {\n    color: #8fb8ed;\n  }\n}\n\n.bg-section + .bg-section {\n  margin-top: 14px;\n}\n\n.bg-title {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: #64748b;\n  margin-bottom: 7px;\n}\n\n.bg-preview {\n  width: 100%;\n  padding: 0;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  background: rgba(200, 200, 200, 0.3);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n\n  img {\n    width: 100%;\n    aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n  }\n}\n\n.bg-placeholder {\n  width: 100%;\n  aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n  color: #94a3b8;\n\n  i {\n    font-size: 24px;\n  }\n\n  span {\n    font-size: 12px;\n  }\n}\n\n.url-input {\n  margin-top: 8px;\n  padding: 8px 12px;\n  font-size: 13px;\n}\n\n.font-hint {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 8px;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  padding: 0 16px 14px;\n  color: #94a3b8;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n\n  i {\n    color: #8fb8ed;\n    margin-top: 2px;\n  }\n}\n'],sourceRoot:''}]);const {\n  height: 100%;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #e8f4fd 0%, #f0f7fc 100%);\n}\n\n.nav-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  padding: 14px 16px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.15);\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.nav-left,\n.nav-right {\n  min-width: 72px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: flex-start;\n}\n\n.nav-right {\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n.nav-back {\n  width: 32px;\n  height: 32px;\n  border: none;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n  color: #8fb8ed;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n\n  &:active {\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n    background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.2);\n  }\n}\n\n.nav-title {\n  font-size: 16px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: #334155;\n}\n\n.nav-text-btn {\n  height: 32px;\n  padding: 0 10px;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.12);\n  color: #5b86d6;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n\n  &:disabled {\n    opacity: 0.6;\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n  }\n}\n\n.detail-content {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  padding: 16px;\n}\n\n.settings-section,\n.batch-panel,\n.worldbook-card,\n.loading-state,\n.error-state,\n.empty-state {\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);\n  border-radius: 18px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.12);\n  padding: 16px;\n  margin-bottom: 14px;\n}\n\n.section-title-row {\n  width: 100%;\n  border: none;\n  background: transparent;\n  padding: 0;\n  margin: 0 0 10px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  color: #475569;\n\n  i {\n    color: #8fb8ed;\n    font-size: 14px;\n  }\n}\n\n.section-title-main {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: baseline;\n  gap: 10px;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.section-title-sub,\n.empty-desc {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: #94a3b8;\n}\n\n.help-body {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 12px;\n}\n\n.help-block {\n  padding: 12px 14px;\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.7);\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);\n}\n\n.help-subtitle,\n.section-title,\n.batch-title,\n.empty-title {\n  font-size: 13px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: #475569;\n}\n\n.help-text {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 6px;\n  color: #64748b;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.help-key {\n  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \'Liberation Mono\', \'Courier New\', monospace;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  padding: 0 4px;\n  border-radius: 6px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.12);\n  color: #5b86d6;\n}\n\n.info-note {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  gap: 10px;\n  padding: 12px 14px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.12);\n  border-radius: 14px;\n  color: #64748b;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n\n  i {\n    color: #6e9be8;\n    margin-top: 2px;\n  }\n}\n\n.help-tags,\n.entry-tags {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 8px;\n  margin-top: 10px;\n}\n\n.tag-example,\n.quick-tag {\n  padding: 6px 10px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.25);\n  color: #64748b;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, \'Liberation Mono\', \'Courier New\', monospace;\n}\n\n.loading-state,\n.error-state {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 10px;\n  color: #64748b;\n  font-size: 13px;\n}\n\n.retry-btn,\n.range-btn,\n.batch-clear,\n.binding-btn,\n.worldbook-toggle {\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.14);\n  color: #5b86d6;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.retry-btn {\n  margin-left: auto;\n  padding: 8px 10px;\n  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12);\n  color: #ef4444;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.empty-state {\n  text-align: center;\n  color: #64748b;\n}\n\n.empty-icon {\n  width: 52px;\n  height: 52px;\n  border-radius: 18px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.14);\n  color: #6e9be8;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  margin: 0 auto 10px;\n  font-size: 22px;\n}\n\n.batch-header,\n.worldbook-header,\n.entry-header {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 10px;\n  margin-bottom: 12px;\n}\n\n.batch-title {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n}\n\n.batch-count,\n.worldbook-count {\n  padding: 2px 8px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.14);\n  color: #5b86d6;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.batch-row {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n}\n\n.batch-label {\n  width: 36px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: #64748b;\n  text-align: right;\n}\n\n.batch-input {\n  height: 32px;\n  padding: 0 10px;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.25);\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);\n  color: #334155;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  outline: none;\n  flex: 1;\n  min-width: 0;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\n.range-btn {\n  height: 32px;\n  padding: 0 10px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.batch-clear,\n.binding-btn,\n.worldbook-toggle {\n  width: 30px;\n  height: 30px;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.worldbook-card {\n  padding: 0;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.worldbook-header {\n  padding: 14px;\n  margin-bottom: 0;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.1);\n}\n\n.worldbook-title {\n  min-width: 0;\n  flex: 1;\n  border: none;\n  background: transparent;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n  color: #475569;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  text-align: left;\n}\n\n.worldbook-name {\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.worldbook-actions {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n}\n\n.worldbook-meta {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 6px;\n  padding: 10px 14px;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.08);\n}\n\n.meta-pill {\n  padding: 4px 8px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.12);\n  color: #94a3b8;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.meta-pill.active,\n.quick-tag.selected,\n.entry-status.active {\n  background: rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.15);\n  color: #10b981;\n}\n\n.worldbook-entries {\n  padding: 12px 14px 14px;\n}\n\n.entry-row {\n  padding: 10px;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  background: rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.06);\n  margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n\n.entry-title {\n  min-width: 0;\n  flex: 1;\n  color: #475569;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n.entry-status {\n  padding: 2px 7px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.12);\n  color: #94a3b8;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n.entry-content,\n.entry-empty {\n  display: -webkit-box;\n  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;\n  line-clamp: 3;\n  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  color: #64748b;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  white-space: pre-wrap;\n}\n'],sourceRoot:''}]);const 16px;color:#fff;font-size:12px;z-index:200}.status-bar-left[data-v-47020f28]{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}.status-time.clickable[data-v-47020f28]{cursor:pointer;-webkit-user-select:none;user-select:none}.status-time.clickable[data-v-47020f28]:hover{opacity:0.9}.time-jump-overlay[data-v-47020f28]{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:900;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px 16px 28px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}.time-jump-modal[data-v-47020f28]{width:100%;max-width:320px;border-radius:18px;padding:14px 14px 12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.92);background:rgba(20,20,20,0.45);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)}.time-jump-title[data-v-47020f28]{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.02em}.time-jump-desc[data-v-47020f28]{margin-top:6px;font-size:12px;opacity:0.82}.time-jump-form[data-v-47020f28]{margin-top:12px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px}.time-jump-field[data-v-47020f28]{display:grid;gap:6px}.time-jump-label[data-v-47020f28]{font-size:12px;opacity:0.9}.time-jump-input[data-v-47020f28]{width:100%;height:34px;border-radius:12px;padding:0 10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.22);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.92);outline:none}.time-jump-input[data-v-47020f28]:focus{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.26);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.08)}.time-jump-error[data-v-47020f28]{margin-top:10px;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,145,145,0.95)}.time-jump-actions[data-v-47020f28]{margin-top:12px;display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:flex-end}.time-jump-btn[data-v-47020f28]{height:32px;border-radius:12px;padding:0 12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.92);cursor:pointer;transition:opacity 0.15s ease,transform 0.15s ease}.time-jump-btn[data-v-47020f28]:hover{opacity:0.95}.time-jump-btn[data-v-47020f28]:active{transform:scale(0.98)}.time-jump-btn.primary[data-v-47020f28]{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.22);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.18)}.time-jump-btn.ghost[data-v-47020f28]{background:transparent}.fade-enter-active[data-v-47020f28],.fade-leave-active[data-v-47020f28]{transition:opacity 0.16s ease}.fade-enter-from[data-v-47020f28],.fade-leave-to[data-v-47020f28]{opacity:0}.status-bar-right[data-v-47020f28]{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}.status-icon-svg[data-v-47020f28]{font-size:14px;color:#fff}.content-area[data-v-47020f28]{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;padding-top:24px;min-height:0}.home-indicator-area[data-v-47020f28]{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;height:20px;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;z-index:100;cursor:pointer}.home-indicator[data-v-47020f28]{width:120px;height:4px;background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);border-radius:2px}@media screen and (max-width:768px){.phone-wrapper[data-v-47020f28]{top:60px;left:50%;right:auto;transform:translateX(-50%) translate(var(--phone-drag-x),var(--phone-drag-y))}.phone-charm[data-v-47020f28]{display:none}.phone-close-btn[data-v-47020f28]{top:-40px;right:calc(50% + 20px);transform:translateX(50%)}.phone-close-btn[data-v-47020f28]:hover{transform:translateX(50%) scale(1.05)}.phone-close-btn[data-v-47020f28]:active{transform:translateX(50%) scale(0.95)}.phone-drag-btn[data-v-47020f28]{top:-40px;right:calc(50% - 20px);transform:translateX(50%)}.phone-drag-btn[data-v-47020f28]:hover{transform:translateX(50%) scale(1.05)}.phone-drag-btn[data-v-47020f28]:active{transform:translateX(50%) scale(0.95)}.phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-close-btn[data-v-47020f28]{top:10px;right:10px;transform:none}.phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-close-btn[data-v-47020f28]:hover{transform:scale(1.05)}.phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-close-btn[data-v-47020f28]:active{transform:scale(0.95)}.phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch CR,WAAY,CACZ,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,sBAAuB,CACvB,2BAA+B,CAC/B,0BAA2B,CAC3B,kCACF,CAEA,kCACE,UAAW,CACX,eAAgB,CAChB,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,4BAAgC,CAChC,8BAAkC,CAClC,uCAA2C,CAC3C,uCACF,CAEA,kCACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,qBACF,CAEA,iCACE,cAAe,CACf,cAAe,CACf,YACF,CAEA,iCACE,eAAgB,CAChB,YAAa,CACb,yBAA0B,CAC1B,QACF,CAEA,kCACE,YAAa,CACb,OACF,CAEA,kCACE,cAAe,CACf,WACF,CAEA,kCACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,kBAAmB,CACnB,cAAe,CACf,uCAA2C,CAC3C,2BAA+B,CAC/B,4BAAgC,CAChC,YACF,CAEA,wCACE,mCAAuC,CACvC,2CACF,CAEA,kCACE,eAAgB,CAChB,cAAe,CACf,4BACF,CAEA,oCACE,eAAgB,CAChB,YAAa,CACb,QAAS,CACT,wBACF,CAEA,gCACE,WAAY,CACZ,kBAAmB,CACnB,cAAe,CACf,uCAA2C,CAC3C,iCAAqC,CACrC,4BAAgC,CAChC,cAAe,CACf,kDACF,CAEA,sCACE,YACF,CAEA,uCACE,qBACF,CAEA,wCACE,mCAAuC,CACvC,iCACF,CAEA,sCACE,sBACF,CAEA,wEAEE,6BACF,CAEA,kEAEE,SACF,CAEA,mCACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,OACF,CAEA,kCAGE,cAAe,CAEf,UACF,CAEA,+BACE,MAAO,CACP,eAAgB,CAChB,iBAAkB,CAElB,gBAAiB,CACjB,YACF,CAGA,sCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,QAAS,CACT,MAAO,CACP,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,YAAa,CACb,sBAAuB,CACvB,kBAAmB,CACnB,WAAY,CACZ,cACF,CAEA,iCACE,WAAY,CACZ,UAAW,CACX,sCAA0C,CAC1C,iBACF,CAGA,oCACE,gCACE,QAAS,CACT,QAAS,CACT,UAAW,CACX,6EACF,CAGA,8BACE,YACF,CAGA,kCACE,SAAU,CACV,sBAAuB,CACvB,yBACF,CAEA,wCACE,qCACF,CAEA,yCACE,qCACF,CAGA,iCACE,SAAU,CACV,sBAAuB,CACvB,yBACF,CAEA,uCACE,qCACF,CAEA,wCACE,qCACF,CAEA,mEACE,QAAS,CACT,UAAW,CACX,cACF,CAEA,yEACE,qBACF,CAEA,0EACE,qBACF,CAEA,kEACE,QAAS,CACT,SAAU,CACV,UAAW,CACX,cACF,CAEA,wEACE,qBACF,CAEA,yEACE,qBACF,CACF',sourcesContent:['<template>\n  <div\n    v-show="store.phone.show"\n    ref="phoneWrapperRef"\n    class="phone-wrapper"\n    :class="{ \'controls-in-notch\': displaySettings.controlsInNotchArea }"\n    :style="phoneWrapperStyle"\n  >\n    \x3c!-- 鍏抽棴鎸夐挳 --\x3e\n    <button class="phone-close-btn" title="闅愯棌鎵嬫満" @click="hidePhone">\n      <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n    </button>\n    \x3c!-- 鎷栨嫿鎸夐挳 --\x3e\n    <button\n      class="phone-drag-btn"\n      title="鎸変綇鎷栨嫿绉诲姩鎵嬫満"\n      @mousedown="startDrag"\n      @touchstart="startDrag"\n    >\n      <i class="fas fa-arrows-alt"></i>\n    </button>\n    <div class="phone-charm"></div>\n    <div class="phone-container" :style="phoneContainerStyle">\n      <div class="phone-notch">\n      <div class="notch-sensor"></div>\n      <div class="notch-speaker"></div>\n      <div class="notch-forum"></div>\n    </div>\n    <div class="phone-screen">\n\t      \x3c!-- Status Bar --\x3e\n\t      <div class="status-bar">\n\t        <div class="status-bar-left">\n\t          <span\n\t            class="status-time"\n\t            :class="{ clickable: store.activeApp === \'home\' }"\n\t            title="鐐瑰嚮璋冩暣鏃堕棿"\n\t            @click="onStatusTimeClick"\n\t          >\n            {{ store.phone.time }}\n          </span>\n        </div>\n        <div class="status-bar-right">\n          \x3c!-- Signal Icon --\x3e\n          <i class="fas fa-signal status-icon-svg"></i>\n          \x3c!-- Wifi Icon --\x3e\n          <i class="fas fa-wifi status-icon-svg"></i>\n          \x3c!-- Battery Icon --\x3e\n          <i class="fas fa-battery-three-quarters status-icon-svg"></i>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <Transition name="fade">\n        <div\n          v-if="store.activeApp === \'home\' && store.phone.timeJumpModalOpen"\n          class="time-jump-overlay"\n          @click.self="closeTimeJumpModal"\n        >\n          <div class="time-jump-modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">\n            <div class="time-jump-title">璺宠浆鏃堕棿</div>\n            <div class="time-jump-desc">杈撳叆瑕佽烦杞埌鐨勬棩鏈熷拰鏃堕棿锛堝彲鍙敼鍏朵腑涓€涓級銆?/div>\n\n            <div class="time-jump-form">\n              <label class="time-jump-field">\n                <div class="time-jump-label">鏃ユ湡</div>\n                <input v-model="timeJumpDateInput" class="time-jump-input" type="date" />\n              </label>\n\n              <label class="time-jump-field">\n                <div class="time-jump-label">鏃堕棿</div>\n                <input v-model="timeJumpTimeInput" class="time-jump-input" type="time" />\n              </label>\n            </div>\n\n            <div v-if="timeJumpError" class="time-jump-error">{{ timeJumpError }}</div>\n\n            <div class="time-jump-actions">\n              <button class="time-jump-btn ghost" @click="closeTimeJumpModal">鍙栨秷</button>\n              <button class="time-jump-btn primary" @click="applyTimeJump">璺宠浆</button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </Transition>\n\n      \x3c!-- Content Area --\x3e\n      <div class="content-area">\n        <Home v-show="store.activeApp === \'home\'" />\n        <Assist v-if="store.activeApp === \'assist\'" />\n        <Chat v-show="store.activeApp === \'chat\'" />\n        <User v-show="store.activeApp === \'user\'" />\n        <Forum v-if="store.activeApp === \'forum\'" />\n        <Settings v-show="store.activeApp === \'settings\'" />\n        <Dynamic v-if="store.activeApp === \'dynamic\'" />\n        <Browser v-if="store.activeApp === \'browser\'" @back="goHome" />\n        <Phone v-if="store.activeApp === \'phone\'" @back="goHome" />\n        <Camera v-if="store.activeApp === \'camera\'" @back="goHome" />\n        <Email v-if="store.activeApp === \'email\'" @back="goHome" />\n        <Map v-if="store.activeApp === \'map\'" @back="goHome" />\n        <Music v-if="store.activeApp === \'music\'" @back="goHome" />\n        <ListenTogether v-if="store.activeApp === \'listen-together\'" />\n        <LiveList v-if="store.activeApp === \'live\'" @back="goHome" @enter-room="enterLiveRoom" />\n        <LiveRoom\n          v-if="store.activeApp === \'liveroom\'"\n          :streamer-name="selectedLiveRoom?.name"\n          :room-title="selectedLiveRoom?.title"\n          @back="backToLiveList"\n        />\n        <Calendar v-if="store.activeApp === \'calendar\'" @back="goHome" />\n        <Diary v-if="store.activeApp === \'diary\'" />\n        <Shopping v-if="store.activeApp === \'shopping\'" />\n      </div>\n\n      \x3c!-- Navigation Bar / Home Indicator for iPhone style --\x3e\n      <div v-if="store.activeApp !== \'home\'" class="home-indicator-area">\n        <div class="home-indicator"></div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</template>\n\n<script setup lang="ts">\nimport { ref, computed, watch, watchEffect, onMounted, onUnmounted } from \'vue\';\nimport _ from \'lodash\';\nimport Assist from \'./apps/Assist/index.vue\';\nimport Browser from \'./apps/Browser/index.vue\';\nimport Camera from \'./apps/Camera/index.vue\';\nimport Calendar from \'./apps/Calendar/index.vue\';\nimport Chat from \'./apps/Chat/index.vue\';\nimport Diary from \'./apps/Diary/index.vue\';\nimport Dynamic from \'./apps/Dynamic/index.vue\';\nimport Email from \'./apps/Email/index.vue\';\nimport Forum from \'./apps/Forum/index.vue\';\nimport Home from \'./apps/Home/index.vue\';\nimport LiveList from \'./apps/Live/LiveList.vue\';\nimport LiveRoom from \'./apps/Live/LiveRoom.vue\';\nimport Map from \'./apps/Map/index.vue\';\nimport Music from \'./apps/Music/index.vue\';\nimport ListenTogether from \'./apps/ListenTogether/index.vue\';\nimport Phone from \'./apps/Phone/index.vue\';\nimport Settings from \'./apps/Settings/index.vue\';\nimport User from \'./apps/User/index.vue\';\nimport Shopping from \'./apps/Shopping/index.vue\';\nimport { store, initUserFont } from \'./store\';\nimport { debugLog } from \'./debug\';\nimport { getHostDocumentSafe } from \'./shadowHost\';\nimport { useChatCss } from \'./apps/Settings/composables/useChatCss\';\nimport { useHomeCss } from \'./apps/Settings/composables/useHomeCss\';\nimport { useDisplaySettings } from \'./apps/Settings/composables/useDisplaySettings\';\nimport {\n  ensurePhoneDateTimeChatVariableInitialized,\n  getPhoneDateTimeSettingsFromChatVariables,\n  setPhoneDateTimeToChatVariables,\n} from \'./dateTimeVariables\';\n\n// 榛樿绌虹敤鎴锋暟鎹甛nconst defaultUser = {\n  id: \'user\',\n  name: \'鐢ㄦ埛\',\n  nickname: \'\',\n  avatar: \'\',\n  email: \'\',\n  bio: \'\',\n  state: \'鍦ㄧ嚎\',\n};\n\n// 浠庤鑹插彉閲忓姞杞界敤鎴锋暟鎹甛nconst loadUserFromChat = () => {\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' });\n    const phoneData = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data\');\n    if (phoneData?.user) {\n      return phoneData.user;\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn(\'鏃犳硶浠庤鑹插彉閲忓姞杞界敤鎴锋暟鎹?\', e);\n  }\n  return null;\n};\n\nconst chatUser = loadUserFromChat();\nconst baseInfo = ref({\n  user: chatUser || defaultUser,\n});\n\nconst phoneWrapperRef = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null);\n\nfunction getScriptIdSafe(): string {\n  try {\n    return typeof getScriptId === \'function\' ? String(getScriptId() ?? \'\') : \'\';\n  } catch {\n    return \'\';\n  }\n}\n\n\t// 鍔犺浇瀛椾綋 CSS 鍒板綋鍓嶆枃妗n\tconst loadFontStyles = () => {\n\t  try {\n\t    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' });\n\t    const phoneData = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data\');\n\t    const fontsFromData = Array.isArray(phoneData?.fonts) ? phoneData.fonts : [];\n\t    // 浣滀负 iOS 鐨?SF 瀛椾綋骞虫浛锛氱敤浜庨粯璁?UI/涓婚〉鏃堕棿鏍峰紡\n\t    const builtinFonts: Array<{ name: string; url: string }> = [\n\t      {\n\t        name: \'Inter\',\n\t        url: \'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap\',\n\t      },\n\t    ];\n\t    const fontMap = new globalThis.Map<string, { name: string; url: string }>();\n\t    builtinFonts.forEach(font => {\n\t      if (font?.name && font?.url) fontMap.set(font.name, font);\n\t    });\n\t    fontsFromData.forEach((font: { name: string; url: string }) => {\n\t      if (font?.name && font?.url) fontMap.set(font.name, font);\n\t    });\n\t    const fonts = Array.from(fontMap.values());\n\n\t    const hostDoc = getHostDocumentSafe();\n\t    const scriptKey = getScriptIdSafe() || \'default\';\n\n\t    // 绉婚櫎鏃х殑瀛椾綋鏍峰紡锛堝涓绘枃妗?+ 鍘嗗彶閬楃暀鐨勮剼鏈?iframe锛塡n    hostDoc.querySelectorAll(`link[data-phone-font-script="${scriptKey}"]`).forEach(el => el.remove());\n    document.querySelectorAll(\'link[data-phone-font]\').forEach(el => el.remove());\n\n    // 娣诲姞鏂扮殑瀛椾綋鏍峰紡鍒板涓绘枃妗ｏ紙Shadow DOM 鍐呭悓鏍峰彲鐢級\n    fonts.forEach((font: { name: string; url: string }) => {\n      if (font.url) {\n        const link = hostDoc.createElement(\'link\');\n        link.rel = \'stylesheet\';\n        link.href = font.url;\n        link.setAttribute(\'data-phone-font\', font.name);\n        link.setAttribute(\'data-phone-font-script\', scriptKey);\n        link.addEventListener(\'load\', () => debugLog(\'fontLink.load\', { name: font.name, url: font.url }));\n        link.addEventListener(\'error\', () => debugLog(\'fontLink.error\', { name: font.name, url: font.url }));\n        hostDoc.head.appendChild(link);\n        console.info(\'[Font] 宸插姞杞藉瓧浣?CSS 鍒板涓绘枃妗?\', font.name, font.url);\n      }\n    });\n\n\t    debugLog(\'loadFontStyles\', {\n\t      fontsCount: Array.isArray(fonts) ? fonts.length : 0,\n\t      hostLinkCount: hostDoc.head.querySelectorAll(`link[data-phone-font-script="${scriptKey}"]`).length,\n\t    });\n\t  } catch (e) {\n\t    console.warn(\'鏃犳硶鍔犺浇瀛椾綋鏍峰紡:\', e);\n\t  }\n\t};\n\n// 鍒濆鍖栨椂鍔犺浇瀛椾綋\nloadFontStyles();\n\n// 璁＄畻鎵嬫満瀹瑰櫒鏍峰紡锛堜粎鑳屾櫙鍥撅級\nconst phoneContainerStyle = computed(() => {\n  const style: Record<string, string | undefined> = {};\n  if (baseInfo.value.user.phoneBg) = scriptId ? `div[script_id="${scriptId}"] .phone-container .chat-detail` : \'\';\n\n    // 娓呯悊鎵€鏈夊彲鑳界殑鍘嗗彶娈嬬暀锛堝寘鍚棫鐗堟湰鍙兘娌″啓 id 鐨勬儏鍐碉級锛歕n    // - 鍙繚鐣欌€滃綋鍓嶅簲璇ュ瓨鍦ㄧ殑閭ｄ竴涓€漒n    // - 鍏抽棴/娓呯┖鍚庡繀椤诲交搴曞け鏁堬紝閬垮厤鍑虹幇鈥滃叧闂篃涓嶆仮澶嶉粯璁も€漒n    document.querySelectorAll(\'style\').forEach(el => {\n      const id = el.id || \'\';\n      const text = el.textContent || \'\';\n      const id === styleId) return;\n      el.remove();\n    });\n\n    if (!css.trim()) return;\n\n    let styleEl = document.getElementById(styleId) as HTMLStyleElement | null;\n\n    if (!styleEl) {\n styleId) return;\n      el.remove();\n    });\n\n    if (!css.trim()) return;\n\n    let styleEl = document.getElementById(styleId) as HTMLStyleElement | null;\n\n    if (!styleEl) {\n      styleEl = updateChatCssStyle();\n});\n// 鐩戝惉涓婚〉 CSS 鍙樺寲骞舵洿鏂版牱寮廫nwatchEffect(() => {\n  updateHomeCssStyle();\n});\n\n// 鍒濆鍖栫敤鎴峰瓧浣揬ninitUserFont();\n\n// 鏄剧ず璁剧疆锛堢敤浜庢帶鍒舵寜閽綅缃瓑锛塡nconst { displaySettings, loadSettings: loadDisplaySettings } = useDisplaySettings();\nloadDisplaySettings();\n\nconst goHome = () => {\n  store.activeApp = \'home\';\n};\n\nconst timeJumpDateInput = ref(\'\');\nconst timeJumpTimeInput = ref(\'\');\nconst timeJumpError = ref(\'\');\n\nfunction phoneDateToInputDate(value: string): string {\n  const str = (value || \'\').trim();\n  const match = str.match(/^(\\d{4})骞?\\d{1,2})鏈?\\d{1,2})鏃?/);\n  if (!match) return \'\';\n  const year = match[1];\n  const month = String(Number(match[2])).padStart(2, \'0\');\n  const day = String(Number(match[3])).padStart(2, \'0\');\n  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;\n}\n\nfunction inputDateToPhoneDate(value: string): string | null {\n  const str = (value || \'\').trim();\n  const match = str.match(/^(\\d{4})-(\\d{2})-(\\d{2})$/);\n  if (!match) return null;\n  const year = match[1];\n  const month = String(Number(match[2]));\n  const day = String(Number(match[3]));\n  if (!month || !day) return null;\n  return `${year}骞?{month}鏈?{day}鏃;\n}\n\nfunction openTimeJumpModalPrefilled(): void {\n  ensurePhoneDateTimeChatVariableInitialized();\n  timeJumpError.value = \'\';\n  timeJumpDateInput.value = phoneDateToInputDate(store.phone.date);\n  timeJumpTimeInput.value = (store.phone.time || \'\').trim();\n  store.phone.timeJumpModalOpen = true;\n}\n\nfunction onStatusTimeClick(): void {\n  if (store.activeApp !== \'home\') return;\n  openTimeJumpModalPrefilled();\n}\n\nfunction closeTimeJumpModal(): void {\n  store.phone.timeJumpModalOpen = false;\n  timeJumpError.value = \'\';\n}\n\nasync function applyTimeJump(): Promise<void> {\n  timeJumpError.value = \'\';\n  ensurePhoneDateTimeChatVariableInitialized();\n\n  const nextDate = inputDateToPhoneDate(timeJumpDateInput.value);\n  const nextTime = (timeJumpTimeInput.value || \'\').trim() || null;\n\n  if (!nextDate && !nextTime) {\n    timeJumpError.value = \'璇疯嚦灏戝～鍐欐棩鏈熸垨鏃堕棿銆俓';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  setPhoneDateTimeToChatVariables({\n    date: nextDate ?? undefined,\n    time: nextTime ?? undefined,\n  });\n\n  const settings = getPhoneDateTimeSettingsFromChatVariables();\n  if (settings.enabled) {\n    if (nextDate) store.phone.date = nextDate;\n    if (nextTime) store.phone.time = nextTime;\n  }\n\n  const dateForMessage = nextDate || store.phone.date;\n  const timeForMessage = nextTime || store.phone.time;\n  try {\n    await createChatMessages([\n      {\n        role: \'system\',\n        message: `璺宠浆鏃堕棿鍒?${dateForMessage} ${timeForMessage}`,\n        is_hidden: false,\n      },\n    ]);\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn(\'[TimeJump] 鍐欏叆閰掗娑堟伅澶辫触(蹇界暐):\', e);\n  }\n\n  closeTimeJumpModal();\n}\n\nwatch(\n  () => store.activeApp,\n  () => {\n    if (store.activeApp !== \'home\') closeTimeJumpModal();\n  },\n);\n\nwatch(\n  () => store.phone.timeJumpModalOpen,\n  opened => {\n    if (!opened) return;\n    if (store.activeApp !== \'home\') return;\n    // Home 鐨勭偣鍑诲彧浼氳缃?open=true锛岃繖閲岀粺涓€璐熻矗濉厖榛樿鍊糪n    timeJumpError.value = \'\';\n    timeJumpDateInput.value = null>(null);\n\nconst enterLiveRoom = (room: { name: string; title: string }) => {\n  selectedLiveRoom.value = room;\n  store.activeApp = \'liveroom\';\n};\n\nconst backToLiveList = () => {\n  store.activeApp = \'live\';\n};\n\n// 闅愯棌鎵嬫満\nconst hidePhone = () => {\n  // 鍏抽棴鍙兘娈嬬暀鐨勫叏灞忓浘鐗囬瑙堝眰锛堥伩鍏嶄笅娆℃墦寮€鎵嬫満浠嶆樉绀猴級\n  try {\n    const rootNode = phoneWrapperRef.value?.getRootNode?.() as Document | ShadowRoot | null;\n    if (rootNode && \'querySelector\' in rootNode) {\n      (rootNode as ShadowRoot).querySelector(\'#phone-image-preview-overlay\')?.remove();\n    }\n    phoneWrapperRef.value?.ownerDocument?.getElementById(\'phone-image-preview-overlay\')?.remove();\n  } catch {\n    // ignore\n  }\n  store.phone.show = false;\n};\n\n// ========== 鎷栨嫿鍔熻兘 ==========\n// localStorage 閿悕\nconst DRAG_POSITION_KEY = \'phone_drag_position\';\n\n// 浠?localStorage 鍔犺浇浣嶇疆\nconst loadDragPosition = (): { x: number; y: number } => {\n  try {\n    const saved = localStorage.getItem(DRAG_POSITION_KEY);\n    if (saved) {\n      const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);\n      if (typeof parsed.x === \'number\' && typeof parsed.y === \'number\') {\n        return parsed;\n      }\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn(\'[Drag] 鏃犳硶鍔犺浇浣嶇疆:\', e);\n  }\n  return { x: 0, y: 0 };\n};\n\n// 淇濆瓨浣嶇疆鍒?localStorage\nconst saveDragPosition = (position: { x: number; y: number }) => {\n  try {\n    localStorage.setItem(DRAG_POSITION_KEY, JSON.stringify(position));\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn(\'[Drag] 鏃犳硶淇濆瓨浣嶇疆:\', e);\n  }\n};\n\n// 鎷栨嫿浣嶇疆鐘舵€侊紙浠?localStorage 鍒濆鍖栵級\nconst dragPosition = ref(loadDragPosition());\nconst isDragging = ref(false);\nlet startX = 0;\nlet startY = 0;\nlet initialX = 0;\nlet initialY = 0;\nlet isTouchEvent = false;\n\n// 鑾峰彇鐖舵枃妗ｏ紙鍥犱负鑴氭湰杩愯鍦?iframe 涓級\nconst getParentDocument = () => {\n  const owner = phoneWrapperRef.value?.ownerDocument;\n  if (owner) return owner;\n  try {\n    return window.parent?.document ?? document;\n  } catch {\n    return document;\n  }\n};\n\n// 璁＄畻鎵嬫満鍖呰鍣ㄦ牱寮廫nconst phoneWrapperStyle = computed(() => {\n  return {\n    \'--phone-drag-x\': `${dragPosition.value.x}px`,\n    \'--phone-drag-y\': `${dragPosition.value.y}px`,\n  };\n});\n\n// 寮€濮嬫嫋鎷絓nconst startDrag = (e: MouseEvent | TouchEvent) => {\n  e.preventDefault();\n  e.stopPropagation();\n  isDragging.value = true;\n  isTouchEvent = e.type === \'touchstart\';\n\n  if (isTouchEvent && (e as TouchEvent).touches.length > 0) {\n    startX = (e as TouchEvent).touches[0].clientX;\n    startY = (e as TouchEvent).touches[0].clientY;\n  } else {\n    startX = (e as MouseEvent).clientX;\n    startY = (e as MouseEvent).clientY;\n  }\n\n  initialX = dragPosition.value.x;\n  initialY = dragPosition.value.y;\n\n  // 缁戝畾鍒扮埗鏂囨。鐨勫叏灞€浜嬩欢\n  const parentDoc = getParentDocument();\n  if (isTouchEvent) {\n    parentDoc.addEventListener(\'touchmove\', onDrag as EventListener, { passive: false });\n    parentDoc.addEventListener(\'touchend\', stopDrag);\n  } else {\n    parentDoc.addEventListener(\'mousemove\', onDrag as EventListener);\n    parentDoc.addEventListener(\'mouseup\', stopDrag);\n  }\n};\n\n// 鎷栨嫿涓璡nconst onDrag = (e: MouseEvent | TouchEvent) => {\n  if (!isDragging.value) return;\n  e.preventDefault();\n\n  let currentX: number, currentY: number;\n  if (isTouchEvent && (e as TouchEvent).touches?.length > 0) {\n    currentX = (e as TouchEvent).touches[0].clientX;\n    currentY = (e as TouchEvent).touches[0].clientY;\n  } else {\n    currentX = (e as MouseEvent).clientX;\n    currentY = (e as MouseEvent).clientY;\n  }\n\n  const dx = currentX - startX;\n  const dy = currentY - startY;\n\n  dragPosition.value = {\n    x: initialX + dx,\n    y: initialY + dy,\n  };\n};\n\n// 鍋滄鎷栨嫿\nconst stopDrag = () => {\n  isDragging.value = false;\n\n  // 淇濆瓨浣嶇疆鍒?localStorage\n  saveDragPosition(dragPosition.value);\n\n  const parentDoc = getParentDocument();\n  if (isTouchEvent) {\n    parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'touchmove\', onDrag as EventListener);\n    parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'touchend\', stopDrag);\n  } else {\n    parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'mousemove\', onDrag as EventListener);\n    parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'mouseup\', stopDrag);\n  }\n};\n\n// 娓呯悊浜嬩欢鐩戝惉\nonUnmounted(() => {\n  const parentDoc = getParentDocument();\n  parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'mousemove\', onDrag as EventListener);\n  parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'mouseup\', stopDrag);\n  parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'touchmove\', onDrag as EventListener);\n  parentDoc.removeEventListener(\'touchend\', stopDrag);\n\n  try {\n    const scriptId = typeof getScriptId === \'function\' ? getScriptId() : \'\';\n    const scopePrefixForCleanup = scriptId ? `div[script_id="${scriptId}"] .phone-container .chat-detail` : \'\';\n    document.querySelectorAll(\'style\').forEach(el => {\n      const id = el.id || \'\';\n (isChatCssStyle) el.remove();\n    });\n  } catch {\n    // ignore\n  }\n});\n<\/script>\n\n<style scoped>\n/* 鍩烘湰鏍峰紡璁剧疆 */\n* {\n  box-sizing: pointer-events: none;\n  --phone-drag-x: 0px;\n  --phone-drag-y: 0px;\n  transform: translate(var(--phone-drag-x), var(--phone-drag-y));\n}\n\n.phone-container {\n  width: 360px;\n  height: 600px;\n relative;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);\n  font-family: var(\n    --phone-font-family,\n    \'Inter\',\n    -apple-system,\n   sans-serif\n  ); /* 鐢卞姩鎬佸彉閲忔帶鍒讹紝榛樿鏇存帴杩?iOS 瀛椾綋鏍?*/\n  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;\n  pointer-events: auto; /* Ensure clicks work {\n  font-family: inherit !important;\n}\n\n.phone-charm {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 26px;\n  right: -49px;\n  width: 160px;\n  height: 160px;\n  background-image: transform: scale(0.95);\n  background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.6);\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);\n}\n\n/* 灏嗗叧闂?鎷栨嫿鎸夐挳鏀惧埌鎵嬫満鍐呴《閮紙鍒樻捣涓婃柟锛?*/\n.phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-close-btn {\n 0;\n}\n\n.status-bar {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 0;\n  left: 0;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 24px;\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n background: rgba(20, 20, 20, 0.45);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);\n  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);\n}\n\n.time-jump-title {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.02em;\n}\n\n.time-jump-desc {\n  margin-top: 6px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  opacity: 0.82;\n}\n\n.time-jump-form {\n  margin-top: 12px;\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n  gap: 10px;\n}\n\n.time-jump-field {\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 6px;\n}\n\n.time-jump-label {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  opacity: 0.9;\n}\n\n.time-jump-input {\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 34px;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  padding: 0 10px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);\n  outline: none;\n}\n\n.time-jump-input:focus {\n  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.26);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n}\n\n.time-jump-error {\n  margin-top: 10px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  color: rgba(255, 145, 145, 0.95);\n}\n\n.time-jump-actions {\n  margin-top: 12px;\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 10px;\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n}\n\n.time-jump-btn {\n  height: 32px;\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  padding: 0 12px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: opacity 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;\n}\n\n.time-jump-btn:hover {\n  opacity: 0.95;\n}\n\n.time-jump-btn:active {\n  transform: scale(0.98);\n}\n\n.time-jump-btn.primary {\n  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.22);\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);\n}\n\n.time-jump-btn.ghost {\n  background: transparent;\n}\n\n.fade-enter-active,\n.fade-leave-active {\n  transition: opacity 0.16s ease;\n}\n\n.fade-enter-from,\n.fade-leave-to {\n  opacity: 0;\n}\n\n.status-bar-right {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n}\n\n.status-icon-svg {\n  /* width: 14px;\n  height: 14px; */\n  font-size: 14px;\n  /* fill: #fff; */\n  color: #fff;\n}\n\n.content-area {\n  flex: 1;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  position: relative;\n  /* Add padding top to account for status bar */\n  padding-top: 24px;\n  min-height: 0;\n}\n\n/* Home Indicator Area (replacing nav-bar for iPhone style) */\n.home-indicator-area {\n  position: absolute;\n  bottom: 0;\n  left: 0;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 20px;\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: center;\n  align-items: center;\n  z-index: 100;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.home-indicator {\n  width: 120px;\n  height: 4px;\n  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n  border-radius: 2px;\n}\n\n/* 绉诲姩绔€傞厤 - 鎵嬫満姘村钩灞呬腑锛屽浐瀹氶《閮ㄨ窛绂?*/\n@media screen and (max-width: 768px) {\n  .phone-wrapper {\n    top: 60px;\n    left: 50%;\n    right: auto;\n    transform: translateX(-50%) translate(var(--phone-drag-x), var(--phone-drag-y));\n  }\n\n  /* 绉诲姩绔殣钘忔寕浠?*/\n  .phone-charm {\n    display: none;\n  }\n\n  /* 绉诲姩绔叧闂寜閽綅缃皟鏁?*/\n  .phone-close-btn {\n    top: -40px;\n    right: calc(50% + 20px);\n    transform: translateX(50%);\n  }\n\n  .phone-close-btn:hover {\n    transform: translateX(50%) scale(1.05);\n  }\n\n  .phone-close-btn:active {\n    transform: translateX(50%) scale(0.95);\n  }\n\n  /* 绉诲姩绔嫋鎷芥寜閽綅缃皟鏁?*/\n  .phone-drag-btn {\n    top: -40px;\n    right: calc(50% - 20px);\n    transform: translateX(50%);\n  }\n\n  .phone-drag-btn:hover {\n    transform: translateX(50%) scale(1.05);\n  }\n\n  .phone-drag-btn:active {\n    transform: translateX(50%) scale(0.95);\n  }\n\n  .phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-close-btn {\n    top: 10px;\n    right: 10px;\n    transform: none;\n  }\n\n  .phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-close-btn:hover {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n  }\n\n  .phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-close-btn:active {\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n\n  .phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-drag-btn {\n    top: 10px;\n    left: 10px;\n    right: auto;\n    transform: none;\n  }\n\n  .phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-drag-btn:hover {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n  }\n\n  .phone-wrapper.controls-in-notch .phone-drag-btn:active {\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n}\n</style>\n'],sourceRoot:''}]);const s=i},8618(e,n,t){t.r(n),t.d(n,{default:()=>s});var
