.home-widget-caption[data-v-2f70bcde],.app-home-screen.home-light-style .app-label[data-v-2f70bcde],.app-home-screen.home-light-style .app-block .home-app-icon i[data-v-2f70bcde],.app-home-screen.home-light-style .bottom-bar .app .icon-container i[data-v-2f70bcde],.app-home-screen.home-light-style .bottom-bar .app span[data-v-2f70bcde]{text-shadow:none}\n','',{version:3,sources:['webpack://./src/phone/apps/Home/index.vue'],names:[],mappings:'AA2iBA,kCACE,kCAAsC,CACtC,sBAAuB,CACvB,uCAA2C,CAC3C,8BAAkC,CAClC,+BAAmC,CACnC,0CAA8C,CAC9C,yCAA6C,CAC7C,WAAY,CACZ,iBACF,CAEA,mDACE,qCAAyC,CACzC,qCAAyC,CACzC,qCAAyC,CACzC,oCAAwC,CACxC,qCAAyC,CACzC,0CAA8C,CAC9C,+CACF,CAEA,6BACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,QAAS,CACT,SAAU,CACV,UAAW,CACX,YAAa,CACb,eAAgB,CAChB,kBACF,CAEA,qCACE,eACF,CAEA,mCACE,YAAa,CACb,WAAY,CACZ,qBACF,CAEA,4BACE,aAAc,CACd,WAAY,CACZ,iBACF,CAEA,sCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,QAAS,CACT,YAAa,CACb,0BAA2B,CAC3B,SAAU,CACV,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,eAAgB,CAChB,mBAAoB,CACpB,wCAAyC,CACzC,yBAA0B,CAC1B,iCACF,CAEA,gCACE,SAAU,CACV,UAAW,CACX,QAAS,CACT,mBAAoB,CACpB,SAAU,CACV,QAAS,CACT,cAAe,CACf,iCAAqC,CACrC,yEACF,CAEA,sCACE,qBACF,CAEA,uCACE,UAAW,CACX,iCACF,CAEA,uCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,KAAM,CACN,MAAO,CACP,OAAQ,CACR,6EAAgF,CAChF,SAAU,CACV,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,sBAAuB,CACvB,kBAAmB,CACnB,QAAS,CACT,SAAU,CACV,mBAAoB,CACpB,iBAAkB,CAClB,8LAauB,CACvB,kCAAmC,CACnC,iCACF,CAEA,kCACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,qBAAsB,CACtB,WAAY,CACZ,yBACF,CAEA,kCACE,cAAe,CACf,aAAc,CACd,eAAgB,CAChB,sBACF,CAEA,oEAEE,4BAA6B,CAC7B,2BAA4B,CAC5B,gCACF,CAEA,2BACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,KAAM,CACN,MAAO,CACP,OAAQ,CACR,QAAS,CACT,YAAa,CACb,+DAAkE,CAClE,8CAAgD,CAChD,wCAAqC,CAArC,mCAAqC,CACrC,gCAAkC,CAClC,sBAAuB,CACvB,mBAAoB,CACpB,iBAAkB,CAClB,wBAAiB,CAAjB,gBACF,CAEA,4CACE,gFACF,CAEA,iCACE,qBAAsB,CACtB,YACF,CAEA,oDACE,eACF,CAEA,oDACE,SACF,CAEA,8CACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,mBAAoB,CACpB,mBAAoB,CACpB,UAAW,CACX,SAAU,CACV,yBACF,CAEA,4BACE,qBAAsB,CACtB,iBAAkB,CAClB,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,aAAc,CACd,sBAAuB,CACvB,kBAAmB,CACnB,wBAAyB,CACzB,cAAe,CACf,gBACF,CAEA,oCACE,6GAGC,CACD,kBAAmB,CACnB,gBAAiB,CACjB,oCACF,CAEA,8BACE,qBAAsB,CACtB,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,6BAA8B,CAC9B,0BAA2B,CAC3B,kCAAmC,CACnC,qBAAsB,CACtB,eAAgB,CAChB,YAAa,CACb,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,6BAA8B,CAC9B,oCAAwC,CACxC,4BACF,CAEA,sCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,QAAS,CACT,iFAAoF,CACpF,0BAA2B,CAC3B,yDAA2D,CAC3D,cAAe,CACf,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,4BAA6B,CAC7B,iBAAkB,CAClB,kBAAmB,CACnB,eAAgB,CAChB,sBAAuB,CACvB,+DAAuE,CACvE,mBACF,CAEA,oCACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,WACF,CAEA,oCACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,qBAAsB,CACtB,aACF,CAGA,qCACE,kBAAmB,CACnB,kBAAmB,CACnB,6BAA8B,CAC9B,iBAAkB,CAClB,QACF,CAEA,yCACE,MAAO,CACP,WAAY,CACZ,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,OACF,CAEA,0CACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,kBAAmB,CACnB,eAAgB,CAChB,sBACF,CAEA,2CACE,cAAe,CACf,WAAY,CACZ,kBAAmB,CACnB,eAAgB,CAChB,sBACF,CAEA,6CACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,aACF,CAEA,wCACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,gCAAoC,CACpC,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cAAe,CACf,2BAA4B,CAC5B,SACF,CAEA,+CACE,iCACF,CAEA,8CACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,cAAe,CACf,gCACF,CAGA,uCACE,kBAAmB,CACnB,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,OAAQ,CACR,gBACF,CAEA,2CACE,cAAe,CACf,YACF,CAEA,0CACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,qBACF,CAGA,wCACE,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,OACF,CAEA,6CACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,WACF,CAEA,2CACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,aAAc,CACd,mBACF,CAGA,sCACE,kBAAmB,CACnB,kBAAmB,CACnB,0BAA2B,CAC3B,QAAS,CACT,cAAe,CACf,cAAe,CACf,kBACF,CAEA,0CACE,cAAe,CACf,WAAY,CACZ,aACF,CAEA,0CACE,cAAe,CACf,YACF,CAGA,qCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,OAAQ,CACR,eACF,CAEA,wCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,OAAQ,CACR,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,gBAAiB,CACjB,qBACF,CAEA,qDACE,cAAe,CACf,WACF,CAEA,qDACE,cAAe,CACf,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,aACF,CAEA,wCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,SAAU,CACV,UAAW,CACX,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,uCAA2C,CAC3C,iBAAkB,CAClB,iCAAqC,CACrC,0BAA2B,CAC3B,kCAAmC,CACnC,2BAA+B,CAC/B,cAAe,CACf,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cAAe,CACf,SACF,CAEA,+CACE,WACF,CAGA,2CACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,OAAQ,CACR,WAAY,CACZ,0BAA8B,CAC9B,yBAA0B,CAC1B,iCAAkC,CAClC,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,iBACF,CAEA,mCACE,UAAW,CACX,eAAgB,CAChB,cAAe,CACf,kBAAmB,CACnB,8BAAkC,CAClC,uCAA2C,CAC3C,sCAA0C,CAC1C,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,eACF,CAEA,0CACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,6BAA8B,CAC9B,iBAAkB,CAClB,8CACF,CAEA,yCACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,4BACF,CAEA,yCACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,gCAAoC,CACpC,2BAA+B,CAC/B,cAAe,CACf,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cACF,CAEA,gDACE,WACF,CAEA,2CACE,iBACF,CAEA,iDACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,2BAA+B,CAC/B,iBACF,CAEA,2CACE,YAAa,CACb,OACF,CAEA,yCACE,MAAO,CACP,WAAY,CACZ,gBAAiB,CACjB,kBAAmB,CACnB,uCAA2C,CAC3C,iCAAqC,CACrC,4BAAgC,CAChC,cAAe,CACf,YACF,CAEA,+CACE,mCACF,CAEA,sDACE,4BACF,CAEA,2CACE,gBAAiB,CACjB,kBAAmB,CACnB,WAAY,CACZ,iCAAqC,CACrC,4BAAgC,CAChC,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,cAAe,CACf,aACF,CAEA,oDACE,WAAY,CACZ,kBACF,CAEA,kDACE,WACF,CAEA,2CACE,YAAa,CACb,6CAAgD,CAEhD,QAAS,CACT,YAAa,CACb,oBAAgB,CAAhB,eAAgB,CAChB,gBAAiB,CACjB,aAAc,CACd,WACF,CAEA,gDACE,aAAc,CACd,QAAS,CACT,qBAAsB,CACtB,cAAe,CACf,kBAAmB,CACnB,eAAgB,CAChB,sCAA0C,CAC1C,iCAAqC,CACrC,cAAe,CACf,SAAU,CACV,WAAY,CACZ,YACF,CAEA,uDACE,WACF,CAEA,oDACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,gBAAiB,CACjB,aACF,CAEA,yCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,2BAA+B,CAC/B,cAAe,CACf,iBACF,CAEA,2CACE,cAAe,CACf,WACF,CAGA,wCACE,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,0BAA2B,CAC3B,oBAAqB,CACrB,OAAQ,CACR,iBACF,CAEA,kDACE,cAAe,CACf,4BAA6B,CAC7B,WAAY,CACZ,oBACF,CAEA,kDACE,cAAe,CACf,4BAA6B,CAC7B,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,kBACF,CAEA,mDACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,OAAQ,CACR,SACF,CAEA,8CACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,6BACF,CAEA,6CACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,4BAA6B,CAC7B,YACF,CAEA,2CACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,WAAY,CACZ,iCAAqC,CACrC,yBAA0B,CAC1B,4BAA6B,CAC7B,cAAe,CACf,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cACF,CAEA,kDACE,oBACF,CAEA,4CACE,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,KACF,CAEA,4CACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,WAAY,CACZ,cAAe,CACf,aACF,CAEA,uEACE,2CACF,CAEA,8CACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,eAAgB,CAChB,iCAAqC,CACrC,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,4BAA6B,CAC7B,cAAe,CACf,aACF,CAEA,kDACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,gBACF,CAEA,4CACE,cAAe,CACf,4BAA6B,CAC7B,YAAa,CACb,eAAgB,CAChB,sBAAuB,CACvB,kBAAmB,CACnB,WACF,CAGA,8CACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,OAAQ,CACR,WAAY,CACZ,2BAA+B,CAC/B,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,YACF,CAEA,sCACE,8BAAkC,CAClC,0BAA2B,CAC3B,kBAAmB,CACnB,UAAW,CACX,eAAgB,CAChB,eAAgB,CAChB,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,eACF,CAEA,6CACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,6BAA8B,CAC9B,sBACF,CAEA,4CACE,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,UACF,CAEA,4CACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,WAAY,CACZ,iCAAqC,CACrC,2BAA+B,CAC/B,cAAe,CACf,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cACF,CAEA,mDACE,gCACF,CAEA,2CACE,eAAgB,CAChB,qBAAsB,CACtB,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,OACF,CAEA,2CACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,QAAS,CACT,gBAAiB,CACjB,kBAAmB,CACnB,WAAY,CACZ,sBAAuB,CACvB,UAAW,CACX,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,UACF,CAEA,kDACE,iCACF,CAEA,oDACE,gCACF,CAEA,kDACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,eAAgB,CAChB,gCAAoC,CACpC,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,2BACF,CAEA,sDACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,gBACF,CAEA,gDACE,MAAO,CACP,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,sBAAuB,CACvB,kBACF,CAEA,iDACE,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,aACF,CAEA,4CACE,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,iBAAkB,CAClB,2BAA+B,CAC/B,cACF,CAEA,8CACE,cAAe,CACf,WACF,CAEA,qCACE,gDACF,CAEA,oDACE,0CACF,CAEA,2CACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,OAAQ,CACR,QAAS,CACT,oCAAsC,CACtC,qCAAuC,CACvC,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,mCAAoC,CACpC,0BAA2B,CAC3B,kCAAmC,CACnC,kBAAmB,CACnB,oCAAwC,CACxC,8BAAgC,CAChC,yBACF,CAEA,6CACE,cAAe,CACf,4BAA6B,CAC7B,qCACF,CAEA,4BACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,QAAS,CACT,kFAAuF,CACvF,0BAA2B,CAC3B,UAAW,CACX,cAAe,CACf,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,4BAA6B,CAC7B,iBAAkB,CAClB,kBAAmB,CACnB,eAAgB,CAChB,sBAAuB,CACvB,+DACF,CAEA,6BACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,WAAY,CACZ,SAAU,CACV,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,YAAa,CACb,mCAAqC,CACrC,kBAAmB,CACnB,8BAA+B,CAC/B,0BAA2B,CAC3B,kCAAmC,CACnC,kBAAmB,CACnB,WAAY,CACZ,qCACF,CAEA,kCACE,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,kBAAmB,CACnB,yBAA0B,CAC1B,cACF,CAEA,wCACE,0BACF,CAEA,kDACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,yCAA0C,CAC1C,kBAAmB,CACnB,oCAAwC,CACxC,wBACF,CAEA,oDACE,cAAe,CACf,4BAA6B,CAC7B,qCACF,CAEA,uCACE,cAAe,CACf,4BAA6B,CAC7B,iBAAkB,CAClB,cAAe,CACf,qCACF,CAEA,oXAKE,gBACF',sourcesContent:['<template>\n  <div ref="homeScreenRef" class="app-home-screen" :class="homeScreenClass">\n    <div\n      ref="homePagesRef"\n      class="home-pages"\n      :class="{ swiping: isPageSwiping }"\n      @pointerdown="onHomePagesPointerDown"\n    >\n      <div class="home-pages-track" :style="pagesTrackStyle">\n        <section v-for="page in pageIndexes" :key="`home-page-${page}`" class="home-page">\n          <div v-if="page === 0" class="home-fixed-date-time" :style="appGridStyle">\n            <div class="home-fixed-date">{{ homeDisplayDate }}</div>\n            <div class="home-fixed-time">{{ store.phone.time }}</div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div\n            :ref="el => setPageGridRef(page, el)"\n            class="app-grid"\n            :class="{ dragging: isDragging, \'with-home-header\': page === 0 }"\n            :style="appGridStyle"\n          >\n            <div\n              v-for="item in placedItemsByPage[page]"\n              :key="item.id"\n              class="home-grid-item app-block"\n              :class="{\n                \'is-dragging-source\': draggingItemId === item.id,\n                \'app-block--widget\': item.kind === \'widget\',\n              }"\n              :style="getPlacedItemStyle(item)"\n              :data-item-id="item.id"\n              @pointerdown="onItemPointerDown(item.id, page, $event)"\n            >\n              <template v-if="item.kind === \'widget\' && item.widget">\n                \x3c!-- 闊充箰灏忕粍浠?--\x3e\n                <div v-if="item.widget === \'music\'" class="home-widget home-widget--music" @click.stop>\n                  <div class="home-widget-music-info">\n                    <div class="home-widget-music-title">{{ currentSong?.title || \'鏈挱鏀綷' }}</div>\n                    <div class="home-widget-music-artist">{{ currentSong?.artist || \'--\' }}</div>\n                  </div>\n                  <div class="home-widget-music-controls">\n                    <button class="home-widget-music-btn" @pointerdown.stop @click.stop="musicPrev">\n                      <i class="fas fa-step-backward"></i>\n                    </button>\n                    <button class="home-widget-music-btn home-widget-music-btn--play" @pointerdown.stop @click.stop="musicTogglePlay">\n                      <i class="fas" :class="store.music.isPlaying ? \'fa-pause\' : \'fa-play\'"></i>\n                    </button>\n                    <button class="home-widget-music-btn" @pointerdown.stop @click.stop="musicNext">\n                      <i class="fas fa-step-forward"></i>\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n                \x3c!-- 鐢垫睜灏忕粍浠?--\x3e\n                <div v-else-if="item.widget === \'battery\'" class="home-widget home-widget--battery">\n                  <i class="fas home-widget-battery-icon" :class="batteryIcon"></i>\n                  <div class="home-widget-battery-pct">{{ store.phone.battery }}%</div>\n                </div>\n                \x3c!-- 鏃ュ巻灏忕粍浠?--\x3e\n                <div v-else-if="item.widget === \'calendar\'" class="home-widget home-widget--calendar">\n                  <div class="home-widget-calendar-month">{{ calendarParts.month }}</div>\n                  <div class="home-widget-calendar-day">{{ calendarParts.day }}</div>\n                </div>\n                \x3c!-- 鍥剧墖灏忕粍浠?--\x3e\n                <div v-else-if="item.widget === \'photo\'" class="home-widget home-widget--photo" @click.stop>\n                  <template v-if="photoWidgetUrl">\n                    <img class="home-widget-photo-img" :src="photoWidgetUrl" alt="" draggable="false" />\n                  </template>\n                  <template v-else>\n                    <i class="fas fa-image home-widget-photo-placeholder-icon"></i>\n                    <div class="home-widget-photo-placeholder-text">鐐瑰嚮鍙充笅瑙掍笂浼犲浘鐗?/div>\n                  </template>\n                  <button class="home-widget-photo-btn" @pointerdown.stop @click.stop="openPhotoModal">\n                    <i class="fas fa-image"></i>\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n                \x3c!-- 鑱旂郴浜哄皬缁勪欢 --\x3e\n                <div v-else-if="item.widget === \'contacts\'" class="home-widget home-widget--contacts" @click.stop>\n                  <template v-if="contactSlotInfos.length > 0">\n                    <div class="home-widget-contacts-header">\n                      <span class="home-widget-contacts-title">鑱旂郴浜?/span>\n                      <button class="home-widget-contacts-add" @pointerdown.stop @click.stop="openContactsModal">\n                        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i>\n                      </button>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class="home-widget-contacts-list">\n                      <div v-for="(c, ci) in contactSlotInfos" :key="ci" class="home-widget-contacts-item" @click.stop="openContactChat(c.name)">\n                        <div class="home-widget-contacts-avatar">\n                          <img v-if="c.avatar" :src="c.avatar" alt="" draggable="false" />\n                          <i v-else class="fas fa-user"></i>\n                        </div>\n                        <div class="home-widget-contacts-name">{{ c.name }}</div>\n                      </div>\n                    </div>\n                  </template>\n                  <template v-else>\n                    <i class="fas fa-address-book home-widget-contacts-empty-icon"></i>\n                    <div class="home-widget-contacts-empty-text">鐐瑰嚮鍙充笂瑙掓坊鍔犺仈绯讳汉</div>\n                    <button class="home-widget-contacts-add home-widget-contacts-add--corner" @pointerdown.stop @click.stop="openContactsModal">\n                      <i class="fas fa-plus"></i>\n                    </button>\n                  </template>\n                </div>\n                \x3c!-- 鎼滅储灏忕粍浠?--\x3e\n                <div v-else-if="item.widget === \'search\'" class="home-widget home-widget--search" @click.stop="openApp(\'browser\')">\n                  <i class="fas fa-search home-widget-search-icon"></i>\n                  <span class="home-widget-search-text">鎼滅储</span>\n                </div>\n                \x3c!-- 榛樿 label+value 灏忕粍浠?--\x3e\n                <div v-else class="home-widget" :class="`home-widget--${item.widget}`">\n                  <div class="home-widget-label">{{ homeWidgetTexts[item.widget]?.label }}</div>\n                  <div class="home-widget-value">{{ homeWidgetTexts[item.widget]?.value }}</div>\n                </div>\n                <span class="home-widget-caption">{{ item.label }}</span>\n              </template>\n              <template v-else>\n                <div class="home-app-icon">\n                  <i :class="item.iconClass"></i>\n                </div>\n                <span class="app-label">{{ item.label }}</span>\n              </template>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </section>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div\n      v-if="dragOverlay && dragOverlayItem"\n      class="app-block app-block--overlay home-drag-overlay"\n      :class="{ \'app-block--widget\': dragOverlayItem.kind === \'widget\' }"\n      :style="dragOverlayStyle"\n    >\n      <template v-if="dragOverlayItem.kind === \'widget\' && dragOverlayItem.widget">\n        <div v-if="dragOverlayItem.widget === \'music\'" class="home-widget home-widget--music">\n          <div class="home-widget-music-info">\n            <div class="home-widget-music-title">{{ currentSong?.title || \'鏈挱鏀綷' }}</div>\n            <div class="home-widget-music-artist">{{ currentSong?.artist || \'--\' }}</div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="home-widget-music-controls">\n            <span class="home-widget-music-btn"><i class="fas fa-step-backward"></i></span>\n            <span class="home-widget-music-btn home-widget-music-btn--play"><i class="fas" :class="store.music.isPlaying ? \'fa-pause\' : \'fa-play\'"></i></span>\n            <span class="home-widget-music-btn"><i class="fas fa-step-forward"></i></span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="dragOverlayItem.widget === \'battery\'" class="home-widget home-widget--battery">\n          <i class="fas home-widget-battery-icon" :class="batteryIcon"></i>\n          <div class="home-widget-battery-pct">{{ store.phone.battery }}%</div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="dragOverlayItem.widget === \'calendar\'" class="home-widget home-widget--calendar">\n          <div class="home-widget-calendar-month">{{ calendarParts.month }}</div>\n          <div class="home-widget-calendar-day">{{ calendarParts.day }}</div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="dragOverlayItem.widget === \'photo\'" class="home-widget home-widget--photo">\n          <template v-if="photoWidgetUrl">\n            <img class="home-widget-photo-img" :src="photoWidgetUrl" alt="" draggable="false" />\n          </template>\n          <template v-else>\n            <i class="fas fa-image home-widget-photo-placeholder-icon"></i>\n            <div class="home-widget-photo-placeholder-text">鐐瑰嚮鍙充笅瑙掍笂浼犲浘鐗?/div>\n          </template>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="dragOverlayItem.widget === \'contacts\'" class="home-widget home-widget--contacts">\n          <div class="home-widget-contacts-header">\n            <span class="home-widget-contacts-title">鑱旂郴浜?/span>\n            <span class="home-widget-contacts-add"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></span>\n          </div>\n          <div class="home-widget-contacts-list">\n            <div v-for="(c, ci) in contactSlotInfos" :key="ci" class="home-widget-contacts-item">\n              <div class="home-widget-contacts-avatar">\n                <img v-if="c.avatar" :src="c.avatar" alt="" draggable="false" />\n                <i v-else class="fas fa-user"></i>\n              </div>\n              <div class="home-widget-contacts-name">{{ c.name }}</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="dragOverlayItem.widget === \'search\'" class="home-widget home-widget--search">\n          <i class="fas fa-search home-widget-search-icon"></i>\n          <span class="home-widget-search-text">鎼滅储</span>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else class="home-widget" :class="`home-widget--${dragOverlayItem.widget}`">\n          <div class="home-widget-label">{{ homeWidgetTexts[dragOverlayItem.widget]?.label }}</div>\n          <div class="home-widget-value">{{ homeWidgetTexts[dragOverlayItem.widget]?.value }}</div>\n        </div>\n        <span class="home-widget-caption">{{ dragOverlayItem.label }}</span>\n      </template>\n      <template v-else>\n        <div class="home-app-icon">\n          <i :class="dragOverlayItem.iconClass"></i>\n        </div>\n        <span class="app-label">{{ dragOverlayItem.label }}</span>\n      </template>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鍥剧墖灏忕粍浠跺脊绐?--\x3e\n    <Transition name="fade">\n      <div v-if="showPhotoModal" class="home-photo-modal-overlay" @click="closePhotoModal">\n        <div class="home-photo-modal" @click.stop>\n          <div class="home-photo-modal-header">\n            <span class="home-photo-modal-title">閫夋嫨鍥剧墖</span>\n            <button class="home-photo-modal-close" @click="closePhotoModal">\n              <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <div class="home-photo-modal-section">\n            <div class="home-photo-modal-section-title">杈撳叆閾炬帴</div>\n            <div class="home-photo-modal-url-row">\n              <input\n                v-model="photoUrlInput"\n                class="home-photo-modal-input"\n                type="text"\n                placeholder="https://..."\n                @keydown.enter="confirmPhotoUrl"\n              />\n              <button class="home-photo-modal-confirm" :disabled="!photoUrlInput.trim()" @click="confirmPhotoUrl">\n                纭畾\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-if="photoGalleryItems.length > 0" class="home-photo-modal-section">\n            <div class="home-photo-modal-section-title">浠庣浉鍐屼腑閫夋嫨</div>\n            <div class="home-photo-modal-gallery">\n              <button\n                v-for="(item, idx) in photoGalleryItems"\n                :key="`photo-gallery-${idx}`"\n                class="home-photo-modal-gallery-item"\n                @click="selectPhotoFromGallery(item.url)"\n              >\n                <img :src="item.url" alt="" draggable="false" />\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-else class="home-photo-modal-empty">\n            <i class="fas fa-images"></i>\n            <span>鐩稿唽鏆傛棤鐓х墖锛岃鍏堝湪鐩告満涓敓鎴愬苟淇濆瓨</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鑱旂郴浜哄皬缁勪欢寮圭獥 --\x3e\n    <Transition name="fade">\n      <div v-if="showContactsModal" class="home-contacts-modal-overlay" @click="closeContactsModal">\n        <div class="home-contacts-modal" @click.stop>\n          <div class="home-contacts-modal-header">\n            <span class="home-contacts-modal-title">閫夋嫨鑱旂郴浜猴紙鏈€澶?涓級</span>\n            <button class="home-contacts-modal-close" @click="closeContactsModal">\n              <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <div v-if="allCharacters.length > 0" class="home-contacts-modal-list">\n            <button\n              v-for="(ch, ci) in allCharacters"\n              :key="`contact-pick-${ci}`"\n              class="home-contacts-modal-item"\n              :class="{ selected: isContactSelected(ch.name) }"\n              @click="toggleContactSlot(ch.name)"\n            >\n              <div class="home-contacts-modal-item-avatar">\n                <img v-if="ch.avatar" :src="ch.avatar" alt="" draggable="false" />\n                <i v-else class="fas fa-user"></i>\n              </div>\n              <div class="home-contacts-modal-item-name">{{ ch.name }}</div>\n              <i v-if="isContactSelected(ch.name)" class="fas fa-check home-contacts-modal-item-check"></i>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <div v-else class="home-contacts-modal-empty">\n            <i class="fas fa-user-slash"></i>\n            <span>鏆傛棤瑙掕壊鏁版嵁</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    <div class="home-page-indicator" aria-label="涓婚〉鍒嗛〉">\n      <button\n        v-for="page in pageIndexes"\n        :key="page"\n        class="home-page-dot"\n        :class="{ active: currentPage === page }"\n        :aria-label="`绗?${page + 1} 椤礰"\n        :aria-current="currentPage === page ? \'page\' : undefined"\n        @click="goToHomePage(page)"\n      ></button>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class="bottom-bar">\n      <div class="app" @click="openApp(\'phone\')">\n        <div class="icon-container">\n          <i class="fas fa-phone-alt"></i>\n        </div>\n        <span>鐢佃瘽</span>\n      </div>\n      <div class="app" @click="openApp(\'email\')">\n        <div class="icon-container">\n          <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>\n        </div>\n        <span>閭</span>\n      </div>\n      <div class="app" @click="openApp(\'browser\')">\n        <div class="icon-container">\n          <i class="fas fa-compass"></i>\n        </div>\n        <span>娴忚鍣?/span>\n      </div>\n      <div class="app" @click="openApp(\'settings\')">\n        <div class="icon-container">\n          <i class="fas fa-cog"></i>\n        </div>\n        <span>璁剧疆</span>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</template>\n\n<script setup lang="ts">\nimport { computed, ref } from \'vue\';\nimport { store } from \'../../store\';\nimport { musicTogglePlay, musicPrev, musicNext } from \'../../store\';\nimport { useHomeCss } from \'../Settings/composables/useHomeCss\';\nimport { useHomeGrid } from \'./composables/useHomeGrid\';\nimport {\n  HOME_ITEM_META,\n  HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET,\n  type HomeGridItemId,\n  type HomeWidgetId,\n  type HomeWidgetItemId,\n} from \'./types\';\n\nconst { isActive: homeCssActive, homeCssSettings, updateSetting: updateHomeSetting } = useHomeCss();\n\nconst enabledWidgetItemIds = computed<HomeWidgetItemId[]>(() => {\n  const widgets = homeCssSettings.value.widgets;\n  const enabled: HomeWidgetItemId[] = [];\n  if (widgets.time !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.time);\n  if (widgets.weather !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.weather);\n  if (widgets.music !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.music);\n  if (widgets.battery !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.battery);\n  if (widgets.calendar !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.calendar);\n  if (widgets.photo !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.photo);\n  if (widgets.contacts !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.contacts);\n  if (widgets.search !== false) enabled.push(HOME_WIDGET_ITEM_ID_BY_WIDGET.search);\n  return enabled;\n});\n\nconst {\n  homePagesRef,\n  homeScreenRef,\n  pageIndexes,\n  currentPage,\n  placedItemsByPage,\n  getPlacedItemStyle,\n  pagesTrackStyle,\n  appGridStyle,\n  isPageSwiping,\n  isDragging,\n  draggingItemId,\n  dragOverlay,\n  dragOverlayItem,\n  dragOverlayStyle,\n  goToHomePage,\n  onHomePagesPointerDown,\n  onItemPointerDown,\n  setPageGridRef,\n} = useHomeGrid({\n  enabledWidgetItemIds,\n  onActivateItem: activateItem,\n});\n\nconst homeScreenClass = computed(() => ({\n  \'home-custom-css-enabled\': homeCssActive.value,\n  \'home-layout-dragging\': isDragging.value,\n  \'home-light-style\': !!homeCssSettings.value.useLightStyle,\n}));\n\nconst homeDisplayDate = computed(() => {\n  const raw = String(store.phone.date || \'\').trim();\n  if (!raw) return \'\';\n\n  const ymdCn = raw.match(/(\\d{4})骞?\\d{1,2})鏈?\\d{1,2})鏃?);\n  if (ymdCn) {\n    const y = ymdCn[1];\n    const m = ymdCn[2].padStart(2, \'0\');\n    const d = ymdCn[3].padStart(2, \'0\');\n    return `${y}骞?{m}鏈?{d}鏃;\n  }\n\n  const ymd = raw.match(/(\\d{4})[-/.](\\d{1,2})[-/.](\\d{1,2})/);\n  if (ymd) {\n    const y = ymd[1];\n    const m = ymd[2].padStart(2, \'0\');\n    const d = ymd[3].padStart(2, \'0\');\n    return `${y}骞?{m}鏈?{d}鏃;\n  }\n\n  return raw;\n});\n\nconst homeWidgetTexts = computed<Record<HomeWidgetId, { label: string; value: string }>>(() => ({\n  time: {\n    label: homeDisplayDate.value || String(store.phone.date || \'\').trim() || \'鏃ユ湡\',\n    value: String(store.phone.time || \'--:--\'),\n  },\n  weather: {\n    label: String(store.phone.weather?.condition || \'澶╂皵\'),\n    value: String(store.phone.weather?.temp || \'--\'),\n  },\n  music: { label: \'\', value: \'\' },\n  battery: { label: \'\', value: \'\' },\n  calendar: { label: \'\', value: \'\' },\n  photo: { label: \'\', value: \'\' },\n  contacts: { label: \'\', value: \'\' },\n  search: { label: \'\', value: \'\' },\n}));\n\nconst currentSong = computed(() => {\n  const songs = store.music.songs;\n  const idx = store.music.currentIndex;\n  return songs.length > 0 && idx >= 0 && idx < songs.length ? songs[idx] : null;\n});\n\nconst batteryIcon = computed(() => {\n  const b = store.phone.battery;\n  if (b >= 80) return \'fa-battery-full\';\n  if (b >= 60) return \'fa-battery-three-quarters\';\n  if (b >= 40) return \'fa-battery-half\';\n  if (b >= 20) return \'fa-battery-quarter\';\n  return \'fa-battery-empty\';\n});\n\nconst calendarParts = computed(() => {\n  const raw = String(store.phone.date || \'\').trim();\n  const cnMatch = raw.match(/(\\d{1,2})鏈?\\d{1,2})/);\n  if (cnMatch) return { month: `${cnMatch[1]}鏈坄, day: cnMatch[2] };\n  const slashMatch = raw.match(/(\\d{1,2})[-/.](\\d{1,2})/);\n  if (slashMatch) return { month: `${slashMatch[1]}鏈坄, day: slashMatch[2] };\n  return { month: \'\', day: \'\' };\n});\n\nconst photoWidgetUrl = computed(() => String(homeCssSettings.value.photoUrl || \'\').trim());\nconst showPhotoModal = ref(false);\nconst photoUrlInput = ref(\'\');\nconst photoGalleryItems = ref<Array<{ url: string; content: string }>>([]);\n\nfunction openPhotoModal(): void {\n  photoUrlInput.value = \'\';\n  try {\n    const chatVars = getVariables({ type: \'chat\' }) || {};\n    const raw = (chatVars as Record<string, unknown>)[\'phone_camera_gallery\'];\n    if (Array.isArray(raw)) {\n      photoGalleryItems.value = raw\n        .filter((item: any) => item && typeof item === \'object\' && String(item.url || \'\').trim())\n        .map((item: any) => ({ url: String(item.url).trim(), content: String(item.content || \'\').trim() }));\n    } else {\n      photoGalleryItems.value = [];\n    }\n  } catch {\n    photoGalleryItems.value = [];\n  }\n  showPhotoModal.value = true;\n}\n\nfunction closePhotoModal(): void {\n  showPhotoModal.value = false;\n}\n\nfunction confirmPhotoUrl(): void {\n  const url = photoUrlInput.value.trim();\n  if (!url) return;\n  updateHomeSetting(\'photoUrl\', url);\n  showPhotoModal.value = false;\n}\n\nfunction selectPhotoFromGallery(url: string): void {\n  updateHomeSetting(\'photoUrl\', url);\n  showPhotoModal.value = false;\n}\n\n// 鈹€鈹€ 鑱旂郴浜哄皬缁勪欢 鈹€鈹€\ninterface ContactSlotInfo { name: string; avatar: string }\nconst showContactsModal = ref(false);\nconst allCharacters = ref<ContactSlotInfo[]>([]);\n\nconst contactSlotInfos = computed<ContactSlotInfo[]>(() => {\n  const slots = homeCssSettings.value.contactSlots || [];\n  if (slots.length === 0) return [];\n  const chars = allCharacters.value.length > 0 ? allCharacters.value : loadAllCharacters();\n  return slots.map(name => chars.find(c => c.name === name) || { name, avatar: \'\' }).slice(0, 3);\n});\n\nfunction loadAllCharacters(): ContactSlotInfo[] {\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' }) || {};\n    const phoneData = (charVars as Record<string, unknown>)[\'phone_data\'] as any;\n    const characters = phoneData?.characters;\n    if (Array.isArray(characters)) {\n      return characters\n        .filter((c: any) => c && typeof c === \'object\' && c.name)\n        .map((c: any) => ({ name: String(c.name), avatar: String(c.avatar || \'\') }));\n    }\n  } catch { /* ignore */ }\n  return [];\n}\n\nfunction openContactsModal(): void {\n  allCharacters.value = loadAllCharacters();\n  showContactsModal.value = true;\n}\n\nfunction closeContactsModal(): void {\n  showContactsModal.value = false;\n}\n\nfunction toggleContactSlot(name: string): void {\n  const current = [...(homeCssSettings.value.contactSlots || [])];\n  const idx = current.indexOf(name);\n  if (idx >= 0) {\n    current.splice(idx, 1);\n  } else {\n    if (current.length >= 3) return; // 鏈€澶?涓猏n    current.push(name);\n  }\n  updateHomeSetting(\'contactSlots\', current);\n}\n\nfunction isContactSelected(name: string): boolean {\n  return (homeCssSettings.value.contactSlots || []).includes(name);\n}\n\nfunction openContactChat(name: string): void {\n  const chatItem = store.chat.chatList.find(c => c.name === name && c.type === \'single\');\n  if (chatItem) {\n    store.chat.activeConversationId = chatItem.id;\n  }\n  store.activeApp = \'chat\' as any;\n}\n\nconst openApp = (app: string) => {\n  store.activeApp = app as any;\n};\n\nfunction activateItem(itemId: HomeGridItemId): void {\n  const meta = HOME_ITEM_META[itemId];\n  if (meta?.kind === \'widget\') {\n    if (meta.widget === \'time\') store.phone.timeJumpModalOpen = true;\n    if (meta.widget === \'music\') openApp(\'music\');\n    if (meta.widget === \'calendar\') openApp(\'calendar\');\n    if (meta.widget === \'search\') openApp(\'browser\');\n    return;\n  }\n  openApp(itemId);\n}\n<\/script>\n\n<style scoped>\n.app-home-screen {\n  --home-time-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n  --home-text-color: #fff;\n  --home-icon-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);\n  --home-app-bg: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n  --home-dock-bg: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n  --home-dock-icon-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);\n  --home-page-indicator-bg: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);\n  height: 100%;\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.app-home-screen.home-light-style {\n  --home-time-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.76);\n  --home-text-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.76);\n  --home-icon-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.88);\n  --home-app-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38);\n  --home-dock-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.34);\n  --home-dock-icon-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.48);\n  --home-page-indicator-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.36);\n}\n\n.home-pages {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 24px;\n  left: 16px;\n  right: 16px;\n  bottom: 128px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  touch-action: pan-y;\n}\n\n.home-pages.swiping {\n  cursor: grabbing;\n}\n\n.home-pages-track {\n  display: flex;\n  height: 100%;\n  will-change: transform;\n}\n\n.home-page {\n  flex: 0 0 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.home-page-indicator {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 50%;\n  bottom: 122px;\n  transform: translateX(-50%);\n  z-index: 4;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  padding: 4px 8px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: var(--home-page-indicator-bg);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);\n}\n\n.home-page-dot {\n  width: 6px;\n  height: 6px;\n  border: 0;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  padding: 0;\n  margin: 0;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.45);\n  transition: width 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;\n}\n\n.home-page-dot:hover {\n  transform: scale(1.05);\n}\n\n.home-page-dot.active {\n  width: 16px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);\n}\n\n.home-fixed-date-time {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 0;\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  height: calc((var(--home-grid-cell-size, 72px) * 2) + var(--home-grid-gap, 4px));\n  z-index: 2;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  justify-content: center;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 18px;\n  padding: 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  text-align: center;\n  font-family:\n    \'Inter\',\n    -apple-system,\n    BlinkMacSystemFont,\n    "SF Pro Text",\n    "SF Pro Display",\n    \'Segoe UI\',\n    Roboto,\n    Helvetica,\n    Arial,\n    \'PingFang SC\',\n    \'Hiragino Sans GB\',\n    \'Microsoft YaHei\',\n    sans-serif !important;\n  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;\n}\n\n.home-fixed-date {\n  font-size: 18px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n  opacity: 0.9;\n  transform: translateY(4px);\n}\n\n.home-fixed-time {\n  font-size: 84px;\n  line-height: 1;\n  font-weight: 800;\n  letter-spacing: -0.04em;\n}\n\n.home-fixed-date,\n.home-fixed-time {\n  color: var(--home-time-color);\n  text-shadow: none !important;\n  -webkit-text-stroke: 0 !important;\n}\n\n.app-grid {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 0;\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, var(--home-grid-cell-size, 72px));\n  grid-auto-rows: var(--home-grid-cell-size, 72px);\n  column-gap: var(--home-grid-gap, 4px);\n  row-gap: var(--home-grid-gap, 4px);\n  justify-content: center;\n  align-content: start;\n  touch-action: none;\n  user-select: none;\n}\n\n.app-grid.with-home-header {\n  top: calc((var(--home-grid-cell-size, 72px) * 2) + (var(--home-grid-gap, 4px) * 2));\n}\n\n.home-grid-item {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  min-height: 0;\n}\n\n.app-grid.dragging .home-grid-item {\n  cursor: grabbing;\n}\n\n.home-grid-item.is-dragging-source {\n  opacity: 0;\n}\n\n.app-block.home-drag-overlay {\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: 0 auto auto 0;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  z-index: 60;\n  opacity: 1;\n  transform-origin: top left;\n}\n\n.app-block {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  position: relative;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  display: block;\n  background: transparent;\n  border-radius: 16px;\n  transition: opacity 0.15s;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  overflow: visible;\n}\n\n.app-block--widget {\n  --home-widget-outer-pad: max(\n    0px,\n    calc((var(--home-grid-cell-size, 72px) - var(--home-app-icon-size, 50px)) / 2)\n  );\n  border-radius: 22px;\n  overflow: visible;\n  padding: var(--home-widget-outer-pad);\n}\n\n.home-widget {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  background: var(--home-app-bg);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n  border-radius: inherit;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  padding: 14px;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n  color: var(--home-text-color);\n}\n\n.home-widget-caption {\n  position: absolute;\n  left: 50%;\n  top: calc(100% - var(--home-widget-outer-pad, 0px) + var(--home-app-label-gap, 2px));\n  transform: translateX(-50%);\n  width: calc(100% - (var(--home-widget-outer-pad, 0px) * 2));\n  max-width: 100%;\n  padding: 0 4px;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  line-height: 1.2;\n  color: var(--home-text-color);\n  text-align: center;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  text-overflow: ellipsis;\n  text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), 0 2px
