B,OAAQ,CACR,gCAAoC,CACpC,kBAAmB,CACnB,wBACF,CAEA,mCACE,MAAO,CACP,sBAAuB,CACvB,iCAAkC,CAClC,qBAAsB,CACtB,cAAe,CACf,uBACF,CAEA,gDACE,sCACF,CAEA,2BACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,kDAAqD,CACrD,UAAW,CACX,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cAAe,CACf,cACF,CAEA,iCACE,YAAa,CACb,OAAQ,CACR,aACF,CAEA,6BACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,gCAAoC,CACpC,UAAW,CACX,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cAAe,CACf,cACF,CAEA,oCACE,aACF,CAEA,2BACE,kDACF,CAGA,6BACE,cAAe,CACf,KAAM,CACN,MAAO,CACP,OAAQ,CACR,QAAS,CACT,0BAA8B,CAC9B,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,YACF,CAEA,+BACE,SAAU,CACV,eAAgB,CAChB,0DAA6D,CAC7D,kBAAmB,CACnB,YAAa,CACb,eAAgB,CAChB,eACF,CAEA,8BACE,YAAa,CACb,6BAA8B,CAC9B,kBAAmB,CACnB,kBAAmB,CACnB,cAAe,CACf,eACF,CAEA,4BACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,WAAY,CACZ,gCAAoC,CACpC,UAAW,CACX,iBAAkB,CAClB,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,cACF,CAGA,mCACE,kBAAmB,CACnB,gBAAiB,CACjB,iCAAqC,CACrC,iBACF,CAEA,+BACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,cAAe,CACf,cAAe,CACf,aACF,CAEA,sDACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,oBACF,CAEA,8BACE,wBAAiB,CAAjB,gBACF,CAEA,4BACE,YAAa,CACb,mCAAqC,CACrC,OACF,CAEA,4BACE,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,kBAAmB,CACnB,eAAgB,CAChB,iCAAqC,CACrC,kBAAmB,CACnB,cAAe,CACf,yBACF,CAEA,mCACE,qBACF,CAEA,4BACE,cAAe,CACf,iBACF,CAEA,4BACE,cAAe,CACf,iBACF,CAEA,6BACE,aAAc,CACd,aACF,CAGA,gCACE,kDACF,CAGA,kCACE,cAAe,CACf,KAAM,CACN,MAAO,CACP,OAAQ,CACR,QAAS,CACT,0BAA8B,CAC9B,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,YACF,CAEA,oCACE,SAAU,CACV,eAAgB,CAChB,0DAA6D,CAC7D,kBAAmB,CACnB,YAAa,CACb,eAAgB,CAChB,eACF,CAEA,mCACE,YAAa,CACb,6BAA8B,CAC9B,kBAAmB,CACnB,kBAAmB,CACnB,cAAe,CACf,eACF,CAEA,iCACE,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,QACF,CAEA,+EAEE,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,2BAA+B,CAC/B,iBACF,CAEA,iCACE,YAAa,CACb,OACF,CAEA,6BACE,MAAO,CACP,YAAa,CACb,sCAA0C,CAC1C,iBAAkB,CAClB,sBAAuB,CACvB,UAAW,CACX,cAAe,CACf,cAAe,CACf,mBACF,CAEA,oCACE,kDAAqD,CACrD,wBAAyB,CACzB,UAAW,CACX,eACF,CAEA,kCACE,iBACF,CAEA,2CACE,UAAW,CACX,WAAY,CACZ,YAAa,CACb,iDAAqD,CACrD,iBAAkB,CAClB,4CAAgD,CAChD,qBAAsB,CACtB,cAAe,CACf,WAAY,CACZ,uBAAwB,CACxB,qBACF,CAEA,wDACE,sCACF,CAEA,6BACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,UAAW,CACX,UAAW,CACX,cAAe,CACf,2BACF,CAEA,qCACE,UAAW,CACX,YAAa,CACb,WAAY,CACZ,kBAAmB,CACnB,kDAAqD,CACrD,UAAW,CACX,cAAe,CACf,eAAgB,CAChB,cAAe,CACf,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,OACF,CAEA,4CACE,qBACF,CAGA,kCACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,KAAM,CACN,MAAO,CACP,OAAQ,CACR,QAAS,CACT,8BAAkC,CAClC,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBAAuB,CACvB,WAAY,CACZ,yBACF,CAEA,kCACE,YAAa,CACb,qBAAsB,CACtB,kBAAmB,CACnB,QAAS,CACT,aAAc,CACd,cACF,CAEA,oCACE,cACF,CAGA,4BACE,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,eAAgB,CAChB,iBAAkB,CAClB,WAAY,CACZ,kDAAqD,CACrD,kBAAmB,CACnB,UAAW,CACX,cAAe,CACf,cAAe,CACf,mBACF,CAEA,mCACE,qBAAsB,CACtB,kDACF,CAEA,8BACE,cAAe,CACf,UACF,CAEA,iCACE,UACF,CAGA,8BACE,iBAAkB,CAClB,QAAS,CACT,SAAU,CACV,UAAW,CACX,kBAAmB,CACnB,WAAY,CACZ,iBAAkB,CAClB,iBAAkB,CAClB,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,WAAY,CACZ,cACF,CAGA,wEAEE,4BACF,CAEA,kEAEE,SACF,CAEA,oFAEE,wBACF,CAEA,8EAEE,SAAU,CACV,2BACF',sourcesContent:['<template>\n  <div class="live-room-container">\n    \x3c!-- 鍔犺浇鐘舵€侀伄缃?--\x3e\n    <Transition name="fade">\n      <div v-if="isLoading" class="loading-overlay">\n        <div class="loading-spinner">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>\n          <span>姝ｅ湪鍔犺浇鐩存挱鍐呭...</span>\n          <button class="abort-btn" @click="handleAbort">\n            <i class="fas fa-stop"></i>\n            <span>缁堟鐢熸垚</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 閿欒鎻愮ず --\x3e\n    <Transition name="slide-down">\n      <div v-if="loadError" class="error-toast" @click="loadError = null">\n        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>\n        <span>{{ loadError }}</span>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 椤堕儴瀵艰埅鏍?--\x3e\n    <div class="top-bar">\n      <button class="back-btn" @click="$emit(\'back\')">\n        <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i>\n      </button>\n      <div class="streamer-info">\n        <img :src="getStreamerAvatar(liveData.streamer)" class="streamer-avatar" alt="avatar" />\n        <div class="streamer-detail">\n          <span class="streamer-name">{{ liveData.streamer }}</span>\n          <span class="follower-count">{{ formatNumber(liveData.followers) }} 绮変笣</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <button class="follow-btn" :class="{ following: isFollowing }" @click="toggleFollow">\n        {{ isFollowing ? \'宸插叧娉╘' : \'+ 鍏虫敞\' }}\n      </button>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鐩存挱瑙嗛鍖哄煙 --\x3e\n    <div class="video-area" style="position: relative; width: 100%; min-height: 200px; background: #000">\n      <img\n        :src="getLiveImage(liveData.image)"\n        alt="鐩存挱鐢婚潰"\n        style="width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block"\n        @error="handleImageError"\n        @load="handleImageLoad"\n      />\n      <button\n        v-if="liveData.prompt"\n        class="live-image-generate-btn"\n        :disabled="isGeneratingLiveImage"\n        title="閲嶆柊鐢熸垚鐢婚潰"\n        @click.stop="handleGenerateLiveImage"\n      >\n        <i v-if="!isGeneratingLiveImage" class="fas fa-redo"></i>\n        <i v-else class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>\n      </button>\n      <div class="live-indicator">\n        <i class="fas fa-circle"></i>\n        鐩存挱涓璡n      </div>\n      <div class="viewer-badge">\n        <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>\n        {{ formatNumber(liveData.viewers) }}\n      </div>\n\n      \x3c!-- 寮瑰箷鍖哄煙 - 鍦ㄥ浘鐗囦笂婊戣繃 --\x3e\n      <div\n        class="barrage-overlay"\n        style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; overflow: hidden; pointer-events: none"\n      >\n        \x3c!-- 鏅€氬脊骞?- 浣跨敤杞ㄩ亾 0, 2, 4, 6 --\x3e\n        <div\n          v-for="(item, index) in visibleBarrage"\n          :key="\'normal-\' + index"\n          class="barrage-item"\n          :style="{\n            position: \'absolute\',\n            top: `${index * 2 * 32 + 12}px`,\n            left: \'100%\',\n            whiteSpace: \'nowrap\',\n            padding: \'3px 10px\',\n            borderRadius: \'15px\',\n            backgroundColor: \'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)\',\n            fontSize: \'13px\',\n            color: \'#fff\',\n            animation: `barrageScroll ${8 + index * 2}s linear infinite`,\n            animationDelay: `${index * 2.5}s`,\n          }"\n        >\n          <span style="color: #7dd3fc; margin-right: 6px">{{ item.name }}</span>\n          <span>{{ item.c }}</span>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 閱掔洰鐣欒█寮瑰箷 - 浣跨敤杞ㄩ亾 1, 3 --\x3e\n        <div\n          v-for="(sc, index) in liveData.superchat"\n          :key="\'sc-\' + index"\n          :style="{\n            position: \'absolute\',\n            top: `${(index * 2 + 1) * 32 + 12}px`,\n            left: \'100%\',\n            whiteSpace: \'nowrap\',\n            padding: \'3px 10px\',\n            borderRadius: \'15px\',\n            background:\n              sc.amount >= 100\n                ? \'linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #fbbf24)\'\n                : sc.amount >= 50\n                  ? \'linear-gradient(135deg, #ec4899, #f472b6)\'\n                  : \'linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa)\',\n            fontSize: \'13px\',\n            color: \'#fff\',\n            animation: `barrageScroll ${10 + index * 2}s linear infinite`,\n            animationDelay: `${index * 4 + 1}s`,\n          }"\n        >\n          <span style="margin-right: 6px">{{ sc.name }}</span>\n          <span\n            style="\n              background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);\n              padding: 1px 6px;\n              border-radius: 10px;\n              font-size: 11px;\n              margin-right: 6px;\n            "\n            >楼{{ sc.amount }}</span\n          >\n          <span>{{ sc.c }}</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鐩存挱闂翠俊鎭?--\x3e\n    <div class="room-info">\n      <div class="room-title">{{ liveData.roomTitle }}</div>\n      <div class="room-desc">{{ liveData.roomDesc }}</div>\n      <div class="room-stats">\n        <span class="stat"><i class="fas fa-eye"></i> {{ formatNumber(liveData.viewers) }} 瑙傜湅</span>\n        <span class="stat"><i class="fas fa-heart"></i> {{ formatNumber(liveData.likes) }} 鍠滄</span>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鐩存挱鍐呭鍖哄煙 --\x3e\n    <div class="live-content-section" @click="nextContent">\n      <div class="section-title">\n        <i class="fas fa-video"></i>\n        鐩存挱鍐呭\n        <span class="content-indicator">{{ currentContentIndex + 1 }}/{{ liveData.contents.length }}</span>\n      </div>\n      <div class="live-content-box">\n        <div class="content-dialogue">銆寋{ currentContent.dialogue }}銆?/div>\n        <div class="content-state">{{ currentContent.state }}</div>\n      </div>\n      <div class="content-hint">鐐瑰嚮鍒囨崲涓嬩竴鏉?/div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鎯虫硶鍖哄煙 --\x3e\n    <div class="thought-section" @click="toggleThoughtBlur">\n      <div class="section-title">\n        <i class="fas fa-heart"></i>\n        鍐呭績鎯虫硶\n        <span class="thought-hint">{{ isThoughtBlurred ? \'鐐瑰嚮鏌ョ湅\' : \'鐐瑰嚮闅愯棌\' }}</span>\n      </div>\n      <div class="thought-box" :class="{ blurred: isThoughtBlurred }">\n        <i class="fas fa-quote-left"></i>\n        {{ liveData.thought }}\n        <i class="fas fa-quote-right"></i>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 閱掔洰鐣欒█ --\x3e\n    <div v-if="liveData.superchat.length > 0" class="superchat-section">\n      <div class="section-title">\n        <i class="fas fa-gift"></i>\n        閱掔洰鐣欒█\n      </div>\n      <div class="superchat-list">\n        <div v-for="(sc, index) in liveData.superchat" :key="index" class="superchat-item">\n          <img :src="getStreamerAvatar(sc.name)" class="sc-avatar" alt="avatar" />\n          <div class="sc-content">\n            <div class="sc-header">\n              <span class="sc-name">{{ sc.name }}</span>\n              <span class="sc-amount">楼{{ sc.amount }}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class="sc-text">{{ sc.c }}</div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 璐＄尞姒?--\x3e\n    <div class="ranking-section">\n      <div class="section-title">\n        <i class="fas fa-trophy"></i>\n        璐＄尞姒淺n      </div>\n      <div class="ranking-list">\n        <div v-for="(user, index) in liveData.ranking" :key="index" class="ranking-item">\n          <span class="rank-number" :class="{ top: index < 3 }">{{ index + 1 }}</span>\n          <img :src="getStreamerAvatar(user.name)" class="rank-avatar" alt="avatar" />\n          <span class="rank-name">{{ user.name }}</span>\n          <span class="rank-score">{{ formatNumber(user.score) }}</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鏈€杩戝脊骞?--\x3e\n    <div class="chat-section">\n      <div class="section-title">\n        <i class="fas fa-comments"></i>\n        寮瑰箷\n      </div>\n      <div class="chat-list">\n        <div v-for="(msg, index) in liveData.barrage.slice(0, 8)" :key="index" class="chat-item">\n          <span class="chat-name">{{ msg.name }}:</span>\n          <span class="chat-text">{{ msg.c }}</span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 搴曢儴浜掑姩鏍?--\x3e\n    <div class="bottom-bar">\n      <div class="input-area">\n        <input v-model="messageInput" type="text" placeholder="鍙戦€佸脊骞?.." />\n        <button class="send-btn" @click="sendMessage">\n          <i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n      <div class="action-buttons">\n        <button class="action-btn" @click="toggleLike">\n          <i class="fas fa-heart" :class="{ liked: isLiked }"></i>\n        </button>\n        <button class="action-btn gift-btn" @click="showGiftPanel = true">\n          <i class="fas fa-gift"></i>\n        </button>\n        <button class="action-btn superchat-btn" @click="showSuperchatPanel = true">\n          <i class="fas fa-comment-dollar"></i>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 绀肩墿闈㈡澘 --\x3e\n    <div v-if="showGiftPanel" class="gift-panel" @click.self="showGiftPanel = false">\n      <div class="gift-content">\n        <div class="gift-header">\n          <span>閫佺ぜ鐗?/span>\n          <button class="close-btn" @click="showGiftPanel = false">\n            <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n        <div class="anonymous-toggle">\n          <label class="toggle-label">\n            <input v-model="isAnonymous" type="checkbox" />\n            <span class="toggle-text">鍖垮悕鍙戦€?/span>\n          </label>\n        </div>\n        <div class="gift-grid">\n          <div v-for="(gift, index) in gifts" :key="index" class="gift-item" @click="sendGift(gift)">\n            <div class="gift-icon">{{ gift.icon }}</div>\n            <div class="gift-name">{{ gift.name }}</div>\n            <div class="gift-price">{{ gift.price }}甯?/div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 閱掔洰鐣欒█闈㈡澘 --\x3e\n    <div v-if="showSuperchatPanel" class="superchat-panel" @click.self="showSuperchatPanel = false">\n      <div class="superchat-content">\n        <div class="superchat-header">\n          <span>鍙戦€侀啋鐩暀瑷€</span>\n          <button class="close-btn" @click="showSuperchatPanel = false">\n            <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n        <div class="superchat-form">\n          <div class="anonymous-toggle">\n            <label class="toggle-label">\n              <input v-model="isAnonymous" type="checkbox" />\n              <span class="toggle-text">鍖垮悕鍙戦€?/span>\n            </label>\n          </div>\n          <div class="amount-section">\n            <label>閲戦</label>\n            <div class="amount-options">\n              <button\n                v-for="amt in [30, 50, 100, 200]"\n                :key="amt"\n                :class="[\'amount-btn\', { active: superchatAmount === amt }]"\n                @click="superchatAmount = amt"\n              >\n                楼{{ amt }}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="message-section">\n            <label>鐣欒█鍐呭</label>\n            <textarea v-model="superchatMessage" placeholder="杈撳叆浣犳兂璇寸殑璇?.." maxlength="50"></textarea>\n            <span class="char-count">{{ superchatMessage.length }}/50</span>\n          </div>\n          <button class="send-superchat-btn" @click="sendSuperchat">\n            <i class="fas fa-paper-plane"></i>\n            鍙戦€?楼{{ superchatAmount }}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</template>\n\n<script setup lang="ts">\nimport { ref, computed, onMounted } from \'vue\';\nimport _ from \'lodash\';\nimport { getAvatarByName, getLiveImageUrlByName } from \'../../鏁版嵁\';\nimport {\n  abortCurrentRequest,\n  loadLiveRoomFromHistoryAsync,\n  saveCharacterModuleToMessage,\n  updateLiveRoomInHistory,\n} from \'../../store\';\nimport { fetchLiveDataFromAi } from \'../../棰勮/aiService\';\nimport { buildPromptRequestByMode, queueNovelAiImageGeneration } from \'../../imageGen/novelai\';\nimport { loadNovelAiConfig } from \'../../imageGen/novelAiConfig\';\nimport { uploadImageDataUrlToSillyTavern } from \'../../imageGen/tavernImageUpload\';\n\n// 鑾峰彇鐢ㄦ埛鍚嶇О\n// 濡傛灉瑙掕壊鍙橀噺涓病鏈夌敤鎴峰悕锛屽垯浠庨厭棣?SillyTavern.name1 鍥為€€锛堝彧璇伙級\nfunction getUserName(): string {\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' }) || {};\n    const phoneData = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data\') || {};\n\n    // 濡傛灉瑙掕壊鍙橀噺涓湁鐢ㄦ埛鍚嶏紝鐩存帴杩斿洖\n    if (phoneData?.user?.name) {\n      return phoneData.user.name;\n    }\n\n    // 灏濊瘯浠庨厭棣嗚鍙栫敤鎴峰鍚峔n    const tavernUserName = SillyTavern.name1;\n    if (tavernUserName) {\n      return tavernUserName;\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn(\'[LiveRoom] 鏃犳硶璇诲彇鐢ㄦ埛濮撳悕:\', e);\n  }\n  return \'鎴慭';\n}\n\n// Props - 浠庣洿鎾垪琛ㄤ紶鍏nconst props = defineProps<{\n  streamerName?: string;\n  roomTitle?: string;\n}>();\n\ndefineEmits([\'back\']);\n\n// 缁堟鐢熸垚骞惰繑鍥瀄nconst handleAbort = () => {\n  abortCurrentRequest();\n  isLoading.value = false;\n};\n\n// 鍚庡鏁版嵁锛堢┖锛塡nconst fallbackData = {\n  streamer: \'\',\n  roomTitle: \'\',\n  roomDesc: \'\',\n  viewers: 0,\n  likes: 0,\n  followers: 0,\n  image: \'\',\n  thought: \'\',\n  contents: [{ dialogue: \'\', state: \'\' }],\n  barrage: [],\n  superchat: [],\n  ranking: [],\n};\n\n// 鍔犺浇鐘舵€乗nconst isLoading = ref(false);\nconst loadError = ref<string | null>(null);\n\n// 鐩存挱鏁版嵁\nconst liveData = ref(fallbackData);\n\n// 绀肩墿鍒楄〃锛?2涓紝浠庝究瀹滃埌鏄傝吹锛塡nconst gifts = ref([\n  { icon: \'馃尮\', name: \'鐜懓\', price: 1 },\n  { icon: \'馃挅\', name: \'鐖卞績\', price: 5 },\n  { icon: \'馃崿\', name: \'绯栨灉\', price: 10 },\n  { icon: \'馃巵\', name: \'绀肩洅\', price: 20 },\n  { icon: \'馃専\', name: \'鏄熸槦\', price: 50 },\n  { icon: \'馃殌\', name: \'鐏\', price: 100 },\n  { icon: \'馃拵\', name: \'閽荤煶\', price: 200 },\n  { icon: \'馃憫\', name: \'鐨囧啝\', price: 500 },\n  { icon: \'馃\', name: \'鐙鍏絓', price: 1000 },\n  { icon: \'馃彴\', name: \'鍩庡牎\', price: 2000 },\n  { icon: \'馃寛\', name: \'褰╄櫣\', price: 5000 },\n  { icon: \'馃殺\', name: \'娓歌墖\', price: 10000 },\n]);\n\n// 鐘舵€乗nconst isFollowing = ref(false);\nconst isLiked = ref(false);\nconst messageInput = ref(\'\');\nconst showGiftPanel = ref(false);\nconst showSuperchatPanel = ref(false);\nconst superchatAmount = ref(30);\nconst superchatMessage = ref(\'\');\nconst currentContentIndex = ref(0);\nconst isThoughtBlurred = ref(true);\nconst isAnonymous = ref(false);\n\n// 褰撳墠鏄剧ず鐨勭洿鎾唴瀹筡nconst currentContent = computed(() => {\n  return liveData.value.contents[currentContentIndex.value];\n});\n\n// 鍒囨崲鍒颁笅涓€鏉＄洿鎾唴瀹筡nconst nextContent = () => {\n  currentContentIndex.value = (currentContentIndex.value + 1) % liveData.value.contents.length;\n};\n\n// 鍒囨崲鎯虫硶妯＄硦鐘舵€乗nconst toggleThoughtBlur = () => {\n  isThoughtBlurred.value = !isThoughtBlurred.value;\n};\n\n// 鏄剧ず鐨勫脊骞曪紙婊氬姩鏁堟灉锛塡nconst visibleBarrage = computed(() => {\n  return liveData.value.barrage.slice(0, 4);\n});\n\n// 鏍煎紡鍖栨暟瀛梊nconst formatNumber = (num: number): string => {\n  if (num >= 10000) return (num / 10000).toFixed(1) + \'w\';\n  if (num >= 1000) return (num / 1000).toFixed(1) + \'k\';\n  return num.toString();\n};\n\n// 鑾峰彇澶村儚\nconst getStreamerAvatar = (name: string): string => {\n  return getAvatarByName(name);\n};\n\n// 鑾峰彇鐩存挱鍥剧墖锛氫紭鍏堜粠鐩存挱鍥剧墖搴撴煡鎵撅紝鍚﹀垯浣跨敤鍘熷鍊糪nconst getLiveImage = (image: string): string => {\n  return getLiveImageUrlByName(image) || image;\n};\n\nconst isGeneratingLiveImage = ref(false);\n\nconst handleGenerateLiveImage = async () => {\n  if (isGeneratingLiveImage.value) return;\n  const prompt = (liveData.value as any)?.prompt;\n  if (!prompt) {\n    toastr.warning(\'璇ョ洿鎾棿娌℃湁 prompt锛屾棤娉曠敓鍥綷');\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const cfg = loadNovelAiConfig();\n  const fmtLabel =\n    cfg.apiFormat === \'pollinations\'\n      ? \'Pollinations\'\n      : cfg.apiFormat === \'openai\'\n        ? \'OpenAI\'\n        : cfg.apiFormat === \'gemini\'\n          ? \'Gemini\'\n          : \'NovelAI\';\n  const apiCfg =\n    cfg.apiFormat === \'novelai\'\n      ? cfg.novelai\n      : cfg.apiFormat === \'openai\'\n        ? cfg.openai\n        : cfg.apiFormat === \'gemini\'\n          ? cfg.gemini\n          : cfg.pollinations;\n  if (cfg.apiFormat !== \'pollinations\' && (!apiCfg.url || !(\'key\' in apiCfg && apiCfg.key))) {\n    toastr.warning(`璇峰厛鍦ㄨ缃?缁樺浘閰嶇疆涓～鍐?${fmtLabel} URL 鍜?Key`);\n    return;\n  }\n  if ((cfg.apiFormat === \'openai\' || cfg.apiFormat === \'gemini\') && !String(apiCfg.model || \'\').trim()) {\n    toastr.warning(`璇峰厛鍦ㄨ缃?缁樺浘閰嶇疆涓～鍐?${fmtLabel} 妯″瀷`);\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const { promptText, referenceImages } = buildPromptRequestByMode(prompt, cfg.promptComposeMode);\n  if (!promptText) {\n    toastr.warning(\'prompt 涓虹┖锛屾棤娉曠敓鍥綷');\n    return;\n  }\n\n  isGeneratingLiveImage.value = true;\n  try {\n    const { dataUrl } = await queueNovelAiImageGeneration(promptText, { config: cfg, referenceImages });\n    const imageUrl = dataUrl.startsWith(\'data:image/\')\n      ? await uploadImageDataUrlToSillyTavern(dataUrl, { characterName: props.streamerName || liveData.value.streamer })\n      : dataUrl;\n\n    liveData.value = { ...liveData.value, image: imageUrl };\n    await updateLiveRoomInHistory(\n      props.streamerName || liveData.value.streamer,\n      props.roomTitle || liveData.value.roomTitle,\n      liveData.value,\n    );\n    toastr.success(\'鐢婚潰宸叉洿鏂癨');\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error(\'[LiveRoom] 鐢熷浘澶辫触:\', e);\n    toastr.error(\'鐢熷浘澶辫触: \' + (e instanceof Error ? e.message : \'鏈煡閿欒\'));\n  } finally {\n    isGeneratingLiveImage.value = false;\n  }\n};\n\n// 鑾峰彇閱掔洰鐣欒█鐨勯鑹茬瓑绾nconst getSuperChatClass = (amount: number): string => {\n  if (amount >= 100) return \'sc-gold\';\n  if (amount >= 50) return \'sc-pink\';\n  return \'sc-blue\';\n};\n\n// 鍏虫敞/鍙栧叧\nconst toggleFollow = () => {\n  isFollowing.value = !isFollowing.value;\n};\n\n// 鐐硅禐\nconst toggleLike = () => {\n  isLiked.value = !isLiked.value;\n  if (isLiked.value) {\n    liveData.value.likes++;\n  } else {\n    liveData.value.likes--;\n  }\n};\n\n// AI鍥炲鍔犺浇鐘舵€乗nconst isAiLoading = ref(false);\n\n// 瑙﹀彂AI鍥炲\nasync function triggerAiResponse(userAction: string) {\n  if (!props.streamerName || !props.roomTitle) {\n    console.warn(\'[LiveRoom] 鏃犳硶瑙﹀彂AI鍥炲锛氱己灏戜富鎾俊鎭痋');\n    return;\n  }\n\n  isAiLoading.value = true;\n  try {\n    console.info(\'[LiveRoom] 瑙﹀彂AI鍥炲锛岀敤鎴疯涓?\', userAction);\n    const result = await fetchLiveDataFromAi(props.streamerName, props.roomTitle, userAction);\n\n    if (result.success && result.data) {\n      // 鏇存柊鐩存挱鏁版嵁\n      liveData.value = result.data;\n      // 淇濆瓨鍒版ゼ灞傚巻鍙瞈n      await updateLiveRoomInHistory(props.streamerName, props.roomTitle, result.data);\n      console.info(\'[LiveRoom] AI鍥炲鎴愬姛\');\n    } else {\n      console.error(\'[LiveRoom] AI鍥炲澶辫触:\', result.error);\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error(\'[LiveRoom] AI鍥炲寮傚父:\', e);\n  } finally {\n    isAiLoading.value = false;\n  }\n}\n\n// 鍙戦€佸脊骞昞nconst sendMessage = async () => {\n  if (messageInput.value.trim()) {\n    const userName = getUserName();\n    const content = messageInput.value.trim();\n\n    // 娣诲姞鍒板脊骞曞垪琛╘n    liveData.value.barrage.unshift({\n      name: userName,\n      c: content,\n    });\n\n    // 鏋勫缓鐢ㄦ埛琛屼负鎻忚堪\n    const userAction = `${userName}鍙戦€佸脊骞曪細${content}`;\n    messageInput.value = \'\';\n\n    // 瑙﹀彂AI鍥炲\n    await triggerAiResponse(userAction);\n  }\n};\n\n// 閫佺ぜ鐗‐nconst sendGift = async (gift: { icon: string; name: string; price: number }) => {\n  const userName = isAnonymous.value ? \'鍖垮悕鐢ㄦ埛\' : getUserName();\n\n  // 鏋勫缓鐢ㄦ埛琛屼负鎻忚堪\n  const userAction = `${userName}璧犻€佺ぜ鐗╋細${gift.name}浠峰€?{gift.price}甯乣;\n  console.log(\'[LiveRoom]\', userAction);\n\n  showGiftPanel.value = false;\n\n  // 瑙﹀彂AI鍥炲\n  await triggerAiResponse(userAction);\n};\n\n// 鍙戦€侀啋鐩暀瑷€\nconst sendSuperchat = async () => {\n  if (superchatMessage.value.trim() && superchatAmount.value > 0) {\n    const userName = isAnonymous.value ? \'鍖垮悕鐢ㄦ埛\' : getUserName();\n    const content = superchatMessage.value.trim();\n    const amount = superchatAmount.value;\n\n    // 娣诲姞鍒伴啋鐩暀瑷€鍒楄〃\n    liveData.value.superchat.unshift({\n      name: userName,\n      amount: amount,\n      c: content,\n    });\n\n    // 鏋勫缓鐢ㄦ埛琛屼负鎻忚堪\n    const userAction = `${userName}鍙戦€侀啋鐩暀瑷€锛?{content}锛埪?{amount}锛塦;\n\n    superchatMessage.value = \'\';\n    superchatAmount.value = 30;\n    showSuperchatPanel.value = false;\n\n    // 瑙﹀彂AI鍥炲\n    await triggerAiResponse(userAction);\n  }\n};\n\n// 鍥剧墖鍔犺浇璋冭瘯\nconst handleImageError = (e: Event) => {\n  console.error(\'[LiveRoom] 鍥剧墖鍔犺浇澶辫触:\', liveData.value.image, e);\n};\n\nconst handleImageLoad = () => {\n  console.log(\'[LiveRoom] 鍥剧墖鍔犺浇鎴愬姛:\', liveData.value.image);\n};\n\n// 鍔犺浇鐩存挱鏁版嵁\nasync function loadLiveData() {\n  if (!props.streamerName || !props.roomTitle) {\n    console.info(\'[LiveRoom] 鏈紶鍏ヤ富鎾俊鎭紝浣跨敤榛樿鏁版嵁\');\n    return;\n  }\n\n  isLoading.value = true;\n  loadError.value = null;\n\n  try {\n    const historyData = await loadLiveRoomFromHistoryAsync(props.streamerName, props.roomTitle);\n    if (historyData) {\n      console.info(\'[LiveRoom] 浠庢ゼ灞傚巻鍙插姞杞界洿鎾棿鏁版嵁\');\n      liveData.value = historyData as typeof fallbackData;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const { fetchLiveDataFromAi, loadApiConfigForView } = await import(\'../../棰勮/aiService\');\n\n    const apiConfig = loadApiConfigForView(\'live\');\n    if (!apiConfig.url || !apiConfig.key || !apiConfig.model) {\n      loadError.value = \'璇峰厛鍦ㄨ缃腑閰嶇疆 API\';\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const result = await fetchLiveDataFromAi(props.streamerName, props.roomTitle);\n\n    if (result.success && result.data) {\n      liveData.value = result.data;\n      // 淇濆瓨鍒版ゼ灞俓n      await saveCharacterModuleToMessage(\'live\', props.streamerName, result.data);\n    } else {\n      loadError.value = result.error || \'鍔犺浇澶辫触\';\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    loadError.value = e instanceof Error ? e.message : \'鍔犺浇鏃跺彂鐢熸湭鐭ラ敊璇痋';\n  } finally {\n    isLoading.value = false;\n  }\n}\n\n// 缁勪欢鎸傝浇鏃跺姞杞芥暟鎹紙浣跨敤 setTimeout 寤惰繜鎵ц锛岄伩鍏嶉樆濉炰富绾跨▼锛塡nonMounted(() => {\n  setTimeout(() => {\n    loadLiveData();\n  }, 0);\n});\n<\/script>\n\n<style>\n/* 鍏ㄥ眬寮瑰箷鍔ㄧ敾 - 蹇呴』鍦ㄩ潪 scoped 鏍峰紡涓?*/\n@keyframes barrageScroll {\n  0% {\n    left: 100%;\n    transform: translateX(0);\n  }\n  100% {\n    left: 0;\n    transform: translateX(-100%);\n  }\n}\n</style>\n\n<style scoped>\n.live-room-container {\n  height: calc(100% + 24px);\n  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  color: #fff;\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  position: relative;\n  /* 鑳屾櫙寤朵几鍒扮姸鎬佹爮鍖哄煙 */\n  margin-top: -24px;\n  padding-top: 24px;\n}\n\n.live-image-generate-btn {\n  position: absolute;\n  bottom: 8px;\n  left: 8px;\n  z-index: 6;\n  width: 28px;\n  height: 28px;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  border: none;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);\n  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);\n  color: #8fb8ed;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(143, 184, 237, 0.15);\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition:\n    transform 0.15s ease,\n    background 0.15s ease;\n}\n\n.live-image-generate-btn:active {\n  transform: scale(0.94);\n}\n\n.live-image-generate-btn:disabled {\n  cursor: not-allowed;\n  opacity: 0.6;\n}\n\n/* 椤堕儴瀵艰埅 */\n.top-bar {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  padding: 8px 12px;\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);\n  position: sticky;\n  top: 0;\n  z-index: 10;\n}\n\n.back-btn {\n  width: 28px;\n  height: 28px;\n  border: none;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);\n  color: #fff;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  font-size: 12px;\n}\n\n.streamer-info {\n  flex: 1;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n  margin-left: 10px;\n}\n\n.streamer-avatar {\n  width: 32px;\n  height: 32px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  object-fit: cover;\n  border: 2px solid #ff6b6b;\n}\n\n.streamer-detail {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n.streamer-name {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.follower-count {\n  font-size: 11px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);\n}\n\n.follow-btn {\n  padding: 6px 14px;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 16px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b, #ff8e53);\n  color: #fff;\n}\n\n.follow-btn.following {\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);\n}\n\n/* 瑙嗛鍖哄煙 */\n.video-area {\n  position: relative;\n  width: 100%;\n  min-height: 200px;\n  aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;\n  background: #000;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n\n.video-placeholder {\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  position: relative;\n}\n\n.video-cover {\n  width: 100%;\n  height: 100%;\n  object-fit: cover;\n  display: block;\n}\n\n.live-indicator {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 10px;\n  left: 10px;\n  padding: 4px 10px;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b, #ff8e53);\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 5px;\n  z-index: 5;\n}\n\n.live-indicator i {\n  font-size: 8px;\n  animation: pulse 1.5s infinite;\n}\n\n@keyframes pulse {\n  0%,\n  100% {\n    opacity: 1;\n  }\n  50% {\n    opacity: 0.4;\n  }\n}\n\n.viewer-badge {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 10px;\n  right: 10px;\n  padding: 4px 10px;\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  font-size: 12px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 5px;\n  z-index: 5;\n}\n\n/* 寮瑰箷 - 鍦ㄥ浘鐗囦笂婊戣繃 */\n.barrage-overlay {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 0;\n  left: 0;\n  right: 0;\n  bottom: 0;\n  overflow: hidden;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  z-index: 4;\n}\n\n.barrage-item {\n  position: absolute;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  padding: 3px 10px;\n  border-radius: 15px;\n  background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n  animation: barrageScroll 10s linear forwards;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n}\n\n@keyframes barrageScroll {\n  0% {\n    left: 100%;\n    transform: translateX(0);\n  }\n  100% {\n    left: 0;\n    transform: translateX(-100%);\n  }\n}\n\n.barrage-name {\n  color: #7dd3fc;\n  font-weight: 500;\n}\n\n.barrage-text {\n  color: #fff;\n}\n\n/* 閱掔洰鐣欒█寮瑰箷鏍峰紡 */\n.superchat-barrage {\n  font-weight: 500;\n  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n}\n\n.superchat-barrage .barrage-name {\n  color: #fff;\n}\n\n.sc-badge {\n  font-size: 11px;\n  padding: 1px 6px;\n  border-radius: 10px;\n  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);\n  color: #fff;\n}\n\n/* 閱掔洰鐣欒█棰滆壊绛夌骇 */\n.sc-blue {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa);\n}\n\n.sc-pink {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ec4899, #f472b6);\n}\n\n.sc-gold {\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b, #fbbf24);\n}\n\n/* 鐩存挱闂翠俊鎭?*/\n.room-info {\n  padding: 12px;\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);\n}\n\n.room-title {\n  font-size: 16px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  margin-bottom: 6px;\n}\n\n.room-desc {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);\n  margin-bottom: 8px;\n  line-height: 1.4;\n}\n\n.room-stats {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 16px;\n}\n\n.stat {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 4px;\n}\n\n/* 閫氱敤鍖哄潡鏍囬 */\n.section-title {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  padding: 10px 12px 6px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);\n}\n\n.section-title i {\n  color: #ff8e53;\n}\n\n/* 鐩存挱鍐呭鍖哄煙 */\n.live-content-section {\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);\n  margin-top: 8px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  transition: background 0.2s;\n}\n\n.live-content-section:active {\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);\n}\n\n.content-indicator {\n  margin-left: auto;\n  font-size: 11px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n  font-weight: normal;\n}\n\n.live-content-box {\n  padding: 0 12px 8px;\n}\n\n.content-dialogue {\n  font-size: 14px;\n  color: #fff;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n\n.content-state {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  font-style: italic;\n}\n\n.content-hint {\n  font-size: 10px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);\n  text-align: center;\n  padding-bottom: 8px;\n}\n\n/* 鎯虫硶鍖哄煙 */\n.thought-section {\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n  margin-top: 8px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\n.thought-hint {\n  margin-left: auto;\n  font-size: 10px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);\n  font-weight: normal;\n}\n\n.thought-box {\n  padding: 0 12px 12px;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  color: #f9a8d4;\n  line-height: 1.6;\n  font-style: italic;\n  transition:\n    filter 0.3s,\n    opacity 0.3s;\n}\n\n.thought-box i {\n  color: rgba(249, 168, 212, 0.5);\n  font-size: 10px;\n  margin: 0 4px;\n}\n\n.thought-box.blurred {\n  filter: blur(6px);\n  opacity: 0.6;\n  user-select: none;\n}\n\n/* 閱掔洰鐣欒█ */\n.superchat-section {\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n  margin-top: 8px;\n}\n\n.superchat-list {\n  padding: 0 12px 12px;\n}\n\n.superchat-item {\n  display: flex;\n  gap: 10px;\n  padding: 10px;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.2), rgba(255, 142, 83, 0.2));\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  color: #ffcc00;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n\n.sc-text {\n  font-size: 12px;\n  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);\n  line-height: 1.4;\n}\n\n/* 璐＄尞姒?*/\n.ranking-section {\n  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, BAAmB,CACnB,iBAAkB,CAClB,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,OAAQ,CACR,WAAY,CACZ,yCAA6C,CAC7C,cAAe,CACf,aACF,CAEA,gCACE,aAAc,CACd,cACF,CAEA,mCACE,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,MACF,CAEA,8BACE,eAAgB,CAChB,WAAY,CACZ,aAAc,CACd,cAAe,CACf,WAAY,CACZ,YAAa,CACb,kBAAmB,CACnB,sBACF,CAEA,qCACE,WACF',sourcesContent:['<template>\n  <div class="map-app">\n    \x3c!-- 杩斿洖鎸夐挳锛堝缁堟樉绀猴級 --\x3e\n    <button class="back-button" @click="handleBack">\n      <i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i>\n    </button>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鍒锋柊鎸夐挳 --\x3e\n    <button class="refresh-button" @click="refreshMapData">\n      <i class="fas fa-sync-alt" :class="{ \'fa-spin\': isRefreshing }"></i>\n    </button>\n\n    \x3c!-- 浜虹墿鍒楄〃鎸夐挳 --\x3e\n    <button class="characters-button" @click="toggleCharactersList">\n      <i class="fas fa-users"></i>\n    </button>\n\n    \x3c!-- 浜虹墿鍒楄〃寮圭獥 --\x3e\n    <Transition name="slide">\n      <div v-if="showCharacters" class="characters-list">\n        <div class="characters-list-title">浜虹墿鍒楄〃</div>\n        <div class="characters-list-content">\n          <div\n            v-for="(charData, charName) in mapData.characters"\n            :key="charName"\n            class="character-item"\n            @click="showCharacterDetail(charName as string, charData)"\n          >\n            <img class="character-avatar" :src="getCharacterAvatar(charName as string)" :alt="charName as string" />\n            <div class="character-info">\n              <div class="character-name">{{ charName }}</div>\n              <div class="character-location">{{ charData.location }}</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鍦板浘鍐呭 --\x3e\n    <div class="map-container">\n      <div class="map-title">{{ currentMapTitle }}</div>\n\n      \x3c!-- 鍔ㄦ€佹覆鏌?x3缃戞牸 --\x3e\n      <template v-for="row in 3" :key="\'row-\' + row">\n        <div class="map-row">\n          <template v-for="col in 3" :key="\'col-\' + col">\n            \x3c!-- 鍦扮偣鏍煎瓙 --\x3e\n            <div\n              v-if="getLocationAtPosition(row, col)"\n              class="location-button"\n              :class="{\n                \'school-button\': hasSubLocations(getLocationAtPosition(row, col)!.name),\n                \'empty-location\': false,\n              }"\n              @click="handleLocationClick(getLocationAtPosition(row, col)!)"\n            >\n              \x3c!-- 浜虹墿鏍囨敞 --\x3e\n              <div class="character-markers">\n                <div\n                  v-for="(char, idx) in getCharactersAt(getLocationAtPosition(row, col)!.name)"\n                  :key="char.name"\n                  class="character-marker"\n                  :style="getMarkerStyle(idx, getCharactersAt(getLocationAtPosition(row, col)!.name).length)"\n                  @click.stop="showCharacterDetail(char.name, { location: char.location, status: char.status })"\n                >\n                  <img :src="char.avatar" :alt="char.name" />\n                  <div class="marker-pin"></div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <i class="fas" :class="getLocationAtPosition(row, col)!.icon"></i>\n              <span>{{ getLocationAtPosition(row, col)!.name }}</span>\n            </div>\n            \x3c!-- 绌轰綅缃?--\x3e\n            <div v-else class="location-button empty-location">\n              <i class="fas fa-question"></i>\n              <span>鏆傛椂鐣欑┖</span>\n            </div>\n            \x3c!-- 绔栧悜閬撹矾锛堥潪鏈€鍚庝竴鍒楋級 --\x3e\n            <div v-if="col < 3" class="road-vertical"></div>\n          </template>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 妯悜閬撹矾锛堥潪鏈€鍚庝竴琛岋級 --\x3e\n        <div v-if="row < 3" class="map-row road-row">\n          <div class="road-horizontal"></div>\n        </div>\n      </template>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鍔犺浇鐘舵€侀伄缃?--\x3e\n    <Transition name="fade">\n      <div v-if="phoneMapState.isLoading" class="loading-overlay">\n        <div class="loading-spinner">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>\n          <span>姝ｅ湪鑾峰彇鍦板浘鏁版嵁...</span>\n          <button class="abort-btn" @click="handleAbort">\n            <i class="fas fa-stop"></i>\n            <span>缁堟鐢熸垚</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 閿欒鎻愮ず --\x3e\n    <Transition name="slide-down">\n      <div v-if="phoneMapState.error" class="error-toast" @click="clearMapError">\n        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>\n        <span>{{ phoneMapState.error }}</span>\n        <button class="error-close">\n          <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鑳屾櫙閬僵 --\x3e\n    <Transition name="fade">\n      <div v-if="showBackdrop" class="backdrop" @click="closeAllPopups"></div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 鍦扮偣淇℃伅寮圭獥 --\x3e\n    <Transition name="popup">\n      <div v-if="selectedLocation" class="location-popup">\n        <div class="location-popup-header">\n          <h2 class="location-popup-title">{{ selectedLocation.name }}</h2>\n          <div class="location-popup-actions">\n            <button class="location-popup-goto-btn" @click="goToLocation">\n              <i class="fas fa-walking"></i> 鍓嶅線\n            </button>\n            <button class="location-popup-close" @click="closeLocationPopup">\n              <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class="location-popup-section">\n          <h3 class="location-popup-section-title">浜虹墿</h3>\n          <div class="location-popup-characters-container">\n            <div class="location-popup-characters-group">\n              <div class="location-popup-characters-label">涓昏浜虹墿</div>\n              <div class="location-popup-characters main-characters">\n                <template v-if="selectedLocation.mainCharacters.length > 0">\n                  <div\n                    v-for="char in selectedLocation.mainCharacters"\n                    :key="char.name"\n                    class="location-character"\n                    @click.stop="showCharacterDetail(char.name, { location: char.location, status: char.status })"\n                  >\n                    <img :src="char.avatar" :alt="char.name" />\n                    <span>{{ char.name }}</span>\n                  </div>\n                </template>\n                <div v-else class="location-popup-empty-message">\n                  <i class="fas fa-user-slash"></i>\n                  <span>褰撳墠娌℃湁涓昏浜虹墿鍦ㄦ鍦扮偣</span>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class="location-popup-characters-group">\n              <div class="location-popup-characters-label">鍏朵粬浜虹墿</div>\n              <div class="location-popup-characters other-characters">\n                <div v-if="selectedLocation.otherCharacters" class="location-popup-empty-message normal">\n                  <i class="fas fa-users"></i>\n                  <span>{{ selectedLocation.otherCharacters }}</span>\n                </div>\n                <div v-else class="location-popup-empty-message">\n                  <i class="fas fa-users-slash"></i>\n                  <span>鏃犲叾浠栦汉鐗?/span>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class="location-popup-section">\n          <h3 class="location-popup-section-title">褰撳墠浣嶇疆鐘舵€?/h3>\n          <p class="location-popup-content">{{ selectedLocation.status }}</p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class="location-popup-section">\n          <h3 class="location-popup-section-title">閲嶈浜嬩欢</h3>\n          <p class="location-popup-content">{{ selectedLocation.events }}</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n\n    \x3c!-- 浜虹墿璇︽儏寮圭獥 --\x3e\n    <Transition name="popup">\n      <div v-if="selectedCharacter" class="character-detail-popup">\n        <button class="character-detail-close" @click="closeCharacterDetail">\n          <i class="fas fa-times"></i>\n        </button>\n        <div class="character-detail-header">\n          <img class="character-detail-avatar" :src="selectedCharacter.avatar" :alt="selectedCharacter.name" />\n          <div class="character-detail-info">\n            <div class="character-detail-name">{{ selectedCharacter.name }}</div>\n            <div class="character-detail-location">\n              <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i>\n              <span>{{ selectedCharacter.location }}</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <div class="character-detail-status">\n          {{ selectedCharacter.status }}\n        </div>\n        <div class="character-detail-actions">\n          <button class="character-detail-message-btn" @click="sendMessageToCharacter">\n            <i class="fas fa-comment-dots"></i> 鍙戦€佹秷鎭痋n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Transition>\n  </div>\n</template>\n\n<script setup lang="ts">\nimport { ref, computed, onMounted } from \'vue\';\nimport _ from \'lodash\';\nimport yaml from \'yaml\';\nimport { store, phoneMapState, loadMapDataFromAi, abortCurrentRequest } from \'../../store\';\n\ndefineEmits([\'back\']);\n\n// YAML鏁版嵁绫诲瀷瀹氫箟\ninterface DistrictConfig {\n  position: number;\n  name: string;\n  icon: string;\n  subLocations?: DistrictConfig[];\n}\n\ninterface MapConfig {\n  name: string;\n  districts: DistrictConfig[];\n}\n\ninterface CharacterConfig {\n  name: string;\n  avatar: string;\n}\n\ninterface BaseInfo {\n  characters: CharacterConfig[];\n  map: MapConfig;\n  randomAvatars?: string[];\n}\n\ninterface LocationData {\n  position: number;\n  icon: string;\n  description: string;\n  status: string;\n  events: string;\n  otherCharacters: string;\n  subLocations?: Record<string, LocationData>;\n}\n\ninterface CharacterMapData {\n  location: string;\n  status: string;\n}\n\ninterface MapData {\n  date: string;\n  time: string;\n  locations: Record<string, LocationData>;\n  characters: Record<string, CharacterMapData>;\n}\n\n// 浠庤鑹插彉閲忓姞杞芥暟鎹甛nconst loadPhoneDataFromChat = () => {\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' });\n    const phoneData = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data\');\n    if (phoneData) {\n      return phoneData;\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.warn(\'鏃犳硶浠庤鑹插彉閲忓姞杞芥暟鎹?\', e);\n  }\n  return null;\n};\n\n// 榛樿绌烘暟鎹甛nconst defaultBaseInfo: BaseInfo = {\n  characters: [],\n  map: { name: \'\', districts: [] },\n  randomAvatars: [],\n};\nconst fallbackMapData: MapData = {\n  date: \'\',\n  time: \'\',\n  locations: {},\n  characters: {},\n};\n\n// 浼樺厛浠庤亰澶╁彉閲忚鍙朾aseInfo\nconst phoneData = loadPhoneDataFromChat();\nconst baseInfo: BaseInfo = {\n  characters: phoneData?.characters || defaultBaseInfo.characters,\n  map: phoneData?.map || defaultBaseInfo.map,\n  randomAvatars: phoneData?.randomAvatars || defaultBaseInfo.randomAvatars,\n};\n\n// 璁＄畻灞炴€э細鑾峰彇鍦板浘鏁版嵁锛堜紭鍏堜娇鐢ˋI鑾峰彇鐨勬暟鎹紝鍚﹀垯浣跨敤鍚庡鏁版嵁锛塡nconst mapData = computed<MapData>(() => {\n  if (phoneMapState.data) {\n    // 纭繚鏁版嵁缁撴瀯瀹屾暣锛岄槻姝?undefined 瀵艰嚧娓叉煋閿欒\n    return {\n      date: phoneMapState.data.date || \'\',\n      time: phoneMapState.data.time || \'\',\n      locations: phoneMapState.data.locations || {},\n      characters: phoneMapState.data.characters || {},\n    };\n  }\n  return fallbackMapData;\n});\n\n// 缁勪欢鎸傝浇鏃惰Е鍙慉I鍔犺浇\nonMounted(() => {\n  // 濡傛灉杩樻病鏈夊姞杞借繃鏁版嵁锛屽垯瑙﹀彂AI鍔犺浇\n  if (!phoneMapState.loaded && !phoneMapState.isLoading) {\n    loadMapDataFromAi();\n  }\n});\n\n// 鍒锋柊鐘舵€乗nconst isRefreshing = ref(false);\n\n// 鍒锋柊 - 寮哄埗璋冪敤AI閲嶆柊鐢熸垚鍦板浘鏁版嵁\nconst refreshMapData = async () => {\n  isRefreshing.value = true;\n  // 閲嶇疆鐘舵€佷互渚块噸鏂板姞杞絓n  phoneMapState.loaded = false;\n  // 浼犲叆 true 寮哄埗鍒锋柊锛岃烦杩囧巻鍙茶鍙栵紝鐩存帴璋冪敤AI鐢熸垚\n  await loadMapDataFromAi(true);\n  isRefreshing.value = false;\n};\n\n// 褰撳墠鏄剧ず鐨勭埗绾у湴鍖猴紙鐢ㄤ簬瀛愬湴鐐瑰湴鍥撅級\nconst currentParentDistrict = ref<DistrictConfig | null>(null);\n\n// 寮圭獥鐘舵€乗nconst showCharacters = ref(false);\n\ninterface LocationInfo {\n  name: string;\n  description: string;\n  mainCharacters: { name: string; avatar: string; location: string; status: string }[];\n  otherCharacters: string;\n  status: string;\n  events: string;\n}\n\ninterface CharacterInfo {\n  name: string;\n  avatar: string;\n  location: string;\n  status: string;\n}\n\nconst selectedLocation = ref<LocationInfo | null>(null);\nconst selectedCharacter = ref<CharacterInfo | null>(null);\n\n// 鑳屾櫙閬僵\nconst showBackdrop = computed(() => selectedLocation.value !== null || selectedCharacter.value !== null);\n\n// 褰撳墠鍦板浘鏍囬\nconst currentMapTitle = computed(() => {\n  if (currentParentDistrict.value) {\n    return currentParentDistrict.value.name + \'鍦板浘\';\n  }\n  // 浼樺厛浣跨敤 AI 杩斿洖鐨?mapName锛屽叾娆′娇鐢?baseInfo 涓殑閰嶇疆\n  return mapData.value.mapName || baseInfo.map.name || \'鍦板浘\';\n});\n\n// 褰撳墠鏄剧ず鐨勫湴鐐瑰垪琛紙浠庡巻鍙叉ゼ灞傛暟鎹鍙栵級\nconst currentLocations = computed<DistrictConfig[]>(() => {\n  // 濡傛灉鍦ㄥ瓙鍦扮偣瑙嗗浘\n  if (currentParentDistrict.value && currentParentDistrict.value.subLocations) {\n    return currentParentDistrict.value.subLocations;\n  }\n\n  // 浠?mapData.locations 杞崲涓?DistrictConfig 鏍煎紡\n  const locations = mapData.value.locations;\n  if (!locations || Object.keys(locations).length === 0) {\n    return [];\n  }\n\n  return Object.entries(locations).map(([name, data]) => ({\n    position: data.position || 1,\n    name,\n    icon: data.icon || \'fa-map-marker-alt\',\n    subLocations: data.subLocations\n      ? Object.entries(data.subLocations).map(([subName, subData]) => ({\n          position: subData.position || 1,\n          name: subName,\n          icon: subData.icon || \'fa-map-marker-alt\',\n        }))\n      : undefined,\n  }));\n});\n\n// 鏍规嵁浣嶇疆鑾峰彇鍦扮偣\nconst getLocationAtPosition = (row: number, col: number): DistrictConfig | null => {\n  const position = (row - 1) * 3 + col;\n  return currentLocations.value.find(loc => loc.position === position) || null;\n};\n\n// 妫€鏌ュ湴鐐规槸鍚︽湁瀛愬湴鐐癸紙浠庡巻鍙叉ゼ灞傛暟鎹鍙栵級\nconst hasSubLocations = (locationName: string): boolean => {\n  const locationData = mapData.value.locations[locationName];\n  return !!(locationData && locationData.subLocations && Object.keys(locationData.subLocations).length > 0);\n};\n\n// 鐢ㄤ簬瀛樺偍宸插垎閰嶇殑闅忔満澶村儚鏄犲皠锛堢‘淇濆悓涓€瑙掕壊濮嬬粓浣跨敤鍚屼竴澶村儚锛塡nconst randomAvatarMap = new Map<string, string>();\n\n// 鑾峰彇鐢ㄦ埛淇℃伅\nconst getUserInfo = () => {\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' });\n    const user = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data.user\');\n    return user || null;\n  } catch {\n    return null;\n  }\n};\n\n// 鑾峰彇瑙掕壊澶村儚\nconst getCharacterAvatar = (name: string): string => {\n  // 0. 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽槸鐢ㄦ埛锛?鎴?鎴栫敤鎴峰鍚嶏級\n  const userInfo = getUserInfo();\n  if (userInfo) {\n    const userName = userInfo.name || \'\';\n    if (name === \'鎴慭' || name === userName) {\n      return userInfo.avatar || \'\';\n    }\n  }\n\n  // 1. 浼樺厛浠庤鑹插垪琛ㄤ腑鏌ユ壘\n  const char = baseInfo.characters.find(c => c.name === name);\n  if (char?.avatar) {\n    return char.avatar;\n  }\n\n  // 2. 濡傛灉娌℃湁鎵惧埌锛屼娇鐢ㄩ殢鏈哄ご鍍忓簱\n  const randomAvatars = baseInfo.randomAvatars;\n  if (!randomAvatars || randomAvatars.length === 0) {\n    return \'\';\n  }\n\n  // 3. 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚﹀凡缁忎负璇ヨ鑹插垎閰嶈繃闅忔満澶村儚\n  if (randomAvatarMap.has(name)) {\n    return randomAvatarMap.get(name)!;\n  }\n\n  // 4. 鍩轰簬瑙掕壊鍚嶇敓鎴愮ǔ瀹氱殑绱㈠紩\n  let hash = 0;\n  for (let i = 0; i < name.length; i++) {\n    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + name.charCodeAt(i);\n    hash = hash & hash;\n  }\n  const index = Math.abs(hash) % randomAvatars.length;\n  const avatar = randomAvatars[index];\n\n  // 5. 缂撳瓨鍒嗛厤缁撴灉\n  randomAvatarMap.set(name, avatar);\n\n  return avatar;\n};\n\n// 鏋勫缓鍦扮偣灞傜骇鍏崇郴\nconst buildLocationHierarchy = (): Record<string, string> => {\n  const hierarchy: Record<string, string> = {};\n  for (const district of baseInfo.map.districts) {\n    if (district.subLocations) {\n      for (const subLoc of district.subLocations) {\n        hierarchy[subLoc.name] = district.name;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  return hierarchy;\n};\n\nconst locationHierarchy = buildLocationHierarchy();\n\n// 鑾峰彇鏌愪釜鍦扮偣鍖呭惈鐨勬墍鏈夊瓙鍦扮偣\nconst getChildLocations = (locationName: string): string[] => {\n  const children: string[] = [];\n  for (const [child, parent] of Object.entries(locationHierarchy)) {\n    if (parent === locationName) {\n      children.push(child);\n    }\n  }\n  return children;\n};\n\n// 浠巐ocation璺緞涓彁鍙栧瓙鍦扮偣鍚嶇О\nconst getSubLocationName = (locationPath: string): string => {\n  if (locationPath.includes(\'/\')) {\n    return locationPath.split(\'/\')[1];\n  }\n  return locationPath;\n};\n\n// 鑾峰彇鏌愪釜鍦扮偣鐨勮鑹插垪琛紙鍖呮嫭瀛愬湴鐐圭殑瑙掕壊锛塡nconst getCharactersAt = (\n  locationName: string,\n): { name: string; avatar: string; location: string; status: string }[] => {\n  const childLocations = getChildLocations(locationName);\n  const result: { name: string; avatar: string; location: string; status: string }[] = [];\n\n  // 闃插尽鎬ф鏌ワ細纭繚 characters 瀛樺湪\n  const characters = mapData.value.characters;\n  if (!characters || typeof characters !== \'object\') {\n    return result;\n  }\n\n  for (const [charName, charData] of Object.entries(characters)) {\n    // 闃插尽鎬ф鏌ワ細纭繚 charData 瀛樺湪涓旀湁 location 灞炴€n    if (!charData || typeof charData.location !== \'string\') {\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const subLocName = getSubLocationName(charData.location);\n\n    // 瑙掕壊鐩存帴鍦ㄨ鍦扮偣\n    if (subLocName === locationName) {\n      result.push({\n        name: charName,\n        avatar: getCharacterAvatar(charName),\n        location: charData.location,\n        status: charData.status || \'\',\n      });\n    }\n    // 瑙掕壊鍦ㄨ鍦扮偣鐨勫瓙鍦扮偣\n    else if (childLocations.includes(subLocName)) {\n      result.push({\n        name: charName,\n        avatar: getCharacterAvatar(charName),\n        location: charData.location,\n        status: charData.status || \'\',\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  return result;\n};\n\n// 鏍规嵁瑙掕壊鏁伴噺鍜岀储寮曡绠楁爣娉ㄤ綅缃牱寮忥紙闃叉閲嶅彔锛塡nconst getMarkerStyle = (index: number, total: number): Record<string, string> => {\n  if (total === 1) {\n    return { left: \'50%\', top: \'15%\' };\n  }\n\n  if (total === 2) {\n    const positions = [\n      { left: \'30%\', top: \'15%\' },\n      { left: \'70%\', top: \'15%\' },\n    ];\n    return positions[index];\n  }\n\n  // 3涓垨鏇村\n  const positions = [\n    { left: \'50%\', top: \'8%\' },\n    { left: \'25%\', top: \'25%\' },\n    { left: \'75%\', top: \'25%\' },\n    { left: \'35%\', top: \'40%\' },\n    { left: \'65%\', top: \'40%\' },\n  ];\n  return positions[index % positions.length];\n};\n\n// 鑾峰彇鍦扮偣鐨勫姩鎬佹暟鎹甛nconst getLocationDynamicData = (locationName: string): LocationData | null => {\n  // 闃插尽鎬ф鏌ワ細纭繚 locations 瀛樺湪\n  const locations = mapData.value.locations;\n  if (!locations || typeof locations !== \'object\') {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  // 鍏堝湪椤跺眰locations涓煡鎵綷n  if (locations[locationName]) {\n    return locations[locationName];\n  }\n\n  // 鍦ㄥ瓙鍦扮偣涓煡鎵綷n  for (const [, locData] of Object.entries(locations)) {\n    if (locData && locData.subLocations && locData.subLocations[locationName]) {\n      return locData.subLocations[locationName];\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n};\n\n// 澶勭悊鍦扮偣鐐瑰嚮\nconst handleLocationClick = (location: DistrictConfig) => {\n  // 妫€鏌ユ槸鍚︽湁瀛愬湴鐐癸紙浠庡巻鍙叉ゼ灞傛暟鎹鍙栵級\n  const locationData = mapData.value.locations[location.name];\n  if (locationData?.subLocations && Object.keys(locationData.subLocations).length > 0) {\n    // 鏋勫缓瀛愬湴鐐圭殑 DistrictConfig\n    const subLocations = Object.entries(locationData.subLocations).map(([subName, subData]) => ({\n      position: subData.position || 1,\n      name: subName,\n      icon: subData.icon || \'fa-map-marker-alt\',\n    }));\n    currentParentDistrict.value = { ...location, subLocations };\n  } else {\n    // 鏄剧ず鍦扮偣淇℃伅\n    showLocationInfo(location.name);\n  }\n};\n\n// 鍒囨崲鍒颁富鍦板浘\nconst showDistrictMap = () => {\n  currentParentDistrict.value = null;\n};\n\n// 澶勭悊杩斿洖鎸夐挳鐐瑰嚮\nconst handleBack = () => {\n  if (currentParentDistrict.value) {\n    // 鍦ㄥ瓙鍦扮偣鍦板浘涓紝杩斿洖涓诲湴鍥綷n    showDistrictMap();\n  } else {\n    // 鍦ㄤ富鍦板浘涓紝杩斿洖涓诲睆骞昞n    store.activeApp = \'home\';\n  }\n};\n\n// 缁堟鐢熸垚骞惰繑鍥炰富椤礬nconst handleAbort = () => {\n  abortCurrentRequest();\n  phoneMapState.isLoading = false;\n  store.activeApp = \'home\';\n};\n\n// 鍒囨崲浜虹墿鍒楄〃\nconst toggleCharactersList = () => {\n  showCharacters.value = !showCharacters.value;\n  if (showCharacters.value) {\n    closeLocationPopup();\n    closeCharacterDetail();\n  }\n};\n\n// 鏄剧ず鍦扮偣淇℃伅\nconst showLocationInfo = (locationName: string) => {\n  const dynamicData = getLocationDynamicData(locationName);\n  if (dynamicData) {\n    const mainChars = getCharactersAt(locationName);\n\n    selectedLocation.value = {\n      name: locationName,\n      description: dynamicData.description || \'\',\n      mainCharacters: mainChars,\n      otherCharacters: dynamicData.otherCharacters || \'\',\n      status: dynamicData.status || \'\',\n      events: dynamicData.events || \'\',\n    };\n    showCharacters.value = false;\n  }\n};\n\n// 鍏抽棴鍦扮偣寮圭獥\nconst closeLocationPopup = () => {\n  selectedLocation.value = null;\n};\n\n// 娓呴櫎鍦板浘閿欒\nconst clearMapError = () => {\n  phoneMapState.error = null;\n};\n\n// 鏄剧ず浜虹墿璇︽儏\nconst showCharacterDetail = (name: string, data: CharacterMapData) => {\n  selectedCharacter.value = {\n    name,\n    avatar: getCharacterAvatar(name),\n    location: data?.location || \'\',\n    status: data?.status || \'\',\n  };\n  showCharacters.value = false;\n  selectedLocation.value = null;\n};\n\n// 鍏抽棴浜虹墿璇︽儏\nconst closeCharacterDetail = () => {\n  selectedCharacter.value = null;\n};\n\n// 鍏抽棴鎵€鏈夊脊绐梊nconst closeAllPopups = () => {\n  closeLocationPopup();\n  closeCharacterDetail();\n  showCharacters.value = false;\n};\n\n// 鍓嶅線鍦扮偣\nconst goToLocation = () => {\n  if (selectedLocation.value) {\n    console.info(\'[Map] 鍓嶅線:\', selectedLocation.value.name);\n    closeLocationPopup();\n  }\n};\n\n// 鍙戦€佹秷鎭粰瑙掕壊\nconst sendMessageToCharacter = () => {\n  if (selectedCharacter.value) {\n    const charName = selectedCharacter.value.name;\n\n    // 浠庤亰澶╁垪琛ㄤ腑鏌ユ壘璇ヨ鑹茬殑绉佽亰\n    const privateChat = store.chat.chatList.find(\n      chat => chat.type === \'single\' && chat.name === charName\n    );\n\n    if (privateChat) {\n      // 璁剧疆褰撳墠鑱婂ぉ涓鸿瑙掕壊鐨勭鑱奬n      store.chat.activeConversationId = privateChat.id;\n      // 璺宠浆鍒拌亰澶╁簲鐢╘n      store.activeApp = \'chat\';\n      console.info(\'[Map] 璺宠浆鍒扮鑱?\', charName, privateChat.id);\n    } else {\n      console.info(\'[Map] 璇ヨ鑹叉病鏈夌鑱婅褰?\', charName);\n    }\n\n    closeCharacterDetail();\n  }\n};\n<\/script>\n\n<style scoped>\n.map-app {\n  height: calc(100% + 24px);\n  background-color: #eaf4fc;\n  position: relative;\n  padding:
