<button class="cart-del-btn" @click="removeCartItem(item.id)"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i></button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </template>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n\n      <div v-if="showCart && cartItems.length > 0" class="cart-bottom-bar">\n        <div class="cart-check" :class="{ checked: isCartAllSelected }" @click="toggleCartSelectAll">\n          <div class="check-box"><i v-if="isCartAllSelected" class="fas fa-check"></i></div>\n          <span class="cart-check-label">鍏ㄩ€?/span>\n        </div>\n        <div class="cart-total">\n          <span class="cart-total-label">鍚堣</span>\n          <span class="cart-total-price">楼{{ cartSelectedTotal.toFixed(2) }}</span>\n        </div>\n        <button class="cart-checkout-btn" :class="{ disabled: cartSelectedCount === 0 }" @click="checkoutFromCart">缁撶畻{{ cartSelectedCount > 0 ? `(${cartSelectedCount})` : \'\' }}</button>\n      </div>\n\n      \x3c!-- 搴曢儴瀵艰埅鏍?--\x3e\n      <div class="bottom-nav">\n        <div class="nav-item" :class="{ active: !showCategory && !showCart }" @click="switchMainPanel(\'home\')"><i class="fas fa-home nav-icon"></i><span class="nav-label">棣栭〉</span></div>\n        <div class="nav-item" :class="{ active: showCategory && !showCart }" @click="switchMainPanel(\'category\')"><i class="fas fa-grip nav-icon"></i><span class="nav-label">鍒嗙被</span></div>\n        <div class="nav-item sell-btn-wrap">\n          <div class="sell-btn"><i class="fas fa-tag sell-icon"></i></div>\n          <span class="nav-label">鍑哄敭</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class="nav-item pos-rel" :class="{ active: showCart }" @click="openCart"><i class="fas fa-shopping-cart nav-icon"></i><span class="nav-label">璐墿杞?/span><span v-if="cartTotalCount > 0" class="nav-badge">{{ cartTotalCount > 99 ? \'99+\' : cartTotalCount }}</span></div>\n        <div class="nav-item" @click="openMyPage"><i class="fas fa-user nav-icon"></i><span class="nav-label">鎴戠殑</span></div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 鍟嗛摵鍟嗗搧璇︽儏椤?===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'detail-shop\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <div class="overlay-search-bar"><i class="fas fa-search search-icon"></i><span class="search-placeholder-sm">鎼滅储鍟嗗搧...</span></div>\n        <i class="fas fa-share-nodes header-bell-icon"></i>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content">\n        <div v-if="isShopProductLoading" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">姝ｅ湪璇诲彇鍟嗗搧璇︽儏...</div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="showShopDetailEmpty" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-box-open home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">鏆傛棤鍟嗛摵鍟嗗搧璇︽儏鏁版嵁</div>\n          <div class="home-state-desc">鐐瑰嚮鍟嗗搧鍚庝細鑷姩鐢熸垚璇︽儏锛岃嫢澶辫触璇烽噸璇曘€?/div>\n        </div>\n        <template v-else>\n          <div class="detail-hero img-blue"><i :class="[detailShopIconName, \'detail-hero-icon\']"></i></div>\n          <div class="detail-price-section">\n            <div class="detail-price-row">\n              <span class="detail-price">{{ detailShopPrice }}</span>\n              <span v-if="detailShopOriginPrice" class="price-old">{{ detailShopOriginPrice }}</span>\n              <span v-if="detailShopPromoLabel" class="limit-badge">{{ detailShopPromoLabel }}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class="detail-title">{{ detailShopTitle }}</div>\n            <div v-if="detailShopServiceTags.length" class="tag-row mt-2">\n              <span\n                v-for="(tag, idx) in detailShopServiceTags"\n                :key="`shop-service-${idx}-${tag}`"\n                :class="[\'tag\', idx % 2 === 0 ? \'tag-blue\' : \'tag-pink\']"\n              >\n                {{ tag }}\n              </span>\n            </div>\n            <div class="seller-card glass" @click="openSellerPage(\'store\')">\n              <div class="seller-card-avatar bg-blue"><i class="fas fa-store"></i></div>\n              <div class="seller-card-info">\n                <div class="seller-card-name">{{ detailShopSellerName }}</div>\n                <div class="seller-card-desc">{{ detailShopSellerDesc }}</div>\n              </div>\n              <button class="pill-btn pill-light">杩涘簵</button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-title">鍟嗗搧浠嬬粛</div>\n            <div class="detail-desc-card glass">\n              <div class="detail-desc-text" v-html="detailShopDescriptionHtml"></div>\n              <div class="img-mask-list">\n                <div class="img-mask-wrap" v-for="(desc, i) in shopImgDescs" :key="i" @click="toggleReveal($event)">\n                  <div class="img-mask-content">{{ desc }}</div>\n                  <div class="img-mask-overlay"><i class="fas fa-image"></i><span>鐐瑰嚮鏌ョ湅鍥剧墖</span></div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-header"><span class="detail-section-title">涔板璇勮 ({{ detailShopReviewCount }})</span><span class="section-more">鏌ョ湅鍏ㄩ儴 鈫?/span></div>\n            <div class="review-list">\n              <div class="review-card" v-for="(r, i) in shopReviews" :key="i">\n                <div class="review-header">\n                  <div class="review-avatar" :style="{ background: r.bg }"><i class="fas fa-user" :style="{ color: r.color }"></i></div>\n                  <span class="review-name">{{ r.name }}</span>\n                  <div class="star-row"><i v-for="s in r.stars" :key="s" :class="s === \'half\' ? \'fas fa-star-half-alt\' : s === \'empty\' ? \'far fa-star\' : \'fas fa-star\'" class="star-icon"></i></div>\n                </div>\n                <p class="review-text">{{ r.text }}</p>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div v-if="shopReviews.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤璇勮鏁版嵁</div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-title">鐩稿叧鍟嗗搧</div>\n            <div class="related-scroll">\n              <div\n                class="related-card glass"\n                v-for="(r, i) in shopRelated"\n                :key="i"\n                @click="openDetail(resolveDetailTypeByKind(r.kind, \'shop\'), { title: r.name, price: r.price, kind: r.kind, sellerName: getDefaultSellerNameByKind(r.kind, \'shop\') })"\n              >\n                <div class="related-img" :style="{ background: r.bg }"><i :class="r.icon" class="related-icon" :style="{ color: r.color }"></i></div>\n                <div class="related-name">{{ r.name }}</div><span class="related-price">{{ r.price }}</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div v-if="shopRelated.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤鐩稿叧鍟嗗搧</div>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n      <div class="detail-bottom-bar">\n        <div class="bottom-icons">\n          <div class="bottom-icon-item"><i class="fas fa-store"></i><span>搴楅摵</span></div>\n          <div class="bottom-icon-item pos-rel" @click="openCart"><i class="fas fa-shopping-cart"></i><span>璐墿杞?/span><span v-if="cartTotalCount > 0" class="header-badge">{{ cartTotalCount > 99 ? \'99+\' : cartTotalCount }}</span></div>\n        </div>\n        <button class="btn-cart" @click="addToCartFromDetail">鍔犲叆璐墿杞?/button>\n        <button class="btn-buy" @click="buyNowFromDetail">绔嬪嵆璐拱</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 浜屾墜鍟嗗搧璇︽儏椤?===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'detail-used\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <div class="overlay-search-bar"><i class="fas fa-search search-icon"></i><span class="search-placeholder-sm">鎼滅储鍟嗗搧...</span></div>\n        <i class="fas fa-share-nodes header-bell-icon"></i>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content">\n        <div v-if="isUsedProductLoading" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">姝ｅ湪璇诲彇浜屾墜鍟嗗搧璇︽儏...</div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="showUsedDetailEmpty" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-box-open home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">鏆傛棤浜屾墜鍟嗗搧璇︽儏鏁版嵁</div>\n          <div class="home-state-desc">鐐瑰嚮鍟嗗搧鍚庝細鑷姩鐢熸垚璇︽儏锛岃嫢澶辫触璇烽噸璇曘€?/div>\n        </div>\n        <template v-else>\n          <div class="detail-hero img-blue-grad"><i :class="[detailUsedIconName, \'detail-hero-icon\']"></i></div>\n          <div class="detail-price-section">\n            <div class="detail-price-row">\n              <span class="detail-price">{{ detailUsedPrice }}</span>\n              <span v-if="detailUsedCondition" class="tag tag-blue">{{ detailUsedCondition }}</span>\n            </div>\n            <div class="detail-title">{{ detailUsedTitle }}</div>\n            <div v-if="detailUsedMeta" class="sold-text mt-1"><i class="fas fa-heart" style="color:#94A3B8;"></i> {{ detailUsedMeta }}</div>\n            <div class="seller-card glass" @click="openSellerPage(\'user\')">\n              <div class="seller-card-avatar bg-blue"><i class="fas fa-user"></i></div>\n              <div class="seller-card-info">\n                <div class="seller-card-name">{{ detailUsedSellerName }}</div>\n                <div class="seller-card-desc">{{ detailUsedSellerDesc }}</div>\n              </div>\n              <button\n                class="pill-btn pill-light"\n                @click.stop="toggleFollow(\'user\', detailUsedSellerName)"\n              >\n                {{ isFollowed(\'user\', detailUsedSellerName) ? \'宸插叧娉╘' : \'鍏虫敞\' }}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-title">鍟嗗搧浠嬬粛</div>\n            <div class="detail-desc-card glass">\n              <div class="detail-desc-text" v-html="detailUsedDescriptionHtml"></div>\n              <div class="img-mask-list">\n                <div class="img-mask-wrap" v-for="(desc, i) in usedImgDescs" :key="i" @click="toggleReveal($event)">\n                  <div class="img-mask-content">{{ desc }}</div>\n                  <div class="img-mask-overlay"><i class="fas fa-image"></i><span>鐐瑰嚮鏌ョ湅鍥剧墖</span></div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-header"><span class="detail-section-title">鐣欒█ ({{ detailUsedCommentCount }})</span><span class="section-more">鏌ョ湅鍏ㄩ儴 鈫?/span></div>\n            <div class="comment-list">\n              <div class="comment-card glass" v-for="(c, i) in usedComments" :key="i">\n                <div class="comment-buyer">\n                  <div class="review-avatar" :style="{ background: c.bg }"><i class="fas fa-user" :style="{ color: c.color }"></i></div>\n                  <div class="comment-buyer-info">\n                    <div class="comment-buyer-header"><span class="review-name">{{ c.name }}</span><span class="comment-time">{{ c.time }}</span></div>\n                    <p class="review-text">{{ c.text }}</p>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n                <div class="comment-reply">\n                  <div class="comment-reply-header"><span class="reply-label">鍗栧</span><span class="comment-time">{{ c.replyTime }}</span></div>\n                  <p class="review-text">{{ c.reply }}</p>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div v-if="usedComments.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤鐣欒█鏁版嵁</div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-title">鐩稿叧鍟嗗搧</div>\n            <div class="related-scroll">\n              <div\n                class="related-card glass"\n                v-for="(r, i) in usedRelated"\n                :key="i"\n                @click="openDetail(resolveDetailTypeByKind(r.kind, \'used\'), { title: r.name, price: r.price, kind: r.kind, sellerName: getDefaultSellerNameByKind(r.kind, \'used\') })"\n              >\n                <div class="related-img" :style="{ background: r.bg }"><i :class="r.icon" class="related-icon" :style="{ color: r.color }"></i></div>\n                <div class="related-name">{{ r.name }}</div><span class="related-price">{{ r.price }}</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div v-if="usedRelated.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤鐩稿叧鍟嗗搧</div>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n      <div class="detail-bottom-bar">\n        <div class="bottom-icons">\n          <div class="bottom-icon-item"><i class="fas fa-heart"></i><span>鎯宠</span></div>\n          <div class="bottom-icon-item pos-rel" @click="openCart"><i class="fas fa-shopping-cart"></i><span>璐墿杞?/span><span v-if="cartTotalCount > 0" class="header-badge">{{ cartTotalCount > 99 ? \'99+\' : cartTotalCount }}</span></div>\n        </div>\n        <button class="btn-cart" @click="addToCartFromDetail">鍔犲叆璐墿杞?/button>\n        <button class="btn-buy" @click="buyNowFromDetail">绔嬪嵆璐拱</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 鎼滅储缁撴灉椤?===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'search\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <div class="overlay-search-bar"><i class="fas fa-search search-icon"></i><span class="search-keyword">{{ searchKeywordDisplay }}</span></div>\n        <span class="cancel-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'">鍙栨秷</span>\n      </div>\n      <div class="search-tabs">\n        <button v-for="t in searchTabList" :key="t.key" :class="[\'s-tab\', { active: searchTab === t.key }]" @click="searchTab = t.key">{{ t.label }}</button>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content">\n        <div v-if="isSearchLoading" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">姝ｅ湪璇诲彇鎼滅储缁撴灉...</div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="showSearchEmpty" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-search home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">鏆傛棤鎼滅储鏁版嵁</div>\n          <div class="home-state-desc">鐐瑰嚮鎼滅储銆佸垎绫绘垨娲诲姩鍚庝細鑷姩鐢熸垚鎼滅储缁撴灉銆?/div>\n        </div>\n        <template v-else>\n        \x3c!-- 鍟嗗搧鎼滅储 --\x3e\n        <div v-show="searchTab === \'shop\'" class="search-result">\n          <div class="result-count">鎵惧埌 <b>{{ searchShopTotal }}</b> 浠跺晢閾哄晢鍝?/div>\n          <div class="product-grid">\n            <div class="product-card glass" v-for="(p, i) in searchShopProducts" :key="i" @click="openDetail(\'shop\', p)">\n              <div class="product-img-box" :style="{ background: p.bg }"><i :class="p.icon" class="product-icon-lg" :style="{ color: p.iconColor }"></i></div>\n              <div class="product-info">\n                <div class="product-name">{{ p.name }}</div>\n                <div class="tag-row" v-if="p.tags"><span v-for="tag in p.tags" :key="tag.text" :class="[\'tag\', tag.cls]">{{ tag.text }}</span></div>\n                <div class="price-row"><span class="price">{{ p.price }}</span><button class="add-btn" @click.stop="addToCart({ title: p.name, price: p.price, kind: p.kind, sellerName: p.sellerName, iconName: p.icon })"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button></div>\n                <div class="sold-text">{{ p.sold }}</div>\n                <div class="seller-row"><div class="seller-avatar-sm"><i :class="p.sellerIcon" :style="{ color: p.sellerColor }"></i></div><span class="seller-name">{{ p.seller }}</span></div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-if="searchShopProducts.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤鍟嗛摵鎼滅储缁撴灉</div>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 浜屾墜鎼滅储 --\x3e\n        <div v-show="searchTab === \'used\'" class="search-result">\n          <div class="result-count">鎵惧埌 <b>{{ searchUsedTotal }}</b> 浠朵簩鎵嬪晢鍝?/div>\n          <div class="product-grid">\n            <div class="product-card glass" v-for="(p, i) in searchUsedProducts" :key="i" @click="openDetail(\'used\', p)">\n              <div class="product-img-box" :style="{ background: p.bg }"><i :class="p.icon" class="product-icon-lg" :style="{ color: p.iconColor }"></i></div>\n              <div class="product-info">\n                <div class="product-name">{{ p.name }}</div>\n                <div class="tag-row"><span :class="[\'tag\', p.tagCls]">{{ p.tag }}</span></div>\n                <div class="price-row"><span class="price">{{ p.price }}</span><button class="add-btn" @click.stop="addToCart({ title: p.name, price: p.price, kind: p.kind, sellerName: p.sellerName, iconName: p.icon })"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button></div>\n                <div class="sold-text"><i class="fas fa-heart" style="color:#94A3B8;"></i> 鎯宠 {{ p.wants }}</div>\n                <div class="seller-row"><div class="seller-avatar-sm"><i class="fas fa-user" :style="{ color: p.sellerColor }"></i></div><span class="seller-name">{{ p.seller }}</span></div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-if="searchUsedProducts.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤浜屾墜鎼滅储缁撴灉</div>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 鍟嗛摵鎼滅储 --\x3e\n        <div v-show="searchTab === \'store\'" class="search-result">\n          <div class="result-count">鎵惧埌 <b>{{ searchStoreTotal }}</b> 瀹剁浉鍏冲晢閾?/div>\n          <div class="store-list">\n            <div class="store-card glass" v-for="(s, i) in searchStores" :key="i" @click="openSellerFromSearch(\'store\', s)">\n              <div class="store-logo" :style="{ background: s.logoBg }"><i class="fas fa-store store-logo-icon"></i></div>\n              <div class="store-info">\n                <div class="store-name-row"><span class="store-name">{{ s.name }}</span><span v-if="s.official" class="tag tag-blue">瀹樻柟</span></div>\n                <div class="store-desc">{{ s.desc }}</div>\n                <div class="store-stats"><span>鍟嗗搧 <b>{{ s.products }}</b></span><span>绮変笣 <b>{{ s.fans }}</b></span><span>濂借瘎 <b>{{ s.rating }}</b></span></div>\n              </div>\n              <button\n                class="pill-btn pill-light"\n                @click.stop="toggleFollow(\'store\', s.name)"\n              >\n                {{ isFollowed(\'store\', s.name) ? \'宸插叧娉╘' : \'鍏虫敞\' }}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-if="searchStores.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤鍟嗛摵鎼滅储缁撴灉</div>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 鐢ㄦ埛鎼滅储 --\x3e\n        <div v-show="searchTab === \'user\'" class="search-result">\n          <div class="result-count">鎵惧埌 <b>{{ searchUserTotal }}</b> 浣嶇浉鍏崇敤鎴?/div>\n          <div class="store-list">\n            <div class="store-card glass" v-for="(u, i) in searchUsers" :key="i" @click="openSellerFromSearch(\'user\', u)">\n              <div class="user-avatar-lg" :style="{ background: u.bg }"><i class="fas fa-user" :style="{ color: u.color }"></i></div>\n              <div class="store-info">\n                <div class="store-name">{{ u.name }}</div>\n                <div class="credit-row"><span class="credit-label">{{ u.credit }}</span><div class="credit-bar"><div class="credit-fill" :style="{ width: u.creditPct }"></div></div></div>\n                <div class="store-stats"><span>鍦ㄥ敭 <b>{{ u.selling }}</b></span><span>宸插敭 <b>{{ u.sold }}</b></span><span>绮変笣 <b>{{ u.fans }}</b></span></div>\n              </div>\n              <button\n                class="pill-btn pill-light"\n                @click.stop="toggleFollow(\'user\', u.name)"\n              >\n                {{ isFollowed(\'user\', u.name) ? \'宸插叧娉╘' : \'鍏虫敞\' }}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-if="searchUsers.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤鐢ㄦ埛鎼滅储缁撴灉</div>\n        </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 鍟嗛摵鍗栧椤?===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'shop-seller\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'detail-shop\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <div class="overlay-search-bar"><i class="fas fa-search search-icon"></i><span class="search-placeholder-sm">鍦ㄥ簵鍐呮悳绱?..</span></div>\n        <i class="fas fa-share-nodes header-bell-icon"></i>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content">\n        <div v-if="isStoreSellerLoading" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">姝ｅ湪璇诲彇鍗栧鏁版嵁...</div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="showStoreSellerEmpty" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-store-slash home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">鏆傛棤搴楅摵鍗栧鏁版嵁</div>\n          <div class="home-state-desc">鐐瑰嚮鍗栧鍚庝細鑷姩鐢熸垚搴楅摵椤碉紝鑻ュけ璐ヨ閲嶈瘯銆?/div>\n        </div>\n        <template v-else>\n          <div class="seller-cover"><i class="fas fa-store seller-cover-icon"></i></div>\n          <div class="seller-info-card-wrap">\n            <div class="seller-info-card glass">\n              <div class="seller-info-top">\n                <div class="seller-big-avatar bg-blue-grad"><i class="fas fa-store"></i></div>\n                <div class="seller-info-text">\n                  <div class="seller-info-name"><span>{{ storeSellerName }}</span><span v-if="storeSellerOfficial" class="tag tag-blue">瀹樻柟</span></div>\n                  <div class="seller-card-desc">{{ storeSellerDesc }}</div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div class="stat-row">\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ storeSellerStats.soldCount }}</span><span class="stat-label">宸插敭</span></div>\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ storeSellerStats.goodRate }}</span><span class="stat-label">濂借瘎鐜?/span></div>\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ storeSellerStats.followers }}</span><span class="stat-label">绮変笣</span></div>\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ storeSellerStats.goodsCount }}</span><span class="stat-label">鍟嗗搧</span></div>\n              </div>\n              <div class="seller-actions">\n                <button class="btn-cart" @click="toggleFollow(\'store\', storeSellerName)">\n                  {{ isFollowed(\'store\', storeSellerName) ? \'宸插叧娉╘' : \'+ 鍏虫敞\' }}\n                </button>\n                <button class="btn-buy">鑱旂郴瀹㈡湇</button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="coupon-bar">\n            <div class="coupon-icon"><i class="fas fa-percent"></i></div>\n            <div class="coupon-info"><div class="coupon-title">搴楅摵浼樻儬鍒?/div><div class="coupon-desc">{{ storeSellerCoupons }}</div></div>\n            <button class="pill-btn pill-active coupon-get">棰嗗彇</button>\n          </div>\n          <div class="seller-tabs">\n            <button\n              v-for="tab in shopSellerTabs"\n              :key="`seller-tab-${tab}`"\n              :class="[\'s-tab\', { active: shopSellerTab === tab }]"\n              @click="shopSellerTab = tab"\n            >\n              {{ getShopSellerTabLabel(tab) }}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <div class="seller-products">\n            <div class="product-grid">\n              <div\n                class="product-card glass"\n                v-for="(p, i) in shopSellerProducts"\n                :key="i"\n                @click="openDetail(resolveDetailTypeByKind(p.kind, \'shop\'), { title: p.name, sellerName: storeSellerName, price: p.price, kind: p.kind })"\n              >\n                <div class="product-img-box" :style="{ background: p.bg }"><i :class="p.icon" class="product-icon-lg" :style="{ color: p.iconColor }"></i></div>\n                <div class="product-info">\n                  <div class="product-name">{{ p.name }}</div>\n                  <div class="tag-row" v-if="p.tag"><span :class="[\'tag\', p.tagCls]">{{ p.tag }}</span></div>\n                  <div class="price-row">\n                    <div class="price-group" v-if="p.oldPrice"><span class="price">{{ p.price }}</span><span class="price-old">{{ p.oldPrice }}</span></div>\n                    <span v-else class="price">{{ p.price }}</span>\n                    <button class="add-btn" @click.stop="addToCart({ title: p.name, price: p.price, sellerName: storeSellerName, iconName: p.icon })"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>\n                  </div>\n                  <div v-if="p.sold" class="sold-text">宸插敭 {{ p.sold }}</div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div v-if="shopSellerProducts.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">褰撳墠鏍囩鏆傛棤鍟嗗搧</div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-title">搴楅摵绠€浠?/div>\n            <div class="detail-desc-card glass">\n              <p class="detail-desc-text">{{ storeSellerIntro }}</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 涓汉鍗栧椤?===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'personal-seller\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'detail-used\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <span class="overlay-title">鍗栧涓婚〉</span>\n        <div style="flex:1;"></div>\n        <i class="fas fa-ellipsis header-bell-icon"></i>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content">\n        <div v-if="isUserSellerLoading" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">姝ｅ湪璇诲彇鍗栧鏁版嵁...</div>\n        </div>\n        <div v-else-if="showUserSellerEmpty" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-user-slash home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">鏆傛棤涓汉鍗栧鏁版嵁</div>\n          <div class="home-state-desc">鐐瑰嚮鍗栧鍚庝細鑷姩鐢熸垚涓汉鍗栧椤碉紝鑻ュけ璐ヨ閲嶈瘯銆?/div>\n        </div>\n        <template v-else>\n          <div class="personal-card-wrap">\n            <div class="seller-info-card glass">\n              <div class="seller-info-top">\n                <div class="personal-avatar"><i class="fas fa-user"></i></div>\n                <div class="seller-info-text">\n                  <div class="seller-info-name">{{ personalSellerName }}</div>\n                  <div class="seller-card-desc">{{ personalSellerMeta }}</div>\n                  <div class="credit-row"><span class="credit-label">{{ personalCreditLabel }}</span><div class="credit-bar"><div class="credit-fill" :style="{ width: personalCreditPercent }"></div></div></div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <p class="personal-bio">{{ personalSellerIntro }}</p>\n              <div class="stat-row">\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ personalStats.onSale }}</span><span class="stat-label">鍦ㄥ敭</span></div>\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ personalStats.sold }}</span><span class="stat-label">宸插敭</span></div>\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ personalStats.followers }}</span><span class="stat-label">绮変笣</span></div>\n                <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">{{ personalStats.following }}</span><span class="stat-label">鍏虫敞</span></div>\n              </div>\n              <div class="seller-actions">\n                <button class="btn-cart" @click="toggleFollow(\'user\', personalSellerName)">\n                  {{ isFollowed(\'user\', personalSellerName) ? \'宸插叧娉╘' : \'+ 鍏虫敞\' }}\n                </button>\n                <button class="btn-buy">绉佽亰</button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="detail-section">\n            <div class="detail-section-header">\n              <div class="review-title-row"><span class="detail-section-title">涔板璇勪环</span><span class="rating-num">{{ personalReviewSummary }}</span></div>\n            </div>\n            <div class="review-list">\n              <div class="review-card" v-for="(r, i) in personalReviews" :key="i">\n                <div class="review-header">\n                  <div class="review-avatar" :style="{ background: r.bg }"><i class="fas fa-user" :style="{ color: r.color }"></i></div>\n                  <span class="review-name">{{ r.name }}</span><span class="comment-time">{{ r.time }}</span>\n                </div>\n                <p class="review-text">{{ r.text }}</p>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div v-if="personalReviews.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤涔板璇勪环</div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="personal-tabs">\n            <button\n              v-for="tab in personalTabs"\n              :key="`personal-tab-${tab}`"\n              :class="[\'s-tab\', { active: personalTab === tab }]"\n              @click="personalTab = tab"\n            >\n              {{ getPersonalTabLabel(tab) }}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <div class="seller-products">\n            <div v-show="personalTab === \'selling\'" class="product-grid">\n              <div\n                class="product-card glass"\n                v-for="(p, i) in personalSelling"\n                :key="i"\n                @click="openDetail(resolveDetailTypeByKind(p.kind, \'used\'), { title: p.name, sellerName: personalSellerName, price: p.price, kind: p.kind })"\n              >\n                <div class="product-img-box" :style="{ background: p.bg }"><i :class="p.icon" class="product-icon-lg" :style="{ color: p.iconColor }"></i></div>\n                <div class="product-info">\n                  <div class="product-name">{{ p.name }}</div>\n                  <div class="tag-row"><span :class="[\'tag\', p.tagCls]">{{ p.tag }}</span></div>\n                  <div class="price-row"><span class="price">{{ p.price }}</span><button class="add-btn" @click.stop="addToCart({ title: p.name, price: p.price, kind: \'used\', sellerName: personalSellerName, iconName: p.icon })"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button></div>\n                  <div v-if="p.wants" class="sold-text"><i class="fas fa-heart" style="color:#94A3B8;"></i> 鎯宠 {{ p.wants }}</div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div v-if="personalSelling.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤鍦ㄥ敭鍟嗗搧</div>\n            </div>\n            <div v-show="personalTab === \'sold\'" class="product-grid">\n              <div\n                class="product-card glass sold-card"\n                v-for="(p, i) in personalSold"\n                :key="i"\n                @click="openDetail(resolveDetailTypeByKind(p.kind, \'used\'), { title: p.name, sellerName: personalSellerName, price: p.price, kind: p.kind })"\n              >\n                <div class="product-img-box" :style="{ background: p.bg }"><i :class="p.icon" class="product-icon-lg" :style="{ color: p.iconColor, opacity: 0.5 }"></i></div>\n                <div class="product-info">\n                  <div class="product-name">{{ p.name }}</div>\n                  <div class="price-row"><span class="price-sold">{{ p.price }}</span><span class="sold-badge">{{ p.soldStatus || \'宸插敭鍑篭' }}</span></div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div v-if="personalSold.length === 0" class="section-empty-tip">鏆傛棤宸插敭鍟嗗搧</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 璐墿杞﹂〉 ===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'cart\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <span class="overlay-title">璐墿杞?/span>\n        <div style="flex:1;"></div>\n        <span v-if="cartItems.length > 0" class="cancel-btn" @click="clearCart">娓呯┖</span>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content">\n        \x3c!-- 绌虹姸鎬?--\x3e\n        <div v-if="cartItems.length === 0" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-shopping-cart home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">璐墿杞︽槸绌虹殑</div>\n          <div class="home-state-desc">鍘婚€涢€涳紝鍙戠幇鍠滄鐨勫晢鍝佸惂</div>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 鍟嗗搧鍒楄〃 --\x3e\n        <template v-else>\n          <div class="cart-list">\n            <div\n              v-for="item in cartItems"\n              :key="item.id"\n              class="cart-item glass"\n            >\n              <div class="cart-check" :class="{ checked: cartSelectedIds.has(item.id) }" @click="toggleCartSelect(item.id)">\n                <div class="check-box"><i v-if="cartSelectedIds.has(item.id)" class="fas fa-check"></i></div>\n              </div>\n              <div class="cart-item-icon" :class="item.kind === \'used\' ? \'img-pink-grad\' : \'img-blue\'">\n                <i :class="item.iconName || \'\'" class="cart-icon-inner"></i>\n              </div>\n              <div class="cart-item-info">\n                <div class="cart-item-title">{{ item.title }}</div>\n                <div class="cart-item-seller">{{ item.sellerName }}</div>\n                <div class="cart-item-bottom">\n                  <span class="price">{{ item.price }}</span>\n                  <div class="cart-qty-ctrl">\n                    <button class="qty-btn" :class="{ disabled: item.quantity <= 1 }" @click="updateCartQuantity(item.id, -1)"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></button>\n                    <span class="qty-num">{{ item.quantity }}</span>\n                    <button class="qty-btn" @click="updateCartQuantity(item.id, 1)"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <button class="cart-del-btn" @click="removeCartItem(item.id)"><i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i></button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n      \x3c!-- 搴曢儴缁撶畻鏍?--\x3e\n      <div v-if="cartItems.length > 0" class="cart-bottom-bar">\n        <div class="cart-check" :class="{ checked: isCartAllSelected }" @click="toggleCartSelectAll">\n          <div class="check-box"><i v-if="isCartAllSelected" class="fas fa-check"></i></div>\n          <span class="cart-check-label">鍏ㄩ€?/span>\n        </div>\n        <div class="cart-total">\n          <span class="cart-total-label">鍚堣</span>\n          <span class="cart-total-price">楼{{ cartSelectedTotal.toFixed(2) }}</span>\n        </div>\n        <button class="cart-checkout-btn" :class="{ disabled: cartSelectedCount === 0 }" @click="checkoutFromCart">缁撶畻{{ cartSelectedCount > 0 ? `(${cartSelectedCount})` : \'\' }}</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 璁㈠崟纭椤?===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'order\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="orderSource === \'cart\' ? openCart() : (currentView = detailContext?.bizType === \'used\' ? \'detail-used\' : \'detail-shop\')">\n          <i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i>\n        </button>\n        <span class="overlay-title">纭璁㈠崟</span>\n        <div style="flex:1;"></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content" style="gap:12px;">\n        \x3c!-- 鏀朵欢浜?--\x3e\n        <div class="order-section glass">\n          <div class="order-section-header">\n            <i class="fas fa-user order-section-icon"></i>\n            <span class="order-section-title">鏀朵欢浜?/span>\n          </div>\n          <div class="recipient-card" @click="showRecipientPicker = !showRecipientPicker">\n            <div class="recipient-avatar"><i class="fas fa-user"></i></div>\n            <div class="recipient-info">\n              <div class="recipient-name">{{ orderRecipient?.nickname || orderRecipient?.name || \'璇烽€夋嫨\' }}</div>\n              <div class="recipient-sub" v-if="orderRecipient?.nickname && orderRecipient?.name !== orderRecipient?.nickname">{{ orderRecipient.name }}</div>\n            </div>\n            <i class="fas fa-chevron-down recipient-arrow" :class="{ rotated: showRecipientPicker }"></i>\n          </div>\n          <Transition name="slide-down">\n            <div v-if="showRecipientPicker" class="recipient-list">\n              <div\n                v-for="(r, idx) in availableRecipients" :key="`rcpt-${idx}`"\n                class="recipient-option" :class="{ selected: orderRecipient?.name === r.name }"\n                @click="orderRecipient = r; showRecipientPicker = false"\n              >\n                <div class="recipient-avatar-sm"><i class="fas fa-user"></i></div>\n                <span>{{ r.nickname || r.name }}</span>\n                <span v-if="idx === 0" class="self-tag">(鎴?</span>\n                <i v-if="orderRecipient?.name === r.name" class="fas fa-check recipient-check"></i>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </Transition>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 鍟嗗搧娓呭崟 --\x3e\n        <div class="order-section glass">\n          <div class="order-section-header">\n            <i class="fas fa-box order-section-icon"></i>\n            <span class="order-section-title">鍟嗗搧娓呭崟</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class="order-item-list">\n            <div v-for="(item, idx) in orderItems" :key="`oi-${idx}`" class="order-item-row">\n              <div class="order-item-icon-box" :class="item.kind === \'used\' ? \'img-pink-grad\' : \'img-blue\'">\n                <i :class="item.iconName || \'\'" class="order-item-icon-inner"></i>\n              </div>\n              <div class="order-item-detail">\n                <div class="order-item-name">{{ item.title }}</div>\n                <div class="order-item-seller">{{ item.sellerName }}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div class="order-item-right">\n                <div class="order-item-price">{{ item.price }}</div>\n                <div class="order-item-qty">x{{ item.quantity }}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 鏀粯鏂瑰紡 --\x3e\n        <div class="order-section glass">\n          <div class="order-section-header">\n            <i class="fas fa-credit-card order-section-icon"></i>\n            <span class="order-section-title">鏀粯鏂瑰紡</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class="payment-options">\n            <div class="payment-option" :class="{ active: orderPaymentMethod === \'wechat\' }" @click="orderPaymentMethod = \'wechat\'">\n              <i class="fas fa-comment-dollar payment-icon" style="color:#7CC9A0;"></i>\n              <span>寰俊鏀粯</span>\n              <div class="payment-radio" :class="{ checked: orderPaymentMethod === \'wechat\' }"></div>\n            </div>\n            <div class="payment-option" :class="{ active: orderPaymentMethod === \'alipay\' }" @click="orderPaymentMethod = \'alipay\'">\n              <i class="fas fa-wallet payment-icon" style="color:#7EAEE8;"></i>\n              <span>鏀粯瀹?/span>\n              <div class="payment-radio" :class="{ checked: orderPaymentMethod === \'alipay\' }"></div>\n            </div>\n            <div class="payment-option" :class="{ active: orderPaymentMethod === \'bank\' }" @click="orderPaymentMethod = \'bank\'">\n              <i class="fas fa-university payment-icon" style="color:#8FB8ED;"></i>\n              <span>閾惰鍗?/span>\n              <div class="payment-radio" :class="{ checked: orderPaymentMethod === \'bank\' }"></div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \x3c!-- 浠锋牸鏄庣粏 --\x3e\n        <div class="order-section glass">\n          <div class="order-section-header">\n            <i class="fas fa-receipt order-section-icon"></i>\n            <span class="order-section-title">浠锋牸鏄庣粏</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class="price-breakdown">\n            <div class="price-line"><span>鍟嗗搧灏忚</span><span>楼{{ orderSubtotal.toFixed(2) }}</span></div>\n            <div class="price-line"><span>杩愯垂</span><span>{{ orderShipping === 0 ? \'鍏嶈繍璐筡' : `楼${orderShipping.toFixed(2)}` }}</span></div>\n            <div class="price-line total-line"><span>鍚堣</span><span class="price-total">楼{{ orderTotal.toFixed(2) }}</span></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      \x3c!-- 搴曢儴纭鏍?--\x3e\n      <div class="order-bottom-bar">\n        <div class="order-total-wrap">\n          <span class="order-total-label">闇€浠樻</span>\n          <span class="order-total-amount">楼{{ orderTotal.toFixed(2) }}</span>\n        </div>\n        <button class="order-pay-btn" @click="confirmPayment">纭浠樻</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 鏀粯鎴愬姛椤?===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'order-success\'" class="overlay-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <span class="overlay-title">鏀粯鎴愬姛</span>\n        <div style="flex:1;"></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content order-success-content">\n        <div class="success-icon-wrap">\n          <i class="fas fa-check-circle success-icon"></i>\n        </div>\n        <div class="success-title">鏀粯鎴愬姛</div>\n        <div class="success-amount">楼{{ lastOrder?.total?.toFixed(2) || \'0.00\' }}</div>\n        <div class="success-order-id">璁㈠崟鍙? {{ lastOrder?.id || \'--\' }}</div>\n        <div class="success-detail-card glass">\n          <div class="success-row"><span class="success-label">鏀朵欢浜?/span><span>{{ lastOrder?.recipient?.nickname || lastOrder?.recipient?.name || \'--\' }}</span></div>\n          <div class="success-row"><span class="success-label">鏀粯鏂瑰紡</span><span>{{ lastOrder?.paymentMethod === \'wechat\' ? \'寰俊鏀粯\' : lastOrder?.paymentMethod === \'alipay\' ? \'鏀粯瀹漒' : \'閾惰鍗' }}</span></div>\n          <div class="success-row"><span class="success-label">鍟嗗搧鏁伴噺</span><span>{{ lastOrder?.items?.reduce((s: number, i: OrderItem) => s + i.quantity, 0) || 0 }} 浠?/span></div>\n          <div class="success-row"><span class="success-label">涓嬪崟鏃堕棿</span><span>{{ lastOrder?.createdAt ? new Date(lastOrder.createdAt).toLocaleString(\'zh-CN\') : \'--\' }}</span></div>\n        </div>\n        <button class="pill-btn pill-active success-back-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'">杩斿洖棣栭〉</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    \x3c!-- ===== 鎴戠殑椤甸潰 ===== --\x3e\n    <div v-else-if="currentView === \'my\'" class="overlay-page my-page">\n      <div class="overlay-header">\n        <button class="back-btn" @click="currentView = \'main\'"><i class="fas fa-chevron-left"></i></button>\n        <span class="overlay-title">鎴戠殑</span>\n        <div style="flex:1;"></div>\n      </div>\n      <div class="scroll-content" style="gap:12px;">\n        \x3c!-- 鐢ㄦ埛淇℃伅鍗＄墖 --\x3e\n        <div class="my-profile-card glass">\n          <div class="my-avatar"><i class="fas fa-user"></i></div>\n          <div class="my-profile-info">\n            <div class="my-name">{{ myUserInfo.nickname || myUserInfo.name }}</div>\n            <div class="my-sub" v-if="myUserInfo.nickname && myUserInfo.nickname !== myUserInfo.name">{{ myUserInfo.name }}</div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        \x3c!-- Tab 鍒囨崲 --\x3e\n        <div class="my-tabs glass">\n          <div class="my-tab" :class="{ active: myTab === \'orders\' }" @click="myTab = \'orders\'">\n            <i class="fas fa-receipt my-tab-icon"></i>\n            <span>璁㈠崟</span>\n            <span v-if="myOrders.length" class="my-tab-count">{{ myOrders.length }}</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class="my-tab" :class="{ active: myTab === \'footprints\' }" @click="myTab = \'footprints\'">\n            <i class="fas fa-shoe-prints my-tab-icon"></i>\n            <span>瓒宠抗</span>\n            <span v-if="myFootprints.length" class="my-tab-count">{{ myFootprints.length }}</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class="my-tab" :class="{ active: myTab === \'followings\' }" @click="myTab = \'followings\'">\n            <i class="fas fa-heart my-tab-icon"></i>\n            <span>鍏虫敞</span>\n            <span v-if="shopFollowings.length" class="my-tab-count">{{ shopFollowings.length }}</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        \x3c!-- 鍔犺浇涓?--\x3e\n        <div v-if="isMyLoading" class="home-state-card glass">\n          <i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin home-state-icon"></i>\n          <div class="home-state-title">姝ｅ湪鍔犺浇...</div>\n        </div>\n\n        \x3c!-- 璁㈠崟鍒楄〃 --\x3e\n        <template v-else-if="myTab === \'orders\'">\n          <div v-if="myOrders.length === 0" class="my-empty glass">\n            <i class="fas fa-receipt my-empty-icon"></i>\n            <div class="my-empty-text">鏆傛棤璁㈠崟璁板綍</div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-for="(order, idx) in myOrders" :key="`mo-${idx}`" class="my-order-card glass">\n            <div class="my-order-header">\n              <span class="my-order-id">{{ order.id }}</span>\n              <span class="my-order-status">宸蹭粯娆?/span>\n            </div>\n            <div class="my-order-items">\n              <div v-for="(item, iIdx) in order.items" :key="`moi-${idx}-${iIdx}`" class="my-order-item">\n                <div class="my-order-item-icon" :class="item.kind === \'used\' ? \'img-pink-grad\' : \'img-blue\'">\n                  <i :class="item.iconName || \'\'" class="my-order-item-icon-inner"></i>\n                </div>\n                <div class="my-order-item-info">\n                  <div class="my-order-item-name">{{ item.title }}</div>\n                  <div class="my-order-item-seller">{{ item.sellerName }}</div>\n                </div>\n                <div class="my-order-item-right">\n                  <span class="my-order-item-price">{{ item.price }}</span>\n                  <span class="my-order-item-qty">x{{ item.quantity }}</span>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class="my-order-footer">\n              <span class="my-order-time">{{ formatOrderTime(order.createdAt) }}</span>\n              <span class="my-order-pay">{{ getPaymentLabel(order.paymentMethod) }}</span>\n              <span class="my-order-recipient">鏀朵欢浜? {{ order.recipient?.nickname || order.recipient?.name || \'--\' }}</span>\n              <span class="my-order-total">楼{{ (order.total || 0).toFixed(2) }}</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n\n        \x3c!-- 娴忚瓒宠抗 --\x3e\n        <template v-else-if="myTab === \'footprints\'">\n          <div v-if="myFootprints.length === 0" class="my-empty glass">\n            <i class="fas fa-shoe-prints my-empty-icon"></i>\n            <div class="my-empty-text">鏆傛棤娴忚瓒宠抗</div>\n          </div>\n          <div class="product-grid">\n            <div\n              v-for="(fp, idx) in myFootprints" :key="`fp-${idx}`"\n              class="product-card glass"\n              @click="openDetail(fp.kind === \'used\' ? \'used\' : \'shop\', { title: fp.title, price: fp.price, kind: fp.kind, sellerName: fp.sellerName })"\n            >\n              <div class="product-img-box" :class="fp.kind === \'used\' ? \'img-pink-grad\' : \'img-blue\'">\n                <i :class="[fp.iconName || \'\', \'product-icon-lg\', { \'icon-pink\': fp.kind === \'used\' }]"></i>\n              </div>\n              <div class="product-info">\n                <div class="product-name">{{ fp.title }}</div>\n                <div class="price-row">\n                  <span class="price">{{ fp.price }}</span>\n                </div>\n                <div class="seller-row">\n                  <div class="seller-avatar-sm"><i :class="fp.kind === \'used\' ? \'fas fa-user\' : \'fas fa-store\'" style="font-size:8px;" :style="{ color: fp.kind === \'used\' ? \'#FFC8DD\' : \'#8FB8ED\' }"></i></div>\n                  <span class="seller-name">{{ fp.sellerName }}</span>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n\n        \x3c!-- 鍏虫敞鍒楄〃 --\x3e\n        <template v-else-if="myTab === \'followings\'">\n          <div v-if="shopFollowings.length === 0" class="my-empty glass">\n            <i class="fas fa-heart my-empty-icon"></i>\n            <div class="my-empty-text">鏆傛棤鍏虫敞</div>\n          </div>\n          <div v-for="(f, idx) in shopFollowings" :key="`mf-${idx}`" class="my-follow-card glass" @click="openSellerFromFollowing(f.type, f.name)">\n            <div class="my-follow-avatar" :class="f.type === \'store\' ? \'bg-blue\' : \'bg-pink\'">\n              <i :class="f.type === \'store\' ? \'fas fa-store\' : \'fas fa-user\'"></i>\n            </div>\n            <div class="my-follow-info">\n              <div class="my-follow-name">{{ f.name }}</div>\n              <div class="my-follow-type">{{ f.type === \'store\' ? \'搴楅摵\' : \'涓汉鍗栧\' }}</div>\n            </div>\n            <button class="pill-btn pill-light my-follow-btn" @click.stop="toggleFollow(f.type, f.name)">鍙栨秷鍏虫敞</button>\n          </div>\n        </template>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</template>\n\n<script setup lang="ts">\nimport { computed, onMounted, reactive, ref, watch } from \'vue\';\nimport _ from \'lodash\';\nimport {\n  abortCurrentRequest,\n  loadAllModuleFromHistory,\n  loadShoppingHomeDataFromHistory,\n  saveToTavernMessage,\n  shoppingHomeState,\n  store,\n  type ShopCategoryItem,\n  type ShopHomeDataState,\n  type ShopHomeItem,\n  type ShopUsedItem,\n} from \'../../store\';\n\ntype ViewKey = \'main\' | \'detail-shop\' | \'detail-used\' | \'search\' | \'shop-seller\' | \'personal-seller\' | \'cart\' | \'order\' | \'order-success\' | \'my\';\n\ntype CartItem = {\n  id: string;\n  title: string;\n  price: string;\n  kind: string;\n  sellerName: string;\n  iconName?: string;\n  quantity: number;\n  addedAt: number;\n};\n\ntype OrderItem = {\n  title: string;\n  price: string;\n  kind: string;\n  sellerName: string;\n  iconName?: string;\n  quantity: number;\n};\n\ntype Order = {\n  id: string;\n  items: OrderItem[];\n  recipient: { name: string; nickname?: string };\n  paymentMethod: string;\n  subtotal: number;\n  shipping: number;\n  total: number;\n  status: string;\n  createdAt: number;\n};\ntype Tone = \'blue\' | \'pink\';\ntype SearchTabKey = \'shop\' | \'used\' | \'store\' | \'user\';\ntype SellerTabKey = \'all\' | \'hot\' | \'new\' | \'sale\';\ntype PersonalTabKey = \'selling\' | \'sold\';\ntype SearchSource = \'search\' | \'category\' | \'activity\';\ntype ShopFollowingType = \'store\' | \'user\';\n\ntype ShopFollowingItem = {\n  type: ShopFollowingType;\n  name: string;\n};\n\ntype ShopCardView = {\n  title: string;\n  price: string;\n  originPrice: string;\n  soldText: string;\n  sellerName: string;\n  kind: string;\n  tags: string[];\n  imageClass: string;\n  iconName: string;\n  iconPink: boolean;\n  sellerIconClass: string;\n};\n\ntype UsedCardView = {\n  title: string;\n  price: string;\n  conditionLabel: string;\n  wantText: string;\n  sellerName: string;\n  kind: string;\n  imageClass: string;\n  iconName: string;\n  iconPink: boolean;\n  sellerIconClass: string;\n};\n\ntype CategoryCardView = {\n  name: string;\n  iconName: string;\n  bg: string;\n  color: string;\n};\n\ntype DetailContext = {\n  bizType: \'shop\' | \'used\';\n  title: string;\n  sellerName: string;\n  price: string;\n  kind: string;\n};\n\ntype SellerContext = {\n  sellerType: \'store\' | \'user\';\n  sellerName: string;\n  sourceTitle: string;\n  sourceKind: string;\n};\n\ntype PageState<T> = {\n  isLoading: boolean;\n  loaded: boolean;\n  error: string | null;\n  data: T | null;\n};\n\ntype ShopProductRecord = {\n  bizType?: string;\n  title?: string;\n  sellerName?: string;\n  iconName?: string;\n  price?: number | string;\n  description?: string;\n  images?: string[];\n  relatedItems?: Array<{\n    title?: string;\n    price?: number | string;\n    kind?: string;\n    iconName?: string;\n  }>;\n  kind?: string;\n  shopFields?: {\n    originPrice?: number | string;\n    promoLabel?: string;\n    serviceTags?: string[];\n    storeMetrics?: {\n      soldCount?: number | string;\n      goodRate?: number | string;\n    };\n    reviewsSummary?: {\n      total?: number | string;\n    };\n    reviews?: Array<{\n      userName?: string;\n      rating?: number | string;\n      content?: string;\n    }>;\n  };\n  usedFields?: {\n    conditionLabel?: string;\n    wantCount?: number | string;\n    viewCount?: number | string;\n    messageBoard?: Array<{\n      buyer?: string;\n      c?: string;\n      reply?: string;\n      time?: string;\n      replyTime?: string;\n    }>;\n    tradeInfo?: string;\n  };\n};\n\ntype ShopSellerRecord = {\n  sellerType?: string;\n  type?: string;\n  name?: string;\n  intro?: string;\n  storeFields?: {\n    official?: boolean | string;\n    businessScope?: string;\n    stats?: {\n      soldCount?: number | string;\n      goodRate?: number | string;\n      followers?: number | string;\n      goodsCount?: number | string;\n    };\n    couponInfo?: string[];\n    tabs?: string[];\n    goodsByTab?: Record<string, Array<{ title?: string; price?: number | string; kind?: string; iconName?: string }>>;\n  };\n  userFields?: {\n    profile?: {\n      city?: string;\n      joinedMonths?: number | string;\n      creditLabel?: string;\n      creditScorePercent?: number | string;\n    };\n    stats?: {\n      onSale?: number | string;\n      sold?: number | string;\n      followers?: number | string;\n      following?: number | string;\n    };\n    buyerReviews?: Array<{\n      userName?: string;\n      content?: string;\n    }>;\n    tabs?: string[];\n    sellingItems?: Array<{ title?: string; price?: number | string; kind?: string; iconName?: string }>;\n    soldItems?: Array<{ title?: string; price?: number | string; kind?: string; soldStatus?: string; iconName?: string }>;\n  };\n};\n\ntype ShopSearchRecord = {\n  keyword?: string;\n  tabs?: {\n    shop?: { total?: number | string; items?: Array<{ title?: string; price?: number | string; kind?: string; iconName?: string }> };\n    used?: { total?: number | string; items?: Array<{ title?: string; price?: number | string; kind?: string; iconName?: string }> };\n    store?: {\n      total?: number | string;\n      items?: Array<{\n        name?: string;\n        official?: boolean | string;\n        categoriesText?: string;\n        goodsCount?: number | string;\n        followers?: number | string;\n        goodRate?: number | string;\n        type?: string;\n      }>;\n    };\n    user?: {\n      total?: number | string;\n      items?: Array<{\n        name?: string;\n        creditLabel?: string;\n        creditScorePercent?: number | string;\n        onSaleCount?: number | string;\n        soldCount?: number | string;\n        followers?: number | string;\n        type?: string;\n      }>;\n    };\n  };\n};\n\nconst currentView = ref<ViewKey>(\'main\');\nconst mainTab = ref<\'shop\' | \'used\'>(\'shop\');\nconst isRefreshing = ref(false);\nconst showCategory = ref(false);\nconst showCart = ref(false);\nconst homeSearchInput = ref(\'\');\nconst searchKeyword = ref(\'\');\nconst searchSource = ref<SearchSource>(\'search\');\nconst searchTab = ref<SearchTabKey>(\'shop\');\nconst shopSellerTab = ref<SellerTabKey>(\'all\');\nconst personalTab = ref<PersonalTabKey>(\'selling\');\nconst detailContext = ref<DetailContext | null>(null);\nconst sellerContext = ref<SellerContext | null>(null);\nconst isActionLoading = ref(false);\nconst actionLoadingText = ref(\'\');\nconst viewError = ref<string | null>(null);\n\nconst searchTabList = [\n  { key: \'shop\' as SearchTabKey, label: \'鍟嗗搧\' },\n  { key: \'used\' as SearchTabKey, label: \'浜屾墜\' },\n  { key: \'store\' as SearchTabKey, label: \'鍟嗛摵\' },\n  { key: \'user\' as SearchTabKey, label: \'鐢ㄦ埛\' },\n];\n\nconst CATEGORY_VISUALS = [\n  { bg: \'rgba(143,184,237,0.12)\', color: \'#8FB8ED\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(255,200,221,0.15)\', color: \'#FF8FAB\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(143,184,237,0.12)\', color: \'#8FB8ED\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(255,200,221,0.15)\', color: \'#FF8FAB\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(143,184,237,0.12)\', color: \'#8FB8ED\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(255,200,221,0.15)\', color: \'#FF8FAB\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(143,184,237,0.12)\', color: \'#8FB8ED\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(255,200,221,0.15)\', color: \'#FF8FAB\' },\n];\n\nconst COLOR_POOL = [\n  { bg: \'rgba(255,200,221,0.2)\', color: \'#FFC8DD\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(143,184,237,0.15)\', color: \'#8FB8ED\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(255,179,198,0.2)\', color: \'#FF8FAB\' },\n  { bg: \'rgba(168,212,240,0.18)\', color: \'#7AA8E0\' },\n];\n\nconst RESULT_BG_POOL = [\n  \'rgba(143,184,237,0.08)\',\n  \'rgba(255,200,221,0.12)\',\n  \'rgba(143,184,237,0.1)\',\n  \'rgba(255,200,221,0.1)\',\n];\n\nconst STORE_LOGO_BG_POOL = [\n  \'linear-gradient(135deg,#8FB8ED,#7AA8E0)\',\n  \'linear-gradient(135deg,#FFC8DD,#FFB3C6)\',\n  \'linear-gradient(135deg,#8FB8ED,#A8D4F0)\',\n  \'linear-gradient(135deg,#FFB3C6,#FFC8DD)\',\n];\n\nconst SHOP_SELLER_TAB_LABELS: Record<SellerTabKey, string> = {\n  all: \'鍏ㄩ儴\',\n  hot: \'鐑攢\',\n  new: \'鏂板搧\',\n  sale: \'浼樻儬\',\n};\n\nconst PERSONAL_TAB_LABELS: Record<PersonalTabKey, string> = {\n  selling: \'鍦ㄥ敭\',\n  sold: \'宸插敭\',\n};\n\nfunction toText(value: unknown): string {\n  if (value == null) return \'\';\n  return String(value).trim();\n}\n\nfunction toPrice(value: unknown): string {\n  const text = toText(value);\n  if (!text) return \'楼0\';\n  return text.startsWith(\'楼\') ? text : `楼${text}`;\n}\n\nfunction toOptionalPrice(value: unknown): string {\n  const text = toText(value);\n  if (!text) return \'\';\n  return text.startsWith(\'楼\') ? text : `楼${text}`;\n}\n\nfunction toTags(value: unknown): string[] {\n  if (!Array.isArray(value)) return [];\n  return value.map(item => toText(item)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 4);\n}\n\nfunction trimTrailingZeros(text: string): string {\n  return text.replace(/(\\.\\d*?[1-9])0+$/, \'$1\').replace(/\\.0+$/, \'\');\n}\n\nfunction parseDisplayNumber(value: unknown): number | null {\n  if (typeof value === \'number\' && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;\n  const raw = toText(value);\n  if (!raw) return null;\n  const normalized = raw.replace(/,/g, \'\');\n  if (!/^-?\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n  const parsed = Number(normalized);\n  return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;\n}\n\nfunction formatK(value: number): string {\n  if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return \'\';\n  if (Math.abs(value) < 1000) {\n    return trimTrailingZeros(String(value));\n  }\n  return `${trimTrailingZeros((value / 1000).toFixed(1))}k`;\n}\n\nfunction formatCountText(value: unknown, fallback = \'\'): string {\n  const parsed = parseDisplayNumber(value);\n  if (parsed == null) {\n    const rawText = toText(value);\n    return rawText || fallback;\n  }\n  return formatK(parsed);\n}\n\nfunction toMetricCount(prefix: string, value: unknown): string {\n  const text = formatCountText(value);\n  if (!text) return \'\';\n  return `${prefix} ${text}`;\n}\n\nfunction toBoolean(value: unknown): boolean {\n  if (typeof value === \'boolean\') return value;\n  const text = toText(value).toLowerCase();\n  return text === \'true\' || text === \'1\' || text === \'yes\';\n}\n\nfunction toPercentText(value: unknown, fallback = \'--\'): string {\n  const text = toText(value);\n  if (!text) return fallback;\n  return text.includes(\'%\') ? text : `${text}%`;\n}\n\nfunction normalizeIconName(value: unknown): string {\n  return toText(value).replace(/\\s+/g, \' \');\n}\n\nfunction normalizeCategoryItems(value: unknown): Array<{ name: string; iconName: string }> {\n  if (!Array.isArray(value)) return [];\n  const rows: Array<{ name: string; iconName: string }> = [];\n  for (const item of value) {\n    const row = item as ShopCategoryItem | null;\n    const name = toText(row?.name);\n    const iconName = normalizeIconName(row?.iconName);\n    if (!name || !iconName) continue;\n    rows.push({ name, iconName });\n  }\n  return rows;\n}\n\nfunction normalizeTextList(value: unknown): string[] {\n  if (!Array.isArray(value)) return [];\n  return value.map(item => toText(item)).filter(Boolean);\n}\n\nfunction escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \'&amp;\')\n    .replace(/</g, \'&lt;\')\n    .replace(/>/g, \'&gt;\')\n    .replace(/"/g, \'&quot;\')\n    .replace(/\'/g, \'&#39;\');\n}\n\nfunction renderInlineSafeMarkdown(text: string): string {\n  const inlineCodes: string[] = [];\n  let rendered = text.replace(/`([^`\\n]+)`/g, (_match, code) => {\n    const tokenIndex = inlineCodes.length;\n    inlineCodes.push(`<code>${code}</code>`);\n    return `@@SHOP_MD_INLINE_${tokenIndex}@@`;\n  });\n\n  rendered = rendered.replace(/\\*\\*([^*]+?)\\*\\*/g, \'<strong>$1</strong>\');\n\n  rendered = rendered.replace(/@@SHOP_MD_INLINE_(\\d+)@@/g, (_match, indexText) => {\n    const index = Number(indexText);\n    return inlineCodes[index] ?? \'\';\n  });\n\n  return rendered;\n}\n\nfunction renderSafeMarkdown(raw: unknown): string {\n  const text = toText(raw);\n  if (!text) return \'\';\n\n  const escaped = escapeHtml(text).replace(/\\r\\n?/g, \'\\n\');\n  const codeBlocks: string[] = [];\n  const markdown = escaped.replace(/```[^\\n`]*\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```/g, (_match, code) => {\n    const tokenIndex = codeBlocks.length;\n    codeBlocks.push(`<pre><code>${code}</code></pre>`);\n    return `@@SHOP_MD_BLOCK_${tokenIndex}@@`;\n  });\n\n  const lines = markdown.split(\'\\n\');\n  const htmlParts: string[] = [];\n  const paragraphLines: string[] = [];\n  let inUl = false;\n  let inOl = false;\n\n  const closeLists = () => {\n    if (inUl) {\n      htmlParts.push(\'</ul>\');\n      inUl = false;\n    }\n    if (inOl) {\n      htmlParts.push(\'</ol>\');\n      inOl = false;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const flushParagraph = () => {\n    if (paragraphLines.length === 0) return;\n    closeLists();\n    htmlParts.push(`<p>${paragraphLines.join(\'<br>\')}</p>`);\n    paragraphLines.length = 0;\n  };\n\n  for (const row of lines) {\n    const line = row.trimEnd();\n    const trimmed = line.trim();\n\n    if (/^@@SHOP_MD_BLOCK_\\d+@@$/.test(trimmed)) {\n      flushParagraph();\n      closeLists();\n      htmlParts.push(trimmed);\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const h3 = trimmed.match(/^###\\s+(.+)$/);\n    if (h3) {\n      flushParagraph();\n      closeLists();\n      htmlParts.push(`<h3>${renderInlineSafeMarkdown(h3[1])}</h3>`);\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const h2 = trimmed.match(/^##\\s+(.+)$/);\n    if (h2) {\n      flushParagraph();\n      closeLists();\n      htmlParts.push(`<h2>${renderInlineSafeMarkdown(h2[1])}</h2>`);\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const h1 = trimmed.match(/^#\\s+(.+)$/);\n    if (h1) {\n      flushParagraph();\n      closeLists();\n      htmlParts.push(`<h1>${renderInlineSafeMarkdown(h1[1])}</h1>`);\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const unorderedItem = trimmed.match(/^-\\s+(.+)$/);\n    if (unorderedItem) {\n      flushParagraph();\n      if (inOl) {\n        htmlParts.push(\'</ol>\');\n        inOl = false;\n      }\n      if (!inUl) {\n        htmlParts.push(\'<ul>\');\n        inUl = true;\n      }\n      htmlParts.push(`<li>${renderInlineSafeMarkdown(unorderedItem[1])}</li>`);\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    const orderedItem = trimmed.match(/^\\d+\\.\\s+(.+)$/);\n    if (orderedItem) {\n      flushParagraph();\n      if (inUl) {\n        htmlParts.push(\'</ul>\');\n        inUl = false;\n      }\n      if (!inOl) {\n        htmlParts.push(\'<ol>\');\n        inOl = true;\n      }\n      htmlParts.push(`<li>${renderInlineSafeMarkdown(orderedItem[1])}</li>`);\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    if (!trimmed) {\n      flushParagraph();\n      closeLists();\n      continue;\n    }\n\n    closeLists();\n    paragraphLines.push(renderInlineSafeMarkdown(trimmed));\n  }\n\n  flushParagraph();\n  closeLists();\n\n  const html = htmlParts.join(\'\');\n  return html.replace(/@@SHOP_MD_BLOCK_(\\d+)@@/g, (_match, indexText) => {\n    const index = Number(indexText);\n    return codeBlocks[index] ?? \'\';\n  });\n}\n\nfunction normalizeMatchText(value: unknown): string {\n  return toText(value)\n    .normalize(\'NFKC\')\n    .replace(/[\\s\\u3000]+/g, \' \')\n    .replace(/[銆愩€慬\\]锛堬級()銆屻€嶃€庛€忋€娿€?>"\'鈥溾€濃€樷€橾/g, \'\')\n    .trim()\n    .toLowerCase();\n}\n\nfunction normalizeBizType(value: unknown): \'shop\' | \'used\' | \'\' {\n  const text = normalizeMatchText(value);\n  if ([\'shop\', \'store\', \'official\', \'mall\', \'瀹樻柟\', \'鍟嗗煄\', \'搴楅摵\', \'鍟嗛摵\', \'鏂板搧\', \'鍟嗗搧\'].includes(text)) return \'shop\';\n  if ([\'used\', \'secondhand\', \'second hand\', \'浜屾墜\', \'闂茬疆\', \'涓汉\', \'涓汉鍗栧\'].includes(text)) return \'used\';\n  return \'\';\n}\n\nfunction normalizeSellerType(value: unknown): \'store\' | \'user\' | \'\' {\n  const text = normalizeMatchText(value);\n  if ([\'store\', \'shop\', \'official\', \'mall\', \'瀹樻柟\', \'搴楅摵\', \'鍟嗛摵\', \'鍟嗗\'].includes(text)) return \'store\';\n  if ([\'user\', \'personal\', \'person\', \'used\', \'浜屾墜\', \'涓汉\', \'涓汉鍗栧\', \'闂茬疆鍗栧\'].includes(text)) return \'user\';\n  return \'\';\n}\n\nfunction stableShopHistoryKey(...parts: unknown[]): string {\n  return parts.map(part => normalizeMatchText(part)).filter(Boolean).join(\'::\');\n}\n\nfunction normalizeFollowType(value: unknown): ShopFollowingType | \'\' {\n  const type = normalizeSellerType(value);\n  return type === \'store\' || type === \'user\' ? type : \'\';\n}\n\nfunction normalizeFollowName(value: unknown): string {\n  return toText(value).replace(/\\s+/g, \' \').toLowerCase();\n}\n\nfunction normalizeFollowingItem(value: unknown): ShopFollowingItem | null {\n  if (!value || typeof value !== \'object\') return null;\n  const row = value as { type?: unknown; name?: unknown };\n  const type = normalizeFollowType(row.type);\n  const name = toText(row.name).replace(/\\s+/g, \' \');\n  if (!type || !name) return null;\n  return { type, name };\n}\n\nfunction dedupeFollowings(items: ShopFollowingItem[]): ShopFollowingItem[] {\n  const next: ShopFollowingItem[] = [];\n  const seen = new Set<string>();\n  for (const row of items) {\n    const type = normalizeFollowType(row.type);\n    const name = toText(row.name).replace(/\\s+/g, \' \');\n    const normalizedName = normalizeFollowName(name);\n    if (!type || !normalizedName) continue;\n    const key = `${type}::${normalizedName}`;\n    if (seen.has(key)) continue;\n    seen.add(key);\n    next.push({ type, name });\n  }\n  return next;\n}\n\nfunction resolveDetailTypeByKind(kind: unknown, fallback: \'shop\' | \'used\'): \'shop\' | \'used\' {\n  const bizType = normalizeBizType(kind);\n  if (bizType) return bizType;\n\n  const text = normalizeMatchText(kind);\n  if (text === \'used\' || text === \'浜屾墜\') return \'used\';\n  if (text === \'shop\' || text === \'official\' || text === \'瀹樻柟\') return \'shop\';\n  return fallback;\n}\n\nfunction getDefaultSellerNameByKind(kind: unknown, fallback: \'shop\' | \'used\'): string {\n  return resolveDetailTypeByKind(kind, fallback) === \'used\' ? \'涓汉鍗栧\' : \'瀹樻柟搴楅摵\';\n}\n\nfunction normalizeImageDescriptions(value: unknown): string[] {\n  return normalizeTextList(value).slice(0, 5);\n}\n\nfunction hasValidImageDescriptions(images: string[]): boolean {\n  return images.length >= 3 && images.length <= 5;\n}\n\nfunction normalizeShopProductRecord(raw: unknown): ShopProductRecord | null {\n  if (!raw || typeof raw !== \'object\') return null;\n\n  const source = raw as ShopProductRecord;\n  const bizType = normalizeBizType(source.bizType);\n  if (!bizType) return null;\n\n  const normalized: ShopProductRecord = {\n    ...source,\n    bizType,\n    images: normalizeImageDescriptions(source.images),\n    shopFields: source.shopFields && typeof source.shopFields === \'object\' ? { ...source.shopFields } : undefined,\n    usedFields: source.usedFields && typeof source.usedFields === \'object\' ? { ...source.usedFields } : undefined,\n  };\n\n  if (!hasValidImageDescriptions(normalized.images)) return null;\n\n  return normalized;\n}\n\nfunction ratingToStars(value: unknown): Array<\'full\' | \'half\' | \'empty\'> {\n  const rating = Math.max(0, Math.min(5, Number.parseFloat(toText(value)) || 0));\n  const stars: Array<\'full\' | \'half\' | \'empty\'> = [];\n  for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {\n    if (rating >= i) {\n      stars.push(\'full\');\n    } else if (rating >= i - 0.5) {\n      stars.push(\'half\');\n    } else {\n      stars.push(\'empty\');\n    }\n  }\n  return stars;\n}\n\nfunction getTone(index: number): Tone {\n  return index % 2 === 0 ? \'blue\' : \'pink\';\n}\n\nfunction getShopImageClass(section: \'flash\' | \'recommend\', tone: Tone): string {\n  if (section === \'flash\') return tone === \'blue\' ? \'img-blue\' : \'img-pink\';\n  return tone === \'blue\' ? \'img-blue-grad\' : \'img-pink-grad\';\n}\n\nfunction getUsedImageClass(tone: Tone): string {\n  return tone === \'blue\' ? \'img-blue-grad\' : \'img-pink-grad\';\n}\n\nfunction getSellerIconClass(sellerType: string, tone: Tone): string {\n  const isStore = sellerType === \'store\';\n  const baseClass = isStore ? \'fas fa-store\' : \'fas fa-user\';\n  const toneClass = tone === \'blue\' ? \'seller-icon-blue\' : \'seller-icon-pink\';\n  return `${baseClass} ${toneClass}`;\n}\n\nfunction getTagClass(index: number): \'tag-blue\' | \'tag-pink\' {\n  return index % 2 === 0 ? \'tag-blue\' : \'tag-pink\';\n}\n\nfunction mapShopCards(items: ShopHomeItem[] | undefined, section: \'flash\' | \'recommend\'): ShopCardView[] {\n  if (!Array.isArray(items)) return [];\n  const rows: ShopCardView[] = [];\n  items.forEach((item, index) => {\n    const iconName = normalizeIconName(item?.iconName);\n    if (!iconName) return;\n    const tone = getTone(index);\n    const sellerType = toText(item?.seller?.type).toLowerCase() === \'user\' ? \'user\' : \'store\';\n    const sellerName = toText(item?.seller?.name) || (sellerType === \'user\' ? \'涓汉鍗栧\' : \'瀹樻柟搴楅摵\');\n    rows.push({\n      title: toText(item?.title) || \'鏈懡鍚嶅晢鍝乗',\n      price: toPrice(item?.price),\n      originPrice: toText(item?.originPrice) ? toPrice(item?.originPrice) : \'\',\n      soldText: toMetricCount(\'宸插敭\', item?.soldCount),\n      sellerName,\n      kind: toText(item?.kind) || (sellerType === \'user\' ? \'used\' : \'official\'),\n      tags: toTags(item?.tags),\n      imageClass: getShopImageClass(section, tone),\n      iconName,\n      iconPink: tone === \'pink\',\n      sellerIconClass: getSellerIconClass(sellerType, tone),\n    });\n  });\n  return rows;\n}\n\nfunction mapUsedCards(items: ShopUsedItem[] | undefined): UsedCardView[] {\n  if (!Array.isArray(items)) return [];\n  const rows: UsedCardView[] = [];\n  items.forEach((item, index) => {\n    const iconName = normalizeIconName(item?.iconName);\n    if (!iconName) return;\n    const tone = getTone(index);\n    const sellerType = toText(item?.seller?.type).toLowerCase() === \'store\' ? \'store\' : \'user\';\n    const sellerName = toText(item?.seller?.name) || (sellerType === \'store\' ? \'瀹樻柟搴楅摵\' : \'涓汉鍗栧\');\n    rows.push({\n      title: toText(item?.title) || \'鏈懡鍚嶄簩鎵嬪晢鍝乗',\n      price: toPrice(item?.price),\n      conditionLabel: toText(item?.conditionLabel),\n      wantText: toMetricCount(\'鎯宠\', item?.wantCount),\n      sellerName,\n      kind: toText(item?.kind) || (sellerType === \'store\' ? \'official\' : \'used\'),\n      imageClass: getUsedImageClass(tone),\n      iconName,\n      iconPink: tone === \'pink\',\n      sellerIconClass: getSellerIconClass(sellerType, tone),\n    });\n  });\n  return rows;\n}\n\nconst homeData = computed<ShopHomeDataState | null>(() => shoppingHomeState.data);\nconst bannerTitle = computed(() => toText(homeData.value?.shopHome?.banner?.title));\nconst bannerSubtitle = computed(() => toText(homeData.value?.shopHome?.banner?.subtitle));\nconst categoryItems = computed(() => normalizeCategoryItems(homeData.value?.categoryPanel?.allCategories));\nconst categoryNames = computed(() => categoryItems.value.map(item => item.name));\n\nconst flashDealsCards = computed(() => mapShopCards(homeData.value?.shopHome?.flashDeals, \'flash\'));\nconst recommendCards = computed(() => mapShopCards(homeData.value?.shopHome?.recommendList, \'recommend\'));\nconst usedCards = computed(() => mapUsedCards(homeData.value?.usedHome?.list));\n\nconst categoryCards = computed<CategoryCardView[]>(() => {\n  return categoryItems.value.map((item, index) => {\n    const visual = CATEGORY_VISUALS[index % CATEGORY_VISUALS.length];\n    return {\n      name: item.name,\n      iconName: item.iconName,\n      bg: visual.bg,\n      color: visual.color,\n    };\n  });\n});\n\nconst shopCategoryPills = computed(() => categoryNames.value.slice(0, 8));\nconst usedCategoryPills = computed(() => normalizeTextList(homeData.value?.usedHome?.categories).slice(0, 8));\n\nconst isHomeLoading = computed(() => shoppingHomeState.isLoading && !shoppingHomeState.loaded);\nconst showHomeEmpty = computed(() => shoppingHomeState.loaded && !shoppingHomeState.isLoading && !shoppingHomeState.data);\n\nconst shopProductState = reactive<PageState<ShopProductRecord>>({\n  isLoading: false,\n  loaded: false,\n  error: null,\n  data: null,\n});\n\nconst usedProductState = reactive<PageState<ShopProductRecord>>({\n  isLoading: false,\n  loaded: false,\n  error: null,\n  data: null,\n});\n\nconst storeSellerState = reactive<PageState<ShopSellerRecord>>({\n  isLoading: false,\n  loaded: false,\n  error: null,\n  data: null,\n});\n\nconst userSellerState = reactive<PageState<ShopSellerRecord>>({\n  isLoading: false,\n  loaded: false,\n  error: null,\n  data: null,\n});\n\nconst searchState = reactive<PageState<ShopSearchRecord>>({\n  isLoading: false,\n  loaded: false,\n  error: null,\n  data: null,\n});\n\nconst isShopProductLoading = computed(() => shopProductState.isLoading);\nconst isUsedProductLoading = computed(() => usedProductState.isLoading);\nconst isStoreSellerLoading = computed(() => storeSellerState.isLoading);\nconst isUserSellerLoading = computed(() => userSellerState.isLoading);\nconst isSearchLoading = computed(() => searchState.isLoading);\n\nfunction setStateLoading<T>(state: PageState<T>) {\n  state.isLoading = true;\n  state.loaded = false;\n  state.error = null;\n  state.data = null;\n}\n\nfunction setStateSuccess<T>(state: PageState<T>, data: T | null) {\n  state.data = data;\n  state.error = null;\n  state.loaded = true;\n}\n\nfunction setStateError<T>(state: PageState<T>, message: string) {\n  state.data = null;\n  state.error = message;\n  state.loaded = true;\n}\n\nfunction findShopProductFromHistory(targetType: \'shop\' | \'used\', context?: DetailContext | null): ShopProductRecord | null {\n  const targetTitle = normalizeMatchText(context?.title);\n  const targetSellerName = normalizeMatchText(context?.sellerName);\n  const targetKind = normalizeMatchText(context?.kind);\n  const targetPrice = normalizeMatchText(context?.price);\n  if (!targetTitle) return null;\n  const historyList = loadAllModuleFromHistory<ShopProductRecord>(\'shopProduct\');\n  if (!historyList.length) return null;\n\n  const targetStrictKey = stableShopHistoryKey(targetType, targetTitle, targetSellerName);\n  const targetLooseKey = stableShopHistoryKey(targetType, targetTitle);\n  const candidates: Array<{ record: ShopProductRecord; score: number; messageId: number }> = [];\n\n  for (const item of historyList) {\n    const normalized = normalizeShopProductRecord(item.data);\n    if (!normalized) continue;\n    if (normalizeBizType(normalized.bizType) !== targetType) continue;\n    const recordTitle = normalizeMatchText(normalized.title);\n    const recordSellerName = normalizeMatchText(normalized.sellerName);\n    if (!recordTitle) continue;\n\n    const recordStrictKey = stableShopHistoryKey(targetType, recordTitle, recordSellerName);\n    const recordLooseKey = stableShopHistoryKey(targetType, recordTitle);\n    let score = 0;\n\n    if (targetSellerName && recordStrictKey === targetStrictKey) score += 100;\n    if (recordLooseKey === targetLooseKey) score += 60;\n    if (targetKind && normalizeMatchText(normalized.kind) === targetKind) score += 10;\n    if (targetPrice && normalizeMatchText(normalized.price) === targetPrice) score += 8;\n    if (!targetSellerName && recordTitle === targetTitle) score += 20;\n\n    if (score > 0) candidates.push({ record: normalized, score, messageId: Number(item.messageId ?? -1) });\n  }\n\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || b.messageId - a.messageId);\n  return candidates[0]?.record ?? null;\n}\n\nfunction loadShopProductStateFromHistory(\n  targetType: \'shop\' | \'used\',\n  state: PageState<ShopProductRecord>,\n  context?: DetailContext | null,\n): boolean {\n  const matched = findShopProductFromHistory(targetType, context);\n  if (!matched) return false;\n  setStateSuccess(state, matched);\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction findShopSellerFromHistory(targetType: \'store\' | \'user\', context?: SellerContext | null): ShopSellerRecord | null {\n  const targetName = normalizeMatchText(context?.sellerName);\n  const sourceTitle = normalizeMatchText(context?.sourceTitle);\n  const sourceKind = normalizeMatchText(context?.sourceKind);\n  const historyList = loadAllModuleFromHistory<ShopSellerRecord>(\'shopSeller\');\n  if (!historyList.length) return null;\n\n  const candidates: Array<{ record: ShopSellerRecord; score: number; messageId: number }> = [];\n\n  for (const item of historyList) {\n    const data = item.data;\n    if (!data || typeof data !== \'object\') continue;\n\n    const sellerType = normalizeSellerType(data.sellerType || data.type);\n    if (sellerType !== targetType) continue;\n\n    const recordName = normalizeMatchText(data.name);\n    let score = 1;\n\n    if (targetName && recordName === targetName) score += 100;\n    if (sourceTitle && normalizeMatchText((data as any).sourceTitle) === sourceTitle) score += 8;\n    if (sourceKind && normalizeMatchText((data as any).sourceKind || (data as any).kind) === sourceKind) score += 4;\n    if (!targetName && recordName) score += 2;\n\n    candidates.push({ record: data, score, messageId: Number(item.messageId ?? -1) });\n  }\n\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || b.messageId - a.messageId);\n  const best = candidates[0];\n  if (!best) return null;\n  if (targetName && best.score < 100) return null;\n  return best.record;\n}\n\nfunction loadShopSellerStateFromHistory(\n  targetType: \'store\' | \'user\',\n  state: PageState<ShopSellerRecord>,\n  context?: SellerContext | null,\n): boolean {\n  const matched = findShopSellerFromHistory(targetType, context);\n  if (!matched) return false;\n  setStateSuccess(state, matched);\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction setViewError(message: unknown, fallback: string) {\n  viewError.value = toText(message) || fallback;\n}\n\nasync function withActionLoading(label: string, task: () => Promise<void>) {\n  if (isActionLoading.value) return;\n  isActionLoading.value = true;\n  actionLoadingText.value = label;\n  viewError.value = null;\n  try {\n    await task();\n  } finally {\n    isActionLoading.value = false;\n    actionLoadingText.value = \'\';\n  }\n}\n\nfunction handleAbort() {\n  abortCurrentRequest();\n}\n\nasync function
