generateHomeData(trigger: \'refresh\' | \'manual\' = \'refresh\') {\n  shoppingHomeState.isLoading = true;\n  shoppingHomeState.error = null;\n  shoppingHomeState.loaded = false;\n  shoppingHomeState.data = null;\n  try {\n    const { fetchShopHomeDataFromAi } = await import(\'../../棰勮/aiService\');\n    const result = await fetchShopHomeDataFromAi({ trigger });\n    if (result.success && result.data) {\n      shoppingHomeState.data = result.data as ShopHomeDataState;\n      shoppingHomeState.loaded = true;\n      await saveToTavernMessage(\'shopHome\', result.data);\n    } else {\n      const error = result.error || \'鐢熸垚缃戣喘涓婚〉澶辫触\';\n      shoppingHomeState.error = error;\n      shoppingHomeState.loaded = true;\n      shoppingHomeState.data = null;\n      setViewError(error, \'鐢熸垚缃戣喘涓婚〉澶辫触\');\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : \'鐢熸垚缃戣喘涓婚〉澶辫触\';\n    shoppingHomeState.error = message;\n    shoppingHomeState.loaded = true;\n    shoppingHomeState.data = null;\n    setViewError(message, \'鐢熸垚缃戣喘涓婚〉澶辫触\');\n  } finally {\n    shoppingHomeState.isLoading = false;\n  }\n}\n\nasync function generateProductData(\n  targetType: \'shop\' | \'used\',\n  state: PageState<ShopProductRecord>,\n  context?: DetailContext | null,\n): Promise<void> {\n  if (state.isLoading) return;\n  state.isLoading = true;\n  state.error = null;\n  if (!state.loaded) {\n    state.data = null;\n  }\n  try {\n    const { fetchShopProductDataFromAi } = await import(\'../../棰勮/aiService\');\n    const result = await fetchShopProductDataFromAi({\n      bizType: targetType,\n      title: toText(context?.title) || \'鏈懡鍚嶅晢鍝乗',\n      price: toText(context?.price),\n      sellerName: toText(context?.sellerName),\n      kind: toText(context?.kind),\n    });\n    if (result.success && result.data) {\n      const resolvedSellerName = toText((result.data as ShopProductRecord).sellerName) || toText(context?.sellerName);\n      if (!resolvedSellerName) {\n        throw new Error(\'鍟嗗搧璇︽儏缂哄皯鍗栧鍚嶇О锛屽凡鍙栨秷鍐欏叆\');\n      }\n      (result.data as ShopProductRecord).sellerName = resolvedSellerName;\n      const savedMessageId = await saveToTavernMessage(\'shopProduct\', result.data);\n      if (savedMessageId == null) {\n        throw new Error(\'鍟嗗搧璇︽儏鍐欏叆閰掗澶辫触\');\n      }\n      const loadedFromHistory = loadShopProductStateFromHistory(targetType, state, context);\n      if (!loadedFromHistory) {\n        throw new Error(\'鍟嗗搧璇︽儏鍐欏叆鍚庢湭鑳戒粠閰掗鍘嗗彶绮剧‘鍖归厤鍒板搴斿晢鍝乗');\n      }\n    } else {\n      const error = result.error || \'鐢熸垚鍟嗗搧璇︽儏澶辫触\';\n      setStateError(state, error);\n      setViewError(error, \'鐢熸垚鍟嗗搧璇︽儏澶辫触\');\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : \'鐢熸垚鍟嗗搧璇︽儏澶辫触\';\n    setStateError(state, message);\n    setViewError(message, \'鐢熸垚鍟嗗搧璇︽儏澶辫触\');\n  } finally {\n    state.isLoading = false;\n  }\n}\n\nasync function generateSellerData(\n  targetType: \'store\' | \'user\',\n  state: PageState<ShopSellerRecord>,\n  context?: SellerContext | null,\n): Promise<void> {\n  if (state.isLoading) return;\n  setStateLoading(state);\n  try {\n    const { fetchShopSellerDataFromAi } = await import(\'../../棰勮/aiService\');\n    const result = await fetchShopSellerDataFromAi({\n      sellerType: targetType,\n      sellerName: toText(context?.sellerName) || (targetType === \'store\' ? \'瀹樻柟搴楅摵\' : \'涓汉鍗栧\'),\n      sourceTitle: toText(context?.sourceTitle),\n      sourceKind: toText(context?.sourceKind),\n    });\n    if (result.success && result.data) {\n      setStateSuccess(state, result.data as ShopSellerRecord);\n      await saveToTavernMessage(\'shopSeller\', result.data);\n    } else {\n      const error = result.error || \'鐢熸垚鍗栧鏁版嵁澶辫触\';\n      setStateError(state, error);\n      setViewError(error, \'鐢熸垚鍗栧鏁版嵁澶辫触\');\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : \'鐢熸垚鍗栧鏁版嵁澶辫触\';\n    setStateError(state, message);\n    setViewError(message, \'鐢熸垚鍗栧鏁版嵁澶辫触\');\n  } finally {\n    state.isLoading = false;\n  }\n}\n\nasync function generateSearchData(keyword: string, source: SearchSource): Promise<void> {\n  if (searchState.isLoading) return;\n  setStateLoading(searchState);\n  try {\n    const { fetchShopSearchDataFromAi } = await import(\'../../棰勮/aiService\');\n    const result = await fetchShopSearchDataFromAi({\n      keyword: toText(keyword) || \'鍏ㄩ儴\',\n      source,\n    });\n    if (result.success && result.data) {\n      setStateSuccess(searchState, result.data as ShopSearchRecord);\n      await saveToTavernMessage(\'shopSearch\', result.data);\n    } else {\n      const error = result.error || \'鐢熸垚鎼滅储缁撴灉澶辫触\';\n      setStateError(searchState, error);\n      setViewError(error, \'鐢熸垚鎼滅储缁撴灉澶辫触\');\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : \'鐢熸垚鎼滅储缁撴灉澶辫触\';\n    setStateError(searchState, message);\n    setViewError(message, \'鐢熸垚鎼滅储缁撴灉澶辫触\');\n  } finally {\n    searchState.isLoading = false;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction openDetail(\n  type: \'shop\' | \'used\',\n  item?: { title?: string; name?: string; sellerName?: string; seller?: string; price?: string; kind?: string },\n) {\n  detailContext.value = {\n    bizType: type,\n    title: toText(item?.title) || toText(item?.name),\n    sellerName: toText(item?.sellerName) || toText(item?.seller),\n    price: toText(item?.price),\n    kind: toText(item?.kind),\n  };\n  currentView.value = type === \'shop\' ? \'detail-shop\' : \'detail-used\';\n  const targetState = type === \'shop\' ? shopProductState : usedProductState;\n  const loadedFromHistory = loadShopProductStateFromHistory(type, targetState, detailContext.value);\n  if (loadedFromHistory) return;\n  targetState.data = null;\n  targetState.error = null;\n  targetState.loaded = false;\n  void withActionLoading(type === \'shop\' ? \'姝ｅ湪鐢熸垚鍟嗗搧璇︽儏...\' : \'姝ｅ湪鐢熸垚浜屾墜鍟嗗搧璇︽儏...\', async () => {\n    await generateProductData(type, targetState, detailContext.value);\n  });\n}\n\nfunction goHome() {\n  store.activeApp = \'home\';\n}\n\nasync function refreshPage() {\n  if (isRefreshing.value || isActionLoading.value) return;\n  isRefreshing.value = true;\n  try {\n    await withActionLoading(\'姝ｅ湪鐢熸垚缃戣喘涓婚〉...\', async () => {\n      await generateHomeData(\'refresh\');\n    });\n  } finally {\n    isRefreshing.value = false;\n  }\n}\n\nfunction openSearch(keyword?: string, source: SearchSource = \'search\') {\n  searchKeyword.value = toText(keyword);\n  searchSource.value = source;\n  searchTab.value = \'shop\';\n  currentView.value = \'search\';\n  void withActionLoading(\'姝ｅ湪鐢熸垚鎼滅储缁撴灉...\', async () => {\n    await generateSearchData(searchKeyword.value || bannerTitle.value || \'鍏ㄩ儴\', searchSource.value);\n  });\n}\n\nfunction submitSearchFromInput() {\n  const keyword = toText(homeSearchInput.value);\n  openSearch(keyword || undefined, \'search\');\n}\n\nfunction openSellerPage(type: \'store\' | \'user\') {\n  sellerContext.value = {\n    sellerType: type,\n    sellerName: type === \'store\' ? detailShopSellerName.value : detailUsedSellerName.value,\n    sourceTitle: type === \'store\' ? detailShopTitle.value : detailUsedTitle.value,\n    sourceKind: toText(detailContext.value?.kind),\n  };\n  currentView.value = type === \'store\' ? \'shop-seller\' : \'personal-seller\';\n  const targetState = type === \'store\' ? storeSellerState : userSellerState;\n  const loadedFromHistory = loadShopSellerStateFromHistory(type, targetState, sellerContext.value);\n  if (loadedFromHistory) return;\n  targetState.data = null;\n  targetState.error = null;\n  targetState.loaded = false;\n  void withActionLoading(\'姝ｅ湪鐢熸垚鍗栧椤甸潰...\', async () => {\n    await generateSellerData(type, targetState, sellerContext.value);\n  });\n}\n\nfunction openSellerFromSearch(type: \'store\' | \'user\', item?: { name?: string; type?: string }) {\n  sellerContext.value = {\n    sellerType: type,\n    sellerName: toText(item?.name) || (type === \'store\' ? \'瀹樻柟搴楅摵\' : \'涓汉鍗栧\'),\n    sourceTitle: searchKeywordDisplay.value,\n    sourceKind: toText(item?.type),\n  };\n  currentView.value = type === \'store\' ? \'shop-seller\' : \'personal-seller\';\n  const targetState = type === \'store\' ? storeSellerState : userSellerState;\n  const loadedFromHistory = loadShopSellerStateFromHistory(type, targetState, sellerContext.value);\n  if (loadedFromHistory) return;\n  targetState.data = null;\n  targetState.error = null;\n  targetState.loaded = false;\n  void withActionLoading(\'姝ｅ湪鐢熸垚鍗栧椤甸潰...\', async () => {\n    await generateSellerData(type, targetState, sellerContext.value);\n  });\n}\n\nfunction openSellerFromFollowing(type: \'store\' | \'user\', name: string) {\n  const displayName = name || (type === \'store\' ? \'瀹樻柟搴楅摵\' : \'涓汉鍗栧\');\n  sellerContext.value = {\n    sellerType: type,\n    sellerName: displayName,\n    sourceTitle: \'\',\n    sourceKind: \'\',\n  };\n  currentView.value = type === \'store\' ? \'shop-seller\' : \'personal-seller\';\n  const targetState = type === \'store\' ? storeSellerState : userSellerState;\n\n  // 鍙帴鍙楃簿纭悕绉板尮閰嶏紝涓嶄娇鐢?fallback\n  const historyList = loadAllModuleFromHistory<ShopSellerRecord>(\'shopSeller\');\n  const normalizedTarget = normalizeMatchText(displayName);\n  const exactMatch = historyList.find(h => {\n    const d = h.data;\n    if (!d || typeof d !== \'object\') return false;\n    if (normalizeSellerType(d.sellerType || d.type) !== type) return false;\n    return normalizedTarget && normalizeMatchText(d.name) === normalizedTarget;\n  });\n  if (exactMatch) {\n    setStateSuccess(targetState, exactMatch.data);\n    return;\n  }\n\n  targetState.data = null;\n  targetState.error = null;\n  targetState.loaded = false;\n  void withActionLoading(\'姝ｅ湪鐢熸垚鍗栧椤甸潰...\', async () => {\n    await generateSellerData(type, targetState, sellerContext.value);\n  });\n}\n\nfunction openBannerSearch() {\n  const keyword = [bannerTitle.value, bannerSubtitle.value].map(item => toText(item)).filter(Boolean).join(\' \');\n  openSearch(keyword || \'娲诲姩\', \'activity\');\n}\n\nfunction toggleReveal(e: Event) {\n  const wrap = (e.currentTarget as HTMLElement);\n  const overlay = wrap.querySelector(\'.img-mask-overlay\');\n  if (overlay) overlay.classList.toggle(\'revealed\');\n}\n\n// ========== 鍏虫敞 ==========\nconst CHAT_SHOP_FOLLOWINGS_KEY = \'phone_data.shopping.followings\';\nconst shopFollowings = ref<ShopFollowingItem[]>([]);\n\nfunction loadShopFollowingsFromChatVariables(): ShopFollowingItem[] {\n  try {\n    const chatVars = getVariables({ type: \'chat\' }) || {};\n    const raw = _.get(chatVars, CHAT_SHOP_FOLLOWINGS_KEY);\n    if (!Array.isArray(raw)) return [];\n    const list = raw.map(normalizeFollowingItem).filter(Boolean) as ShopFollowingItem[];\n    return dedupeFollowings(list);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.warn(\'[Shopping] 璇诲彇鍏虫敞鍒楄〃澶辫触(蹇界暐):\', error);\n    return [];\n  }\n}\n\nfunction saveShopFollowingsToChatVariables(items: ShopFollowingItem[]) {\n  const normalizedItems = dedupeFollowings(items);\n\n  try {\n    const chatVars = getVariables({ type: \'chat\' }) || {};\n    const nextPhoneData = _.cloneDeep(_.get(chatVars, \'phone_data\') || {});\n    _.set(nextPhoneData, \'shopping.followings\', normalizedItems);\n\n    if (typeof insertOrAssignVariables === \'function\') {\n      insertOrAssignVariables({ phone_data: nextPhoneData }, { type: \'chat\' });\n      return;\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.warn(\'[Shopping] insertOrAssignVariables 淇濆瓨鍏虫敞澶辫触锛屽皾璇?fallback:\', error);\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const chatVars = getVariables({ type: \'chat\' }) || {};\n    const next = _.cloneDeep(chatVars);\n    _.set(next, CHAT_SHOP_FOLLOWINGS_KEY, normalizedItems);\n    replaceVariables(next, { type: \'chat\' });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\'[Shopping] 淇濆瓨鍏虫敞鍒楄〃澶辫触:\', error);\n  }\n}\n\nfunction isFollowed(type: ShopFollowingType, name: unknown): boolean {\n  const normalizedName = normalizeFollowName(name);\n  if (!normalizedName) return false;\n  return shopFollowings.value.some(row => row.type === type && normalizeFollowName(row.name) === normalizedName);\n}\n\nfunction toggleFollow(type: ShopFollowingType, name: unknown) {\n  const normalizedType = normalizeFollowType(type);\n  const displayName = toText(name).replace(/\\s+/g, \' \');\n  const normalizedName = normalizeFollowName(displayName);\n  if (!normalizedType || !normalizedName) return;\n\n  const exists = shopFollowings.value.some(\n    row => row.type === normalizedType && normalizeFollowName(row.name) === normalizedName,\n  );\n\n  const next = exists\n    ? shopFollowings.value.filter(\n      row => !(row.type === normalizedType && normalizeFollowName(row.name) === normalizedName),\n    )\n    : [...shopFollowings.value, { type: normalizedType, name: displayName }];\n\n  shopFollowings.value = dedupeFollowings(next);\n  saveShopFollowingsToChatVariables(shopFollowings.value);\n}\n\n// ========== 璐墿杞?==========\nconst CART_MAX = 50;\nconst cartItems = ref<CartItem[]>([]);\nconst cartSelectedIds = ref<Set<string>>(new Set());\nconst cartToast = ref<string | null>(null);\nlet cartToastTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;\n\nfunction loadCartFromVariables(): CartItem[] {\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' });\n    const raw = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data.cart\');\n    if (Array.isArray(raw)) {\n      return raw.filter((item: any) => item && typeof item === \'object\' && item.id && item.title)\n        .map((item: any) => ({\n          id: String(item.id),\n          title: String(item.title),\n          price: String(item.price || \'楼0\'),\n          kind: String(item.kind || \'official\'),\n          sellerName: String(item.sellerName || \'\'),\n          iconName: normalizeIconName(item.iconName),\n          quantity: Math.max(1, Number(item.quantity) || 1),\n          addedAt: Number(item.addedAt) || Date.now(),\n        }));\n    }\n  } catch { /* ignore */ }\n  return [];\n}\n\nfunction saveCartToVariables() {\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' });\n    const phoneData = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data\') || {};\n    _.set(phoneData, \'cart\', cartItems.value.map(item => ({ ...item })));\n    _.set(charVars, \'phone_data\', phoneData);\n    replaceVariables(charVars, { type: \'character\' });\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error(\'[Cart] 淇濆瓨璐墿杞﹀け璐?\', e);\n  }\n}\n\nfunction showCartToast(msg: string) {\n  cartToast.value = msg;\n  if (cartToastTimer) clearTimeout(cartToastTimer);\n  cartToastTimer = setTimeout(() => { cartToast.value = null; }, 1500);\n}\n\nfunction makeCartId(title: string, kind: string): string {\n  return `${title}__${kind}`;\n}\n\nfunction addToCart(item: { title?: string; price?: string; kind?: string; sellerName?: string; iconName?: string }) {\n  const title = toText(item?.title);\n  if (!title) return;\n  const kind = toText(item?.kind) || \'official\';\n  const iconName = normalizeIconName(item?.iconName);\n  const id = makeCartId(title, kind);\n  const existing = cartItems.value.find(c => c.id === id);\n  if (existing) {\n    if (existing.quantity >= 99) { showCartToast(\'鍗曚欢鍟嗗搧鏈€澶?9浠禱'); return; }\n    existing.quantity++;\n    if (iconName) existing.iconName = iconName;\n    showCartToast(`${title} x${existing.quantity}`);\n  } else {\n    if (cartItems.value.length >= CART_MAX) { showCartToast(`璐墿杞﹀凡婊★紙鏈€澶?{CART_MAX}浠讹級`); return; }\n    cartItems.value.push({\n      id,\n      title,\n      price: toPrice(item?.price),\n      kind,\n      sellerName: toText(item?.sellerName) || (kind === \'used\' ? \'涓汉鍗栧\' : \'瀹樻柟搴楅摵\'),\n      iconName,\n      quantity: 1,\n      addedAt: Date.now(),\n    });\n    showCartToast(`宸插姞鍏ヨ喘鐗╄溅`);\n  }\n  saveCartToVariables();\n}\n\nfunction addToCartFromDetail() {\n  if (currentView.value === \'detail-shop\' && detailShopData.value) {\n    addToCart({\n      title: detailShopTitle.value,\n      price: detailShopPrice.value,\n      kind: detailContext.value?.kind,\n      sellerName: detailShopSellerName.value,\n      iconName: detailShopIconName.value,\n    });\n  } else if (currentView.value === \'detail-used\' && detailUsedData.value) {\n    addToCart({\n      title: detailUsedTitle.value,\n      price: detailUsedPrice.value,\n      kind: detailContext.value?.kind || \'used\',\n      sellerName: detailUsedSellerName.value,\n      iconName: detailUsedIconName.value,\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction removeCartItem(id: string) {\n  cartItems.value = cartItems.value.filter(c => c.id !== id);\n  cartSelectedIds.value.delete(id);\n  saveCartToVariables();\n}\n\nfunction updateCartQuantity(id: string, delta: number) {\n  const item = cartItems.value.find(c => c.id === id);\n  if (!item) return;\n  const newQty = item.quantity + delta;\n  if (newQty < 1) return;\n  if (newQty > 99) { showCartToast(\'鍗曚欢鍟嗗搧鏈€澶?9浠禱'); return; }\n  item.quantity = newQty;\n  saveCartToVariables();\n}\n\nfunction toggleCartSelect(id: string) {\n  if (cartSelectedIds.value.has(id)) {\n    cartSelectedIds.value.delete(id);\n  } else {\n    cartSelectedIds.value.add(id);\n  }\n  cartSelectedIds.value = new Set(cartSelectedIds.value);\n}\n\nconst isCartAllSelected = computed(() => cartItems.value.length > 0 && cartItems.value.every(c => cartSelectedIds.value.has(c.id)));\n\nfunction toggleCartSelectAll() {\n  if (isCartAllSelected.value) {\n    cartSelectedIds.value = new Set();\n  } else {\n    cartSelectedIds.value = new Set(cartItems.value.map(c => c.id));\n  }\n}\n\nfunction clearCart() {\n  cartItems.value = [];\n  cartSelectedIds.value = new Set();\n  saveCartToVariables();\n  showCartToast(\'璐墿杞﹀凡娓呯┖\');\n}\n\nconst cartTotalCount = computed(() => cartItems.value.reduce((sum, c) => sum + c.quantity, 0));\n\nfunction parsePrice(priceText: string): number {\n  const num = parseFloat(priceText.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, \'\'));\n  return Number.isFinite(num) ? num : 0;\n}\n\nconst cartSelectedTotal = computed(() => {\n  let total = 0;\n  for (const item of cartItems.value) {\n    if (cartSelectedIds.value.has(item.id)) {\n      total += parsePrice(item.price) * item.quantity;\n    }\n  }\n  return total;\n});\n\nconst cartSelectedCount = computed(() => {\n  let count = 0;\n  for (const item of cartItems.value) {\n    if (cartSelectedIds.value.has(item.id)) count += item.quantity;\n  }\n  return count;\n});\n\nfunction openCart() {\n  currentView.value = \'main\';\n  switchMainPanel(\'cart\');\n}\n\nfunction switchMainPanel(panel: \'home\' | \'category\' | \'cart\') {\n  if (panel === \'home\') {\n    showCategory.value = false;\n    showCart.value = false;\n    return;\n  }\n  if (panel === \'category\') {\n    showCategory.value = true;\n    showCart.value = false;\n    return;\n  }\n  showCategory.value = false;\n  showCart.value = true;\n}\n\n// ========== 璁㈠崟 ==========\nconst orderItems = ref<OrderItem[]>([]);\nconst orderRecipient = ref<{ name: string; nickname?: string } | null>(null);\nconst orderPaymentMethod = ref<\'wechat\' | \'alipay\' | \'bank\'>(\'wechat\');\nconst showRecipientPicker = ref(false);\nconst lastOrder = ref<Order | null>(null);\nconst orderSource = ref<\'buy-now\' | \'cart\'>(\'cart\');\n\nconst orderSubtotal = computed(() => {\n  return orderItems.value.reduce((sum, item) => sum + parsePrice(item.price) * item.quantity, 0);\n});\nconst orderShipping = computed(() => orderSubtotal.value >= 99 ? 0 : 8);\nconst orderTotal = computed(() => orderSubtotal.value + orderShipping.value);\n\nconst availableRecipients = computed(() => {\n  const list: Array<{ name: string; nickname?: string }> = [];\n  try {\n    const charVars = getVariables({ type: \'character\' });\n    const phoneData = _.get(charVars, \'phone_data\') || {};\n    const userName = phoneData.user?.name;\n    if (userName) {\n      list.push({ name: userName, nickname: phoneData.user.nickname });\n    }\n    if (Array.isArray(phoneData.characters)) {\n      for (const c of phoneData.characters) {\n        if (c?.name && c.name !== userName) list.push({ name: c.name, nickname: c.nickname });\n      }\n    }\n  } catch { /* ignore */ }\n  return list;\n});\n\nfunction initOrderDefaults() {\n  orderPaymentMethod.value = buyNowFromDetail() {\n  let item: OrderItem | null = null;\n  if (currentView.value === \'detail-shop\' && detailShopData.value) {\n    item = {\n      title: detailShopTitle.value,\n      price: detailShopPrice.value,\n      kind: detailContext.value?.kind || \'official\',\n      sellerName: detailShopSellerName.value,\n      iconName: detailShopIconName.value,\n      quantity: 1,\n    };\n  } else if (currentView.value === \'detail-used\' && detailUsedData.value) {\n    item = {\n      title: detailUsedTitle.value,\n      price: detailUsedPrice.value,\n      kind: orderItems.value = [item];\n  orderSource.value = \'buy-now\';\n  initOrderDefaults();\n  currentView.value = \'order\';\n}\n\nfunction checkoutFromCart() {\n  if (cartSelectedCount.value === 0) return;\n  const selected: OrderItem[] = [];\n  for (const item of cartItems.value) {\n    if (cartSelectedIds.value.has(item.id)) {\n      selected.push({\n        title: item.title,\n        price: item.price,\n        kind: item.kind,\n        sellerName: item.sellerName,\n        iconName: item.iconName,\n        quantity: item.quantity,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  if (selected.length === 0) return;\n  orderItems.value = selected;\n  orderSource.value = \'cart\';\n  initOrderDefaults();\n  currentView.value = \'order\';\n}\n\nfunction generateOrderId(): string {\n  return   cartSelectedIds.value = new Set();\n    saveCartToVariables();\n  }\n  currentView.value = \'order-success\';\n}\n\n// ========== 鎴戠殑椤甸潰 ==========\ntype MyPageTab = \'orders\' | \'footprints\' | _.get(charVars, \'phone_data\') || {};\n    return { name: phoneData.user?.name || \'鐢ㄦ埛\', nickname: phoneData.user?.nickname, avatar: phoneData.user?.avatar };\n  } catch { return { name: \'鐢ㄦ埛\' }; }\n});\n\nfunction openMyPage() {\n  currentView.value = \'my\';\n  loadMyPageData();\n}\n\nfunction loadMyPageData() {\n  isMyLoading.value = true;\n  try {\n    // 鍔犺浇鍘嗗彶璁㈠崟\n    const orderHistory = loadAllModuleFromHistory<Order>(\'shopOrder\');\n    myOrders.value = orderHistory\n      .map(h => h.data)\n      .filter(d => d && d.id && Array.isArray(d.items));\n\n    // tabs.length ? tabs : [\'selling\', \'sold\'];\n});\n\nfunction getPersonalTabLabel(tab: PersonalTabKey): string {\n  return PERSONAL_TAB_LABELS[tab] || tab;\n}\n\nconst personalReviews = computed(() => {\n  const rows = userSellerData.value?.userFields?.buyerReviews;\n  if (!Array.isArray(rows)) return [];\n  return rows.map((row, index) => {\n    const color = COLOR_POOL[index % COLOR_POOL.length];\n    return {\n      name: toText(row?.userName) || `涔板${index + 1}`,\n      bg: color.bg,\n      color: color.color,\n      time: \'--\',\n      text: toText(row?.content) || \'鏆傛棤璇勪环鍐呭\',\n    };\n  });\n});\n\nconst personalSelling = computed(() => mapSellerProductRows(userSellerData.value?.userFields?.sellingItems));\nconst personalSold = computed(() => mapSellerProductRows(userSellerData.value?.userFields?.soldItems));\n\nwatch(\n  shopSellerTabs,\n  tabs => {\n    if (!tabs.includes(shopSellerTab.value)) {\n      shopSellerTab.value = tabs[0];\n    }\n  },\n  { immediate: true },\n);\n\nwatch(\n  personalTabs,\n  tabs => {\n    if (!tabs.includes(personalTab.value)) {\n      personalTab.value = tabs[0];\n    }\n  },\n  { immediate: true Store/User Search */\n.store-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }\n.store-card { border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(143,184,237,0.15); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }\n.store-logo { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }\n.store-logo-icon { color: white; font-size: 18px; }\n.user-avatar-lg { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }\n.user-avatar-lg i { font-size: 18px; }\n.store-info { flex: 1; }\n.store-name-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }\n.store-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; }\n.store-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; margin-top: 2px; }\n.store-stats { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-top: 4px; font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; }\n.store-stats b { color: #475569; }\n.credit-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 4px; }\n.credit-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #8FB8ED; white-space: nowrap; }\n.credit-bar { height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: rgba(143,184,237,0.15); overflow: hidden; flex: 1; max-width: 60px; }\n.credit-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8FB8ED, #A8D4F0); }\n\n/* Seller Pages */\n.seller-cover { height: 140px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(143,184,237,0.25), rgba(168,212,240,0.15), rgba(255,200,221,0.1)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: -12px -16px 0; width: calc(100% + 32px); }\n.seller-cover-icon { font-size: 48px; color: #8FB8ED; opacity: 0.15; }\n.seller-info-card-wrap { margin-top: -40px; position: relative; z-index: 10; }\n.seller-info-card { border-radius: 24px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(143,184,237,0.15); }\n.seller-info-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }\n.seller-big-avatar { width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-size: 20px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px -10px rgba(143,184,237,0.4); }\n.bg-blue-grad { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#8FB8ED,#7AA8E0); }\n.seller-info-text { flex: 1; }\n.seller-info-name { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; }\n.stat-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(143,184,237,0.1); }\n.stat-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; }\n.stat-num { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: #475569; }\n.stat-label { font-size: 10px; color: #94A3B8; font-weight: 600; }\n.seller-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 12px; }\n.seller-actions .btn-cart, .seller-actions .btn-buy { flex: 1; padding: 8px 0; font-size: 14px; }\n\n/* Coupon */\n.coupon-bar { border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,200,221,0.15), rgba(143,184,237,0.1)); }\n.coupon-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(255,200,221,0.25); color: #FF8FAB; font-size: 14px; }\n.coupon-info { flex: 1; }\n.coupon-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; }\n.coupon-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; }\n.coupon-get { padding: 4px 12px; }\n\n/* Seller Tabs */\n.seller-tabs, .personal-tabs { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 4px 0; }\n\n/* Seller Products */\n.seller-products { padding: 0 0 16px; }\n\n/* Personal Seller */\n.personal-card-wrap { padding: 0 0 12px; }\n.personal-avatar { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(143,184,237,0.2), rgba(255,200,221,0.15)); color: #8FB8ED; font-size: 24px; }\n.personal-bio { font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.6; }\n\n/* Sold Cards */\n.sold-card { opacity: 0.6; }\n.price-sold { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: #94A3B8; }\n.sold-badge { font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 600; background: rgba(143,184,237,0.1); color: #94A3B8; }\n\n/* Shop Meta */\n.shop-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(143,184,237,0.1); font-size: 12px; color: #94A3B8; }\n.shop-meta i { color: #8FB8ED; margin-right: 4px; }\n\n/* Cart Toast */\n.cart-toast {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 50%;\n  left: 50%;\n  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);\n  z-index: 150;\n  background: rgba(71, 85, 105, 0.88);\n  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  padding: 10px 20px;\n  color: white;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 8px;\n  font-size: 13px;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n.cart-toast i { color: #8FB8ED; }\n\n/* Nav Badge */\n.nav-badge {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: -4px;\n  right: -8px;\n  min-width: 16px;\n  height: 16px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: #FF6B6B;\n  color: white;\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  padding: 0 4px;\n  line-height: 1;\n}\n\n/* Header Badge */\n.header-badge {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: -4px;\n  right: -8px;\n  min-width: 16px;\n  height: 16px;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: #FF6B6B;\n  color: white;\n  font-size: 10px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  padding: 0 4px;\n  line-height: 1;\n}\n\n/* Cart List */\n.cart-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }\n.cart-item {\n  border-radius: 20px;\n  padding: 12px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  gap: 10px;\n  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(143,184,237,0.15);\n  position: relative;\n}\n.cart-check {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 6px;\n  cursor: pointer;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n  padding-top: 14px;\n}\n.cart-check i {\n  font-size: 20px;\n  color: #CBD5E1;\n  transition: color 0.2s;\n}\n.cart-check.checked i { color: #8FB8ED; }\n\n.check-box {\n  width: 20px;\n  height: 20px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n  border: 2px solid #CBD5E1;\n  background: white;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  transition: all 0.2s;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n.cart-check.checked .check-box {\n  background: #8FB8ED;\n  border-color: #8FB8ED;\n}\n.check-box i { font-size: 10px; color: white; }\n.cart-check-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569; }\n\n.cart-item-icon {\n  width: 72px;\n  height: 72px;\n  border-radius: 16px;\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n.cart-icon-inner { font-size: 28px; color: #8FB8ED; }\n\n.cart-item-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding-right: 24px; }\n.cart-item-title {\n 8px;\n}\n\n.cart-qty-ctrl {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0;\n  background: rgba(143,184,237,0.08);\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n.qty-btn {\n  width: 28px;\n transition: background 0.2s;\n}\n.qty-btn:active { background: rgba(143,184,237,0.15); }\n.qty-btn.disabled { color: #CBD5E1; pointer-events: none; }\n.qty-num {\n  min-width: 28px;\n  text-align: center;\n  font-size: 14px;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  color: #475569;\n}\n\n.cart-del-btn {\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 10px;\n  right: 10px;\n  width: 28px;\n  height: 28px;\n  border-radius: 50%;\n
